titles.english: Wishes

titles.arabic: كتاب أخبار الآحاد
titles.english: Accepting Information Given by a Truthful Person

titles.arabic: كتاب الاعتصام بالكتاب والسنة
titles.english: Holding Fast to the Qur'an and Sunnah

titles.arabic: كتاب التوحيد
titles.english: Oneness, Uniqueness of Allah (Tawheed)

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ كَانَ بَدْءُ الْوَحْىِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: How the Divine Revelation started being revealed to Allah's Messenger

titles.arabic: باب بَدْءُ الأَذَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: How the Adhan for Salat (Prayer) was started

titles.arabic: باب الأَذَانُ مَثْنَى مَثْنَى
titles.english: Chapter: Pronouncing the wording of Adhan for Salat (prayers) twice (in doubles)

titles.arabic: باب الإِقَامَةُ وَاحِدَةٌ، إِلاَّ قَوْلَهُ قَدْ قَامَتِ الصَّلاَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: To pronounce the wording of Iqama once (in singles) except Qad-qamat-is-Salat

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّأْذِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of the Adhan

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الصَّوْتِ بِالنِّدَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Raising the voice in pronouncing the Adhan

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُحْقَنُ بِالأَذَانِ مِنَ الدِّمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To suspend fighting on hearing the Adhan

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا سَمِعَ الْمُنَادِي
titles.english: Chapter: What to say on hearing the Adhan

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ النِّدَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation at the time of Adhan

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِهَامِ فِي الأَذَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To draw lots for pronouncing the Adhan

titles.arabic: باب الْكَلاَمِ فِي الأَذَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Talking during the Adhan

titles.arabic: باب أَذَانِ الأَعْمَى إِذَا كَانَ لَهُ مَنْ يُخْبِرُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Adhan pronounced by a blind man (is permissible) when there is a person to inform him about the time of the Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الأَذَانِ بَعْدَ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Adhan after Al-Fajr (dawn)

titles.arabic: باب الأَذَانِ قَبْلَ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Adhan before Al-Fajr (dawn)

titles.arabic: باب كَمْ بَيْنَ الأَذَانِ وَالإِقَامَةِ وَمَنْ يَنْتَظِرُ الإِقَامَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: How long should the interval between the Adhan and the Iqama be? (And something concerning) the person who wants for the Iqama

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ انْتَظَرَ الإِقَامَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever waits for the Iqama of the prayer

titles.arabic: باب بَيْنَ كُلِّ أَذَانَيْنِ صَلاَةٌ لِمَنْ شَاءَ
titles.english: Chapter: Between every two calls (Adhan and Iqama) there is a Salat (prayer) (that is optional) for the one who wants to offer it.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَالَ لِيُؤَذِّنْ فِي السَّفَرِ مُؤَذِّنٌ وَاحِدٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever said that there should be one Mu'adh-dhin in the journey

titles.arabic: باب الأَذَانِ لِلْمُسَافِرِ إِذَا كَانُوا جَمَاعَةً، وَالإِقَامَةِ، وَكَذَلِكَ بِعَرَفَةَ وَجَمْعٍ
titles.english: Chapter: If there are many travellers, Adhan and Iqama should be pronounced, (the same is to be observed) in 'Arafat and Al-Muzdalifa too

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَتَتَبَّعُ الْمُؤَذِّنُ فَاهُ هَا هُنَا وَهَا هُنَا، وَهَلْ يَلْتَفِتُ فِي الأَذَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Should the Mu'adh-dhin turn his mouth (face) and look from side to side during the Adhan?

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ فَاتَتْنَا الصَّلاَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of a person "We have missed As-Salat (the prayer)"

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَسْعَى إِلَى الصَّلاَةِ، وَلْيَأْتِ بِالسَّكِينَةِ وَالْوَقَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not run for As-Salat (the prayer) but present himself with calmness and solemnity

titles.arabic: باب مَتَى يَقُومُ النَّاسُ إِذَا رَأَوُا الإِمَامَ عِنْدَ الإِقَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: When should the people get up for the Salat (prayer) if they see the Imam (the person leading Salat) during the Iqama?

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَسْعَى إِلَى الصَّلاَةِ مُسْتَعْجِلاً، وَلْيَقُمْ بِالسَّكِينَةِ وَالْوَقَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not stand for As-Salat (the prayer) hurriedly but with calmness and solemnity.

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ لِعِلَّةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Can one go out of the mosque (after the Adhan, or the Iqama) if there is a genuine excuse?

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ الإِمَامُ مَكَانَكُمْ. حَتَّى رَجَعَ انْتَظَرُوهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam says, "Remain at your places till I return", then wait for him

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ مَا صَلَّيْنَا
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of a man to the Prophet (pbuh), "We have not prayed."

titles.arabic: باب الإِمَامِ تَعْرِضُ لَهُ الْحَاجَةُ بَعْدَ الإِقَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam is confronted with a problem after the Iqama

titles.arabic: باب الْكَلاَمِ إِذَا أُقِيمَتِ الصَّلاَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: To talk after the Iqama

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ صَلاَةِ الْجَمَاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Congregational Salat (prayer) is obligatory.

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الْجَمَاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of the congregational Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ فِي جَمَاعَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of the Fajr (early morning) prayer in congregation.

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّهْجِيرِ إِلَى الظُّهْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of offering the Zuhr prayer early

titles.arabic: باب احْتِسَابِ الآثَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Every step towards good deeds is rewarded

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعِشَاءِ فِي الْجَمَاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of the 'Isha' prayer in congregation

titles.arabic: باب اثْنَانِ فَمَا فَوْقَهُمَا جَمَاعَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Two or more than two persons are considered as a group (for the congregational prayers)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ جَلَسَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ يَنْتَظِرُ الصَّلاَةَ، وَفَضْلِ الْمَسَاجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: (The reward of a person) who waits for As-Salat (the prayer) in the mosque and the superiority of mosques

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ غَدَا إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ وَمَنْ رَاحَ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of going to the mosque (every) morning and in the afternoon and evening [for the congregational Salat (prayers)]

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أُقِيمَتِ الصَّلاَةُ فَلاَ صَلاَةَ إِلاَّ الْمَكْتُوبَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: No Salat (prayer) (is to be offered) except the compulsory Salat after the Iqama has been pronounced for that compulsory Salat

titles.arabic: باب حَدِّ الْمَرِيضِ أَنْ يَشْهَدَ الْجَمَاعَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The limit set for a patient to attend the congregational Salat (prayer)?

titles.arabic: باب الرُّخْصَةِ فِي الْمَطَرِ وَالْعِلَّةِ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ فِي رَحْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to pray at one's dwelling during rain or if there is a genuine excuse

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُصَلِّي الإِمَامُ بِمَنْ حَضَرَ وَهَلْ يَخْطُبُ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ فِي الْمَطَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Can the Imam offer the Salat (prayer) with only those who are present (for the prayer)? And can be deliver a Khutba (religious talk) on Friday if it is raining?

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا حَضَرَ الطَّعَامُ وَأُقِيمَتِ الصَّلاَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: (What should one do) if the meal has been served and the Iqama has been pronounced for As-Salat(the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا دُعِيَ الإِمَامُ إِلَى الصَّلاَةِ وَبِيَدِهِ مَا يَأْكُلُ
titles.english: Chapter: When the Imam is called for As-Salat (the prayer) while he has in his hands something to eat.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَانَ فِي حَاجَةِ أَهْلِهِ فَأُقِيمَتِ الصَّلاَةُ فَخَرَجَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody was busy with his domestic work and Iqama was pronounced and then he came out [for offering the Salat (prayer)]

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى بِالنَّاسِ وَهْوَ لاَ يُرِيدُ إِلاَّ أَنْ يُعَلِّمَهُمْ صَلاَةَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَسُنَّتَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering Salat (prayer) in front of the people with the sole intention of teaching them the Salat of the Prophet (pbuh) and his Sunnah (legal ways etc.)

titles.arabic: باب أَهْلُ الْعِلْمِ وَالْفَضْلِ أَحَقُّ بِالإِمَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The religious learned men are entitled to precedence in leading the Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَامَ إِلَى جَنْبِ الإِمَامِ لِعِلَّةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever stood by the side of the Imam because of a genuine cause [in Salat (prayer)]

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ دَخَلَ لِيَؤُمَّ النَّاسَ فَجَاءَ الإِمَامُ الأَوَّلُ فَتَأَخَّرَ الأَوَّلُ أَوْ لَمْ يَتَأَخَّرْ جَازَتْ صَلاَتُهُ‏
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody is leading the Salat (prayer) and (in the meanwhile) the first (usual) Imam comes, the Salat is valid whether the former retreats or does not retreat

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اسْتَوَوْا فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ فَلْيَؤُمَّهُمْ أَكْبَرُهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: If some people are equally proficient in the recitation of the Quran (and religious knowledge), the oldest of them should lead As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا زَارَ الإِمَامُ قَومًا فَأَمَّهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam visited some people and led them in Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِنَّمَا جُعِلَ الإِمَامُ لِيُؤْتَمَّ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Imam is appointed to be followed

titles.arabic: باب مَتَى يَسْجُدُ مَنْ خَلْفَ الإِمَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: When should those who are behind the Imam prostrate?

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ رَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ قَبْلَ الإِمَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of the one who raises his head before the Imam (raises his head)

titles.arabic: باب إِمَامَةِ الْعَبْدِ وَالْمَوْلَى
titles.english: Chapter: A slave or a manumitted slave can lead the Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُتِمَّ الإِمَامُ وَأَتَمَّ مَنْ خَلْفَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam does not offer the Salat (prayer) perfectly and the followers offer it perfectly

titles.arabic: باب إِمَامَةِ الْمَفْتُونِ وَالْمُبْتَدِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering prayers behind a man who is a victim of Al-Fitan (trials and affections) or a heretic.

titles.arabic: باب يَقُومُ عَنْ يَمِينِ الإِمَامِ، بِحِذَائِهِ سَوَاءً إِذَا كَانَا اثْنَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To stand on the right side of the Imam on the same line if only two persons (counting the Imam) are offering Salat (prayer) in congregation

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَامَ الرَّجُلُ عَنْ يَسَارِ الإِمَامِ، فَحَوَّلَهُ الإِمَامُ إِلَى يَمِينِهِ لَمْ تَفْسُدْ صَلاَتُهُمَا
titles.english: Chapter: If a man stood on the left side of the Imam and the Imam drew him to his right side, then the Salat of none of them would be invalid

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يَنْوِ الإِمَامُ أَنْ يَؤُمَّ ثُمَّ جَاءَ قَوْمٌ فَأَمَّهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam has not had the intention of leading the prayer and then some persons join him and he leads them

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا طَوَّلَ الإِمَامُ وَكَانَ لِلرَّجُلِ حَاجَةٌ فَخَرَجَ فَصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam prolongs the Salat (prayer) and somebody has an urgent work or need and so he leaves the congregation and offers Salat alone.

titles.arabic: باب تَخْفِيفِ الإِمَامِ فِي الْقِيَامِ وَإِتْمَامِ الرُّكُوعِ وَالسُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: The shortening of the Qiyam (standing) by the Imam[in Salat (prayer)] but performing the bowings and the prostrations perfectly

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا صَلَّى لِنَفْسِهِ فَلْيُطَوِّلْ مَا شَاءَ
titles.english: Chapter: When offering Salat (prayer) alone, one can prolong the Salat as much as one wishes

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ شَكَا إِمَامَهُ إِذَا طَوَّلَ
titles.english: Chapter: Complaining against one's Imam if he prolongs the prayer.

titles.arabic: باب الإِيجَازِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَإِكْمَالِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The shortening and perfection of the prayer (by the Imam)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَخَفَّ الصَّلاَةَ عِنْدَ بُكَاءِ الصَّبِيِّ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever cuts short As-Salat (the prayer) on hearing the cries of a child.

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا صَلَّى ثُمَّ أَمَّ قَوْمًا
titles.english: Chapter: If one offers Salat (prayer) and the leads the people in Salat.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَسْمَعَ النَّاسَ تَكْبِيرَ الإِمَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: One who repeats the Takbir (Allahu Akbar) of the Imam so that the people may hear it.

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجُلُ يَأْتَمُّ بِالإِمَامِ وَيَأْتَمُّ النَّاسُ بِالْمَأْمُومِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person follows the Imam and the others follow that person (then it is all right)

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَأْخُذُ الإِمَامُ إِذَا شَكَّ بِقَوْلِ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Can the Imam depend on the people's saying if he is in doubt (about a certain matter)?

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَكَى الإِمَامُ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam weeps in As-Salat (the prayers) (will his Salat be valid?)

titles.arabic: باب تَسْوِيَةِ الصُّفُوفِ عِنْدَ الإِقَامَةِ وَبَعْدَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Straightening the rows at the time of Iqama and after it (immediately)

titles.arabic: باب إِقْبَالِ الإِمَامِ عَلَى النَّاسِ عِنْدَ تَسْوِيَةِ الصُّفُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: Facing of the Imam towards his followers while straightening the rows.

titles.arabic: باب الصَّفِّ الأَوَّلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The first row

titles.arabic: باب إِقَامَةِ الصَّفِّ مِنْ تَمَامِ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The straightening of the rows is amongst those obligatory and good things which make your As-Salat (the prayer) a correct and perfect one.

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ لَمْ يُتِمَّ الصُّفُوفَ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of a person who does not complete the rows (who is out of alignment) for the prayer

titles.arabic: باب إِلْزَاقِ الْمَنْكِبِ بِالْمَنْكِبِ وَالْقَدَمِ بِالْقَدَمِ فِي الصَّفِّ
titles.english: Chapter: To stand shoulder to shoulder and foot to foot in a row

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَامَ الرَّجُلُ عَنْ يَسَارِ الإِمَامِ، وَحَوَّلَهُ الإِمَامُ خَلْفَهُ إِلَى يَمِينِهِ، تَمَّتْ صَلاَتُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person stands by the left side of the Imam, and the Imam dress him to the right from behind, the Salat (prayer) is correct.

titles.arabic: باب الْمَرْأَةُ وَحْدَهَا تَكُونُ صَفًّا
titles.english: Chapter: One woman can form a row

titles.arabic: باب مَيْمَنَةِ الْمَسْجِدِ وَالإِمَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The right side of the mosque and the place to the right of the Imam

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا كَانَ بَيْنَ الإِمَامِ وَبَيْنَ الْقَوْمِ حَائِطٌ أَوْ سُتْرَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If there is a wall or a Sutra between the Imam and followers

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The night prayer.

titles.arabic: باب إِيجَابِ التَّكْبِيرِ وَافْتِتَاحِ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The necessity of saying the Takbir, i.e., Allahu Akbar (Allah is the Most Great) and the commencement of As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْيَدَيْنِ فِي التَّكْبِيرَةِ الأُولَى مَعَ الاِفْتِتَاحِ سَوَاءً
titles.english: Chapter: To raise both hands on saying the first Takbir simultaneously with opening the Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْيَدَيْنِ إِذَا كَبَّرَ وَإِذَا رَكَعَ وَإِذَا رَفَعَ
titles.english: Chapter: To raise both hands while saying the Takbir [on opening As-Salat (the prayer)], and while bowing and on raising up the head (after bowing)

titles.arabic: باب إِلَى أَيْنَ يَرْفَعُ يَدَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To what level should one raise one's hand.

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْيَدَيْنِ إِذَا قَامَ مِنَ الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To raise one's hands after finishing the second Rak'a (on standing for the third Rak'a)

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الْيُمْنَى عَلَى الْيُسْرَى
titles.english: Chapter: To place the right hand on the left [in As-Salt (the prayers)]

titles.arabic: باب الْخُشُوعِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Submissiveness in As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ بَعْدَ التَّكْبِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What to say after the Takbir
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْبَصَرِ إِلَى الإِمَامِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To cast a look at the Imam during As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْبَصَرِ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Looking towards the sky during As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الاِلْتِفَاتِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To look hither and thither in As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَلْتَفِتُ لأَمْرٍ يَنْزِلُ بِهِ أَوْ يَرَى شَيْئًا أَوْ بُصَاقًا فِي الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Is it permissible to one to look around in Salat (prayer) if something happens to one? Or can one look at something like expectoration in the directn of the Qiblah?

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الْقِرَاءَةِ لِلإِمَامِ وَالْمَأْمُومِ فِي الصَّلَوَاتِ كُلِّهَا فِي الْحَضَرِ وَالسَّفَرِ وَمَا يُجْهَرُ فِيهَا وَمَا يُخَافَتُ
titles.english: Chapter: Recitation of the Qur'an (Surat Al-Fatiha) is compulsory for the Imam and the followers, at the home and on journey, in all As-Salat (the prayers) whether the recitation is done silently or aloud.

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الظُّهْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The recitation of the Qur'an in a Zuhr prayer

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The recitation of the Qur'an in the 'Asr prayer

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The recitation of the Qur'an in the Magrib prayer

titles.arabic: باب الْجَهْرِ فِي الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite aloud in the Maghrib prayer.

titles.arabic: باب الْجَهْرِ فِي الْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite aloud in the 'Isha' prayer.

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الْعِشَاءِ بِالسَّجْدَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite in the 'Isha prayer, with As-Sajda(prostration)

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Recitation in the 'Isha prayer

titles.arabic: باب يُطَوِّلُ فِي الأُولَيَيْنِ وَيَحْذِفُ فِي الأُخْرَيَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Prolonging the first two Rak'a and shortening the last two

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The recitation of the Qur'an in the Fajr prayer

titles.arabic: باب الْجَهْرِ بِقِرَاءَةِ صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite aloud in the Fajr (early morning) prayer.

titles.arabic: باب الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ السُّورَتَيْنِ فِي الرَّكْعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite two Surah in one Rak'a and to recite the last verses of some Surah, or to elite the Surah in their reverse order, or to recite the beginning of a Surah

titles.arabic: باب يَقْرَأُ فِي الأُخْرَيَيْنِ بِفَاتِحَةِ الْكِتَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite only Surah Al-Fathiha in the last two Rak'a during a four Rak'a Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ خَافَتَ الْقِرَاءَةَ فِي الظُّهْرِ وَالْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite (the Qur'an) quietly in the Zuhr and 'Asr prayers

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَسْمَعَ الإِمَامُ الآيَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: (In a quiet prayer) if the Imam recites a Verse or so audibly

titles.arabic: باب يُطَوِّلُ فِي الرَّكْعَةِ الأُولَى
titles.english: Chapter: To prolong the first Rak'a

titles.arabic: باب جَهْرِ الإِمَامِ بِالتَّأْمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying of Amin aloud by the Imam

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّأْمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of saying Amin

titles.arabic: باب جَهْرِ الْمَأْمُومِ بِالتَّأْمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying of Amin aloud by the followers

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا رَكَعَ دُونَ الصَّفِّ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone bowed behind the rows, [on entering the mosque and before joining the rows of Salat (prayer)]

titles.arabic: باب إِتْمَامِ التَّكْبِيرِ فِي الرُّكُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Itmam At-Takbir (i.e., to end the number of Takbir or to say the Takbir perfectly) on bowing. [See Fath Al-Bari]

titles.arabic: باب إِتْمَامِ التَّكْبِيرِ فِي السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Itmam At-Takbir (i.e., to end the number of Takbir, or to say the Takbir perfectly) on prostrating. [See Fath Al-Bari]

titles.arabic: باب التَّكْبِيرِ إِذَا قَامَ مِنَ السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying the Takbir on raising from the prostration

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الأَكُفِّ عَلَى الرُّكَبِ فِي الرُّكُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: To put the hands (palms) on both knees while bowing.

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُتِمَّ الرُّكُوعَ
titles.english: Chapter: Not performing bowing perfectly

titles.arabic: بَابُ اسْتِوَاءِ الظَّهْرِ فِي الرُّكُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: To keep the back straight in bowing.

titles.arabic: باب حَدِّ إِتْمَامِ الرُّكُوعِ وَالاِعْتِدَالِ فِيهِ وَالاِطْمَأْنِينَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: And what is said regarding the limit of the completion of bowing and of keeping the back straight and the calmness with which it is performed.

titles.arabic: باب أَمْرِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم الَّذِي لاَ يُتِمُّ رُكُوعَهُ بِالإِعَادَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The order of the Prophet (pbuh) to a person who did not perform his bowing perfectly that he should repeat his Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ فِي الرُّكُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation in bowing.

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ الإِمَامُ وَمَنْ خَلْفَهُ إِذَا رَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ مِنَ الرُّكُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: What the Imam and the followers say on raising their heads from bowing.

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا لَكَ الْحَمْدُ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of saying Allahumma Rabbana lakal hand (O Allah, Our Lord!, All the praises and thanks are for You)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب الاِطْمَأْنِينَةِ حِينَ يَرْفَعُ رَأْسَهُ مِنَ الرُّكُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: To stand Straight with calmness on raising the head from bowing

titles.arabic: باب يَهْوِي بِالتَّكْبِيرِ حِينَ يَسْجُدُ
titles.english: Chapter: One should say Takbir while going in prostration.

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of prostrating.

titles.arabic: باب يُبْدِي ضَبْعَيْهِ وَيُجَافِي فِي السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: During the prostrations one should keep one's arms away from one's sides and the abdomen should be kept away from the thighs.

titles.arabic: بَابُ يَسْتَقْبِلُ بِأَطْرَافِ رِجْلَيْهِ الْقِبْلَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: One should keep the toes in the direction of the Qiblah

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُتِمَّ السُّجُودَ
titles.english: Chapter: If one does not perform the prostrations perfectly

titles.arabic: باب السُّجُودِ عَلَى سَبْعَةِ أَعْظُمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To prostrate on seven bones

titles.arabic: باب السُّجُودِ عَلَى الأَنْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To prostrate on the nose

titles.arabic: باب السُّجُودِ عَلَى الأَنْفِ وَالسُّجُودِ عَلَى الطِّينِ
titles.english: Chapter: To prostrate on the nose and in the mud

titles.arabic: باب عَقْدِ الثِّيَابِ وَشَدِّهَا وَمَنْ ضَمَّ إِلَيْهِ ثَوْبَهُ إِذَا خَافَ أَنْ تَنْكَشِفَ عَوْرَتُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To tie the clothes and wrap them properly [in Salat (prayer)]; and whoever gathered his clothes for fear that his private parts may become exposed.

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَكُفُّ شَعَرًا
titles.english: Chapter: One should not tuck put the hair [during Salat (prayers)]

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَكُفُّ ثَوْبَهُ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not tuck up his garment in As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْبِيحِ وَالدُّعَاءِ فِي السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke and glorify Allah in prostration

titles.arabic: باب الْمُكْثِ بَيْنَ السَّجْدَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To sit for a while between the two prostrations

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَفْتَرِشُ ذِرَاعَيْهِ فِي السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not put the forearms on the ground during prostrations

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَوَى قَاعِدًا فِي وِتْرٍ مِنْ صَلاَتِهِ ثُمَّ نَهَضَ
titles.english: Chapter: Sitting Straight in a Witr payer (i.e., an odd Rak'a) and then getting up.

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى الأَرْضِ إِذَا قَامَ مِنَ الرَّكْعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: How to support oneself on the ground while standing after finishing the Rak'a (after the two prostrations)

titles.arabic: باب يُكَبِّرُ وَهْوَ يَنْهَضُ مِنَ السَّجْدَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying Takbir on rising from the two prostrations

titles.arabic: باب سُنَّةِ الْجُلُوسِ فِي التَّشَهُّدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet's Sunna (legal way) for the sitting in the Tashah-hud [in the Salat (prayer)].

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَرَ التَّشَهُّدَ الأَوَّلَ وَاجِبًا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever considered that the first Tashah-hud is not compulsory

titles.arabic: باب التَّشَهُّدِ فِي الأُولَى
titles.english: Chapter: (Saying of the) Tashah-hud in the first sitting.

titles.arabic: باب التَّشَهُّدِ فِي الآخِرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Saying of the) Tashah-hud in the last Rak'a

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ قَبْلَ السَّلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation before the Taslim

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُتَخَيَّرُ مِنَ الدُّعَاءِ بَعْدَ التَّشَهُّدِ وَلَيْسَ بِوَاجِبٍ
titles.english: Chapter: What optional invocation may be selected after the Tashah-hud, and it is not obligatory.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَمْسَحْ جَبْهَتَهُ وَأَنْفَهُ حَتَّى صَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: No cleaning (rubbing) one's forehead and nose till one has completed As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْلِيمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Taslim [turning the face to the right and then to the left and saying "As-Salamu alikum wa rah mat-ullah" at the end of the Salat (prayers)]

titles.arabic: باب يُسَلِّمُ حِينَ يُسَلِّمُ الإِمَامُ
titles.english: Chapter: To finish the Salat (prayer) with Taslim along with the Imam

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَرَ رَدَّ السَّلاَمِ عَلَى الإِمَامِ وَاكْتَفَى بِتَسْلِيمِ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever did not say (a Taslim) in addition to the Taslim of the Imam but thought that Taslim of the Salat (prayer) was sufficient

titles.arabic: باب الذِّكْرِ بَعْدَ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Dhikr (remembering Allah by Glorifying, Praising and Magnifying Him) after As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب يَسْتَقْبِلُ الإِمَامُ النَّاسَ إِذَا سَلَّمَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Imam should face the followers after finishing the prayer with Taslim.

titles.arabic: باب مُكْثِ الإِمَامِ فِي مُصَلاَّهُ بَعْدَ السَّلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The staying of the Imam at his Musalla (praying place) after (finishing the prayer with) Taslim

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى بِالنَّاسِ فَذَكَرَ حَاجَةً فَتَخَطَّاهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever led the people in Salat (prayer) and remembered an rent matter or necessity and had to pass over the people (to carry out that)

titles.arabic: باب الاِنْفِتَالِ وَالاِنْصِرَافِ عَنِ الْيَمِينِ، وَالشِّمَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: To leave or depart from the right and from the left after finishing from the Salat (prayers).

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الثُّومِ النَّىِّ وَالْبَصَلِ وَالْكُرَّاثِ
titles.english: Chapter: What has been said about uncooked garlic, onion and leek.

titles.arabic: باب وُضُوءِ الصِّبْيَانِ, وَمَتَى يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِمُ الْغَسْلُ وَالطُّهُورُ وَحُضُورِهِمِ الْجَمَاعَةَ وَالْعِيدَيْنِ وَالْجَنَائِزَ وَصُفُوفِهِمْ.
titles.english: Chapter: The ablution for boys (youngsters). When they should perform Ghusl (take a bath) and Tuhur (purification). Their attendance at congregational prayers and their rows in the prayers.

titles.arabic: باب خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ إِلَى الْمَسَاجِدِ بِاللَّيْلِ وَالْغَلَسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Going of women to the mosque at night and in darkness

titles.arabic: باب انْتِظَارِ النَّاسِ قِيَامَ الإِمَامِ الْعَالِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The waiting of the people for the religious learned Imam to get up (after the prayer to depart)

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ النِّسَاءِ خَلْفَ الرِّجَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Salat (prayer) of women behind men

titles.arabic: باب سُرْعَةِ انْصِرَافِ النِّسَاءِ مِنَ الصُّبْحِ، وَقِلَّةِ مَقَامِهِنَّ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Returning of the women immediately after the Fajr prayer and their staying in the mosque for a short period only

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِئْذَانِ الْمَرْأَةِ زَوْجَهَا بِالْخُرُوجِ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: A women shall ask her husband's permission (on wishing) to go to the mosque.

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ النِّسَاءِ خَلْفَ الرِّجَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: Women praying behind men

titles.arabic: باب فَرْضِ الْجُمُعَةِ لِقَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {إِذَا نُودِيَ لِلصَّلاَةِ مِنْ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ فَاسْعَوْا إِلَى ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ وَذَرُوا الْبَيْعَ ذَلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ}.
titles.english: Chapter: The prescription of Friday [Salat-ul-Jumu'ah (Jumu'ah prayer)] and Khutba (religious talk) according to the Statement of Allah تعالى: "When the call is proclaimed for the Salat (prayer) of Friday (Jumu'ah prayer) come to the remembrance of Allah [Jumu'ah religious talk (Khutba) and Salat (prayer)] and leave off business (and every other thing)." (V.62:9)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْغُسْلِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ، وَهَلْ عَلَى الصَّبِيِّ شُهُودُ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ أَوْ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of taking a bath on friday

titles.arabic: باب الطِّيبِ لِلْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To perfume before going for the Friday (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of Jumu'ah (prayer and Khutba)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب الدُّهْنِ لِلْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To use (hair) oil for the Friday prayer

titles.arabic: باب يَلْبَسُ أَحْسَنَ مَا يَجِدُ
titles.english: Chapter: To wear the best clothes (for the Jumu'ah prayer)

titles.arabic: باب السِّوَاكِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To clean the teeth with Siwak on Friday

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَسَوَّكَ بِسِوَاكِ غَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever cleans his teeth with Siwak

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقْرَأُ فِي صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What should be recited in the Fajr prayer on Friday

titles.arabic: باب الْجُمُعَةِ فِي الْقُرَى وَالْمُدْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Jumu'ah prayer and Khutba in villages and towns

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ عَلَى مَنْ لَمْ يَشْهَدِ الْجُمُعَةَ غُسْلٌ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ وَالصِّبْيَانِ وَغَيْرِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Is the bath necessary for those who do not present themselves for the Jumu'ah prayer
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب الرُّخْصَةِ إِنْ لَمْ يَحْضُرِ الْجُمُعَةَ فِي الْمَطَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Not to attend the Jumu'ah (prayer) if it is raining.

titles.arabic: بَابُ مِنْ أَيْنَ تُؤْتَى الْجُمُعَةُ، وَعَلَى مَنْ تَجِبُ؟
titles.english: Chapter: For whom is the Jumu'ah (prayer) compulsory?

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتُ الْجُمُعَةِ إِذَا زَالَتِ الشَّمْسُ
titles.english: Chapter: The time for the Jumu'ah (prayer) is due when the sun declines (i.e. just after mid-day)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اشْتَدَّ الْحَرُّ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If it becomes very hot on Fridays

titles.arabic: باب الْمَشْىِ إِلَى الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To go walking unhurriedly

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُفَرَّقُ بَيْنَ اثْنَيْنِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not separate two persons on Fridays

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُقِيمُ الرَّجُلُ أَخَاهُ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ وَيَقْعُدُ فِي مَكَانِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A man should not make his brother get up to sit in his place

titles.arabic: باب الأَذَانِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Adhan on Friday (for the Jumu'ah prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الْمُؤَذِّنِ الْوَاحِدِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: One Mu'adh-dhin on Friday

titles.arabic: باب يُؤَذِّنُ الإِمَامُ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ إِذَا سَمِعَ النِّدَاءَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Imam repeats the wordings of the Adhan when he hears it

titles.arabic: باب الْجُلُوسِ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ عِنْدَ التَّأْذِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: To sit on the pulpit while Adhan is pronounced

titles.arabic: باب التَّأْذِينِ عِنْدَ الْخُطْبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Adhan before delivering the Khutba

titles.arabic: باب الْخُطْبَةِ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: (To deliver) the Khutba on the pulpit

titles.arabic: باب الْخُطْبَةِ قَائِمًا
titles.english: Chapter: To deliver the Khutba while standing

titles.arabic: باب يَسْتَقْبِلُ الإِمَامُ الْقَوْمَ وَاسْتِقْبَالِ النَّاسِ الإِمَامَ إِذَا خَطَبَ
titles.english: Chapter: The facing of the Imam towards the people

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَالَ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ بَعْدَ الثَّنَاءِ أَمَّا بَعْدُ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying "Ammaba'du" in the Khutba

titles.arabic: باب الْقَعْدَةِ بَيْنَ الْخُطْبَتَيْنِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To sit in between the two Khutba

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِمَاعِ إِلَى الْخُطْبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To listen to the Khutba (religious talk) on Friday

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا رَأَى الإِمَامُ رَجُلاً جَاءَ وَهْوَ يَخْطُبُ أَمَرَهُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ رَكْعَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: During the Khutba, two Rak'a Salat before sitting (Tahayyat-ul-Masjid)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ جَاءَ وَالإِمَامُ يَخْطُبُ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ خَفِيفَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: When the Imam is delivering the Khutba, a light two Rak'a Salat (prayer) (Tahayyat-ul Masjid)

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْيَدَيْنِ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To raise hands during the Khutba (religious talk)

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Istisqa' in the Khutba on Friday

titles.arabic: باب الإِنْصَاتِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ وَالإِمَامُ يَخْطُبُ
titles.english: Chapter: One should keep quiet and listen while the Imam is delivering the Khutba

titles.arabic: باب السَّاعَةِ الَّتِي فِي يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: An hour (opportune-lucky time) on Friday

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا نَفَرَ النَّاسُ عَنِ الإِمَامِ فِي صَلاَةِ الْجُمُعَةِ فَصَلاَةُ الإِمَامِ وَمَنْ بَقِيَ جَائِزَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If some people leave while the Imam during the Salat-ul-Jumu'ah

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ بَعْدَ الْجُمُعَةِ وَقَبْلَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Salat before and after the Jumu'ah prayer

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {فَإِذَا قُضِيَتِ الصَّلاَةُ فَانْتَشِرُوا فِي الأَرْضِ وَابْتَغُوا مِنْ فَضْلِ اللَّهِ}
titles.english: Chapter: When the Salat is ended, you may disperse through the land, and seek of the Bounty of Allah

titles.arabic: باب الْقَائِلَةِ بَعْدَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The afternoon nap after the Jumu'ah (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْخَوْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Salat-ul-Khauf

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْخَوْفِ رِجَالاً وَرُكْبَانًا رَاجِلٌ قَائِمٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The Salat-ul-Khauf while standing or riding

titles.arabic: باب يَحْرُسُ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضًا فِي صَلاَةِ الْخَوْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To guard one another during the Salat-ul-Khauf

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عِنْدَ مُنَاهَضَةِ الْحُصُونِ وَلِقَاءِ الْعَدُوِّ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salat at the time of besieging a fort and at the time of meeting the enemy

titles.arabic: بَابُ صَلاَةِ الطَّالِبِ وَالْمَطْلُوبِ رَاكِبًا وَإِيمَاءً
titles.english: Chapter: The chaser and the chased can offer Salat (prayer) while riding , and by signs

titles.arabic: باب التَّبْكِيرِ وَالْغَلَسِ بِالصُّبْحِ وَالصَّلاَةِ عِنْدَ الإِغَارَةِ وَالْحَرْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering As-Salat (the prayers) while attacking the enemy and in battles

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ وَالتَّجَمُّلِ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The two Eid and sprucing oneself up on them

titles.arabic: باب الْحِرَابِ وَالدَّرَقِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: A display of spears and shields on 'Eid Festival day

titles.arabic: باب سُنَّةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ لأَهْلِ الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The legal way of the celebrations on the two 'Eid festivals

titles.arabic: باب الأَكْلِ يَوْمَ الْفِطْرِ قَبْلَ الْخُرُوجِ
titles.english: Chapter: Eating on the day of Fitr before ethe 'Eid-al-Fitr

titles.arabic: باب الأَكْلِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Eating on the day of Nahr (10th of Dhul-Hijjah)

titles.arabic: باب الْخُرُوجِ إِلَى الْمُصَلَّى بِغَيْرِ مِنْبَرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To proceed to a masjid without a pulpit

titles.arabic: باب الْمَشْىِ وَالرُّكُوبِ إِلَى الْعِيدِ بِغَيْرِ أَذَانٍ وَلاَ إِقَامَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Eid prayer before the Khutba and no Adhan or Iqama for it

titles.arabic: باب الْخُطْبَةِ بَعْدَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Khutba after the Eid prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ حَمْلِ السِّلاَحِ فِي الْعِيدِ وَالْحَرَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to carry arms on 'Eid and in the Haram

titles.arabic: باب التَّبْكِيرِ إِلَى الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Eid prayer early

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعَمَلِ فِي أَيَّامِ التَّشْرِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of deeds on the days of Tashriq

titles.arabic: باب التَّكْبِيرِ أَيَّامَ مِنًى وَإِذَا غَدَا إِلَى عَرَفَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: To say Takbir on the days of Mina and while proceeding to Arafat

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ إِلَى الْحَرْبَةِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salat using a small spear as a Sutra

titles.arabic: باب حَمْلِ الْعَنَزَةِ أَوِ الْحَرْبَةِ بَيْنَ يَدَىِ الإِمَامِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To put the 'Anaza (spear-headed stick) or Harba in front of the Imam on Eid day

titles.arabic: باب خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ وَالْحُيَّضِ إِلَى الْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: The coming out of the ladies and menstruating women to the Masjid

titles.arabic: باب خُرُوجِ الصِّبْيَانِ إِلَى الْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: The attendance of boys at Musalla

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِقْبَالِ الإِمَامِ النَّاسَ فِي خُطْبَةِ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Imam faces the people while delivering the Khutna (religious talk) of Eid

titles.arabic: باب الْعَلَمِ الَّذِي بِالْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: The mark of the Musall

titles.arabic: باب مَوْعِظَةِ الإِمَامِ النِّسَاءَ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The preaching to the woman by the Imam on Eid day

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا جِلْبَابٌ فِي الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a women has no veil to use for Eid

titles.arabic: باب اعْتِزَالِ الْحُيَّضِ الْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: Menstruating women should keep away from the Mussalla

titles.arabic: باب النَّحْرِ وَالذَّبْحِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ بِالْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: An-Nahr and Adh-Dhabh at the Masjid on the day of Nahr

titles.arabic: باب كَلاَمِ الإِمَامِ وَالنَّاسِ فِي خُطْبَةِ الْعِيدِ، وَإِذَا سُئِلَ الإِمَامُ عَنْ شَيْءٍ وَهْوَ يَخْطُبُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam is asked about something while he is delivering the Khutba

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ خَالَفَ الطَّرِيقَ إِذَا رَجَعَ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever returned (after offering the Eid prayer) on the day of Eid through a way different from that by which he went

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا فَاتَهُ الْعِيدُ يُصَلِّي رَكْعَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever missed the Eid prayer should offer two Rak'a prayer

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ قَبْلَ الْعِيدِ وَبَعْدَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Salat before or after the Eid prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding the Witr prayer

titles.arabic: باب سَاعَاتِ الْوِتْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The timing of the Salat-ul-Witr (Witr prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِيقَاظِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَهْلَهُ بِالْوِتْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (pbuh) used to wake his family up for the Witr prayer

titles.arabic: باب لِيَجْعَلْ آخِرَ صَلاَتِهِ وِتْرًا
titles.english: Chapter: Witr as the last Salat (at night)

titles.arabic: باب الْوِتْرِ عَلَى الدَّابَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Witr Salat while riding on an animal

titles.arabic: باب الْوِتْرِ فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering prayers of Witr while on a journey

titles.arabic: باب الْقُنُوتِ قَبْلَ الرُّكُوعِ وَبَعْدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite Qunut before and after bowing

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ وَخُرُوجِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Going out of the Prophet (pbuh) to offer Istisqa' prayer

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ اجْعَلْهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سِنِينَ كَسِنِي يُوسُفَ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation of the Prophet (pbuh)

titles.arabic: باب سُؤَالِ النَّاسِ الإِمَامَ الاِسْتِسْقَاءَ إِذَا قَحَطُوا
titles.english: Chapter: Request of the people to the Imam to offer the Istisqa' prayer

titles.arabic: باب تَحْوِيلِ الرِّدَاءِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Turning cloak inside out while offering the Istisqa' prayer

titles.arabic: بَابُ انْتِقَامِ الرَّبِّ جَلَّ وَعَزَّ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ بِالْقَحْطِ إِذَا انْتُهِكَ مَحَارِمُ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The taking of revenge by Allah over His creatures by drought

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْجَامِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Istisqa' in the main mosque (of the town)

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ فِي خُطْبَةِ الْجُمُعَةِ غَيْرَ مُسْتَقْبِلِ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah for rain in the Khutba of Friday facing a direction other than the Qiblah

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Istisqa' (to invoke Allah for the rain) on the pulpit

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اكْتَفَى بِصَلاَةِ الْجُمُعَةِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever To invoke Allah for rain in the Jumu'ah prayer

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا تَقَطَّعَتِ السُّبُلُ مِنْ كَثْرَةِ الْمَطَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation (for stoppage of rain)

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا قِيلَ إِنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَمْ يُحَوِّلْ رِدَاءَهُ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The saying that "The Prophet (pbuh) did not turn his cloak inside out during the invocation for rain on Friday."

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اسْتَشْفَعُوا إِلَى الإِمَامِ لِيَسْتَسْقِيَ لَهُمْ لَمْ يَرُدُّهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: If the people request the Imam to invoke Allah for rain, the Imam should not refuse

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اسْتَشْفَعَ الْمُشْرِكُونَ بِالْمُسْلِمِينَ عِنْدَ الْقَحْطِ
titles.english: Chapter: If Al-Mushrikun intercede the Muslim to invoke Allah for rain during drought

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا كَثُرَ الْمَطَرُ حَوَالَيْنَا وَلاَ عَلَيْنَا
titles.english: Chapter: To say, "Around us and not on us." when it rains excessively

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ قَائِمًا
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah for rain while standing

titles.arabic: باب الْجَهْرِ بِالْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite aloud while offering the prayer of Istisqa'

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ حَوَّلَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ظَهْرَهُ إِلَى النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: How the Prophet (pbuh) turned his back towards the people [while offering the Salat (prayer) for rain]

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Istisqa' prayer consists of two Rak'a

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ فِي الْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Istisqa' prayer at the Musalla

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِقْبَالِ الْقِبْلَةِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Facing the Qiblah while offering the Istisqa' prayer

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ النَّاسِ أَيْدِيَهُمْ مَعَ الإِمَامِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: While offering the Istisqa' prayer, people should raise hands along with the Imam

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الإِمَامِ يَدَهُ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The raising of both hands by the Imam during Istisqa' while invoking Allah for rain

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ إِذَا أَمْطَرَتْ
titles.english: Chapter: What should be said (or what to say) if it rains

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَمَطَّرَ فِي الْمَطَرِ حَتَّى يَتَحَادَرَ عَلَى لِحْيَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: One who stood in the rain till the water started trickling down his beard

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا هَبَّتِ الرِّيحُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the wind blows (what should one do or say?)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ نُصِرْتُ بِالصَّبَا ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: "I was granted victory with As-Saba"

titles.arabic: باب مَا قِيلَ فِي الزَّلاَزِلِ وَالآيَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Earthquakes and (other) signs (of the Day of Judgement)

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: "And instead for the provision He gives you, you deny"

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَدْرِي مَتَى يَجِيءُ الْمَطَرُ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Except Allah nobody nobody knows when it will rain

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي كُسُوفِ الشَّمْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salat (the prayer) during a solar eclipse

titles.arabic: باب الصَّدَقَةِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To give Sadaqa during the eclipse

titles.arabic: باب النِّدَاءِ بِالصَّلاَةُ جَامِعَةٌ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: Making a loud announcement of As-Salat (the prayer) in congregation for eclipse

titles.arabic: باب خُطْبَةِ الإِمَامِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: A Khutba (delivered) by the Imam on the eclipse

titles.arabic: بَابُ هَلْ يَقُولُ كَسَفَتِ الشَّمْسُ أَوْ خَسَفَتْ؟
titles.english: Chapter: Should one say: The sun Kasafat or Khasafat?

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏: «يُخَوِّفُ اللَّهُ عِبَادَهُ بِالْكُسُوفِ»
titles.english: Chapter: "Allah frightens His slaves with Kusuf (eclipse)

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from the torment in the grave during eclipse

titles.arabic: باب طُولِ السُّجُودِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To prolong the prostrations in the eclipse Salat

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْكُسُوفِ جَمَاعَةً
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Eclipse Salat (prayer) in congregation

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ النِّسَاءِ مَعَ الرِّجَالِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering of Eclipse prayer by women along with men

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَحَبَّ الْعَتَاقَةَ فِي كُسُوفِ الشَّمْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Manumision (of slaves) during the solar eclipse

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْكُسُوفِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the eclipse prayer in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَنْكَسِفُ الشَّمْسُ لِمَوْتِ أَحَدٍ وَلاَ لِحَيَاتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The solar eclipse does not occur because of someone's death or life

titles.arabic: باب الذِّكْرِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To remember Allah during the eclipse

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ فِي الْخُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation during the eclipse

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الإِمَامِ فِي خُطْبَةِ الْكُسُوفِ أَمَّا بَعْدُ
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of Amma ba'du during the Khutba of the eclipse

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي كُسُوفِ الْقَمَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prayer f the lunar eclipse

titles.arabic: باب الرَّكْعَةُ الأُولَى فِي الْكُسُوفِ أَطْوَلُ
titles.english: Chapter: The first Rak'a of the eclipse prayer is longer

titles.arabic: باب الْجَهْرِ بِالْقِرَاءَةِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite aloud in the eclipse Salat

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي سُجُودِ الْقُرْآنِ وَسُنَّتِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Prostrations during the recitation of the Qur'an

titles.arabic: باب سَجْدَةِ تَنْزِيلُ السَّجْدَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: To prostrate during the recitation of Salat Tanzil - As-Sajda (No. 32)

titles.arabic: بَابُ سَجْدَةِ {ص}
titles.english: Chapter: To prostrate while reciting Surat Sad (No. 38)

titles.arabic: باب سَجْدَةِ النَّجْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The prostration in An-Najm (No. 53)

titles.arabic: باب سُجُودِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ مَعَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ. وَالْمُشْرِكُ نَجَسٌ لَيْسَ لَهُ وُضُوءٌ.
titles.english: Chapter: The prostrattion of Muslims along with Al-Mushrikun; and a Mushrik is Najasun (impure) and does not perform ablution;

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَرَأَ السَّجْدَةَ وَلَمْ يَسْجُدْ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever recited the verses of prostration and did not prostrate

titles.arabic: باب سَجْدَةِ ‏ {‏إِذَا السَّمَاءُ انْشَقَّتْ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Prostration while reciting Idhat-Sama'un-Shaqqat

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ سَجَدَ لِسُجُودِ الْقَارِئِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever prostrated with the prostration of the reciter

titles.arabic: باب ازْدِحَامِ النَّاسِ إِذَا قَرَأَ الإِمَامُ السَّجْدَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The overcrowding of the people when the Imam recites As-Sajda

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَأَى أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ لَمْ يُوجِبِ السُّجُودَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever thinks that Allah has not made prostration of recitation compulsory

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَرَأَ السَّجْدَةَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ فَسَجَدَ بِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever recited the Verse of Sajda during the Salat (prayer) and prostrated

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ مَوْضِعًا لِلسُّجُودِ مِنَ الزِّحَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever does not find a place for prostration (with the Imam) because of overcrowding

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّقْصِيرِ وَكَمْ يُقِيمُ حَتَّى يَقْصُرَ
titles.english: Chapter: For what period of stay one should offer shortened prayers

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ بِمِنًى
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salat (the prayers) at Mina (during Hajj)

titles.arabic: باب كَمْ أَقَامَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي حَجَّتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: How long did the Prophet (pbup) stay during the Hajj?

titles.arabic: باب فِي كَمْ يَقْصُرُ الصَّلاَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The length of the journey that makes it permissible to offer a shortened prayer?

titles.arabic: باب يَقْصُرُ إِذَا خَرَجَ مِنْ مَوْضِعِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: When a traveller leaves his original place, he can shorten his Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب يُصَلِّي الْمَغْرِبَ ثَلاَثًا فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Three Rak'a of Maghrib prayer during the journey

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ التَّطَوُّعِ عَلَى الدَّوَابِّ وَحَيْثُمَا تَوَجَّهَتْ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Nawafil on the back of animals

titles.arabic: باب الإِيمَاءِ عَلَى الدَّابَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Salat by signs (while riding) on an animal

titles.arabic: باب يَنْزِلُ لِلْمَكْتُوبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To get down to offer compulsory Salat

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ التَّطَوُّعِ عَلَى الْحِمَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Nawafil while riding a donkey

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَتَطَوَّعْ فِي السَّفَرِ دُبُرَ الصَّلاَةِ وَقَبْلَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever did not offer the Nawafil before and after the (compulsory) Salat during a journey

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَطَوَّعَ فِي السَّفَرِ فِي غَيْرِ دُبُرِ الصَّلَوَاتِ وَقَبْلَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever offered Nawafil not after the compulsory Salat but before it

titles.arabic: باب الْجَمْعِ فِي السَّفَرِ بَيْنَ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Maghrib and "Isha" prayers together on a journey

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُؤَذِّنُ أَوْ يُقِيمُ إِذَا جَمَعَ بَيْنَ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Should the Adhan and Iqama be pronounced when the Maghrib and Isha prayers are offered together

titles.arabic: باب يُؤَخِّرُ الظُّهْرَ إِلَى الْعَصْرِ إِذَا ارْتَحَلَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَزِيغَ الشَّمْسُ
titles.english: Chapter: To delay the Salat-uz-Zuhr till the Asr prayers

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا ارْتَحَلَ بَعْدَ مَا زَاغَتِ الشَّمْسُ صَلَّى الظُّهْرَ ثُمَّ رَكِبَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whenever a person travels after midday, he should offer the Zuhr prayers and the ride for the journey

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْقَاعِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Salat (prayers) while sitting

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْقَاعِدِ بِالإِيمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Salat (prayers) by signs while sitting

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُطِقْ قَاعِدًا صَلَّى عَلَى جَنْبٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever cannot offer Salat while sitting, can offer Salat while lying on his side

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا صَلَّى قَاعِدًا ثُمَّ صَحَّ أَوْ وَجَدَ خِفَّةً تَمَّمَ مَا بَقِيَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever starts his Salat sitting (because of ailment) and then during the Salat (prayer) feels better, can finish the rest while standing

titles.arabic: باب التَّهَجُّدِ بِاللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Tahajjud Prayer at night

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of Tahajjud prayer

titles.arabic: باب طُولِ السُّجُودِ فِي قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To perform a long prostration in the Tahajjud

titles.arabic: باب تَرْكِ الْقِيَامِ لِلْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: Leaving the night prayer by a patient

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيضِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَلَى صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّوَافِلِ مِنْ غَيْرِ إِيجَابٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet's (pbuh) exhorting to Tahajjud and Nawafil without making them compulsory

titles.arabic: باب قِيَامِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم حَتَّى تَرِمَ قَدَمَاهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Standing of the Prophet (pbuh) at night

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَامَ عِنْدَ السَّحَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sleeping in the last hours of the night

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَسَحَّرَ فَلَمْ يَنَمْ حَتَّى صَلَّى الصُّبْحَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever took the Suhur and did not sleep before offering Fajr prayers

titles.arabic: باب طُولِ الْقِيَامِ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To prolong the standing posture in the Tahajjud

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ كَانَ صَلاَةُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَكَمْ كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يُصَلِّي مِنَ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: How was the Salat of the Prophet (pbuh) and how many Rak'a he used to offer at night?

titles.arabic: باب قِيَامِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِاللَّيْلِ وَنَوْمِهِ وَمَا نُسِخَ مِنْ قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The waking up of the Prophet ﷺ from his sleep for the night prayer and what (how much) was cancelled from the night prayer

titles.arabic: باب عَقْدِ الشَّيْطَانِ عَلَى قَافِيَةِ الرَّأْسِ إِذَا لَمْ يُصَلِّ بِاللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Satan'a tying of knots at the back of the head if one does not offer the ight prayer

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا نَامَ وَلَمْ يُصَلِّ بَالَ الشَّيْطَانُ فِي أُذُنِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If one sleeps and does not offer the night prayer

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ وَالصَّلاَةِ مِنْ آخِرِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Offering Salat (prayer) and invoking Allah in the last hours of the night

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَامَ أَوَّلَ اللَّيْلِ وَأَحْيَا آخِرَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Sleeping in the first part of the night and getting up in its last part

titles.arabic: باب قِيَامِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِاللَّيْلِ فِي رَمَضَانَ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Salat (prayer) of the Prophet (pbuh) at night in Ramadan and (in) other months

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الطُّهُورِ بِاللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ وَفَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ بَعْدَ الْوُضُوءِ بِاللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Superiority of remaining with ablution during the day and night

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ التَّشْدِيدِ فِي الْعِبَادَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to exaggerate in matters of worship

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ تَرْكِ قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ لِمَنْ كَانَ يَقُومُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked for a person to leave the night Salat

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ تَعَارَّ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of one who wakes up at night and offers the Salat with a loud voice

titles.arabic: باب الْمُدَاوَمَةِ عَلَى رَكْعَتَىِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Regularity of two Rak'a (Sunna) of the Fajr

titles.arabic: باب الضِّجْعَةِ عَلَى الشِّقِّ الأَيْمَنِ بَعْدَ رَكْعَتَىِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To lie down on the right side after offering two Rak'a (Sunna) of the Fajr prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَحَدَّثَ بَعْدَ الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ وَلَمْ يَضْطَجِعْ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever talks after offering two Rak'a (Sunna) (of the Fajr prayer)

titles.arabic: بَابُ الْحَدِيثِ بَعْدَ رَكْعَتَيِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about the Nawafil being offered as two Rak'a followed by two and so on

titles.arabic: بَابُ تَعَاهُدِ رَكْعَتَيِ الْفَجْرِ وَمَنْ سَمَّاهُمَا تَطَوُّعًا
titles.english: Chapter: To talk after offering two Rak'a (Sunna of the Fajr prayer)

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا يُقْرَأُ فِي رَكْعَتَيِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer two Rak'at before the Fajr prayer

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّطَوُّعِ مَثْنَى مَثْنَى
titles.english: Chapter: What is recited in the two Rak'a (Sunna) of the Fajr

titles.arabic: باب التَّطَوُّعِ بَعْدَ الْمَكْتُوبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Nawafil after the compulsory (congregational) Salat (prayers)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَتَطَوَّعْ بَعْدَ الْمَكْتُوبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever did not offer the Salat after the compulsory (congregational) Salat (prayers

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الضُّحَى فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Salat-ud-Duha in journey

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يُصَلِّ الضُّحَى وَرَآهُ وَاسِعًا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever did not offer the Duha prayer and thought it permissible (to offer it)

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الضُّحَى فِي الْحَضَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Salat-ud-Duha when not traveling

titles.arabic: باب الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ قَبْلَ الظُّهْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer two Rak'a before the Zuhr prayer

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ قَبْلَ الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The (optional) salat before the Maghrib prayers

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ النَّوَافِلِ جَمَاعَةً
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Nawafil in congregation

titles.arabic: باب التَّطَوُّعِ فِي الْبَيْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the Nawafil prayers at home

titles.arabic: بَابُ الإِيمَانِ وَقَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «بُنِيَ الإِسْلاَمُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ»
titles.english: Chapter: The statement of the Prophet (saws) "Islam is based on five principles"

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاؤُكُمْ إِيمَانُكُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Your invocation means your faith

titles.arabic: باب أُمُورِ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said) regarding the deeds of faith

titles.arabic: باب الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A Muslim is the one who avoids harming Muslims with his tongue and hands

titles.arabic: باب أَىُّ الإِسْلاَمِ أَفْضَلُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whose Islam is the best (Who is the best Muslim)?

titles.arabic: باب إِطْعَامُ الطَّعَامِ مِنَ الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To feed (others) is a part of Islam

titles.arabic: باب مِنَ الإِيمَانِ أَنْ يُحِبَّ لأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To like for one's (Muslim's) brother what one likes for himself is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب حُبُّ الرَّسُولِ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To love the Messenger (Muhammad saws) is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب حَلاَوَةِ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sweetness (delight) of faith

titles.arabic: باب عَلاَمَةُ الإِيمَانِ حُبُّ الأَنْصَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: To love the Ansar is a sign of faith

titles.arabic: باب مِنَ الدِّينِ الْفِرَارُ مِنَ الْفِتَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To flee (run away) from Al-Fitn (afflictions and trials), is a part of religion

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏«أَنَا أَعْلَمُكُمْ بِاللَّهِ»
titles.english: Chapter: The statement of the Prophet (saws): "I know Allah Ta'ala better, than all of you do."

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَرِهَ أَنْ يَعُودَ فِي الْكُفْرِ كَمَا يَكْرَهُ أَنْ يُلْقَى فِي النَّارِ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever hates to revert to Kufr (atheism of disbelief) as he hates to be thrown in fire, is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب تَفَاضُلِ أَهْلِ الإِيمَانِ فِي الأَعْمَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: The grades in superiority of the believers will be according to their good deeds

titles.arabic: باب الْحَيَاءُ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Haya (self-respect, modesty bashfulness, honour etc.) is a part of faith

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {فَإِنْ تَابُوا وَأَقَامُوا الصَّلاَةَ وَآتَوُا الزَّكَاةَ فَخَلُّوا سَبِيلَهُمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: (The Statement of Allah Jalla Jalalahu) "But if they repent [by rejecting Shirk (polytheism) and accept Islamic Monotheism] and perform As-Salat (Iqamat-as-Salat) and give Zakat then leave their way free."

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَالَ إِنَّ الإِيمَانَ هُوَ الْعَمَلُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever says that faith is action (good deeds)

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنِ الإِسْلاَمُ عَلَى الْحَقِيقَةِ وَكَانَ عَلَى الاِسْتِسْلاَمِ أَوِ الْخَوْفِ مِنَ الْقَتْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: If one does not embrace Islam truly but does so by compulsion or for fear of being killed (then that man is not a believer)

titles.arabic: باب إِفْشَاءُ السَّلاَمِ مِنَ الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To greet is a part of Islam

titles.arabic: باب كُفْرَانِ الْعَشِيرِ وَكُفْرٍ دُونَ كُفْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To be ungrateful to one's husband. And disbelief is of (different grades) lesser (or greater) degrees.

titles.arabic: باب الْمَعَاصِي مِنْ أَمْرِ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sins are from ignorance and a sinner is not a disbeliever unless he worships others along with Allah 'Azza wa Jall

titles.arabic: باب ظُلْمٌ دُونَ ظُلْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Dhulm (wrong) of one kind can be greater or lesser than that of another

titles.arabic: باب عَلاَمَةِ الْمُنَافِقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The signs of a hypocrite

titles.arabic: باب قِيَامُ لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To establish the (Nawafil - voluntary) prayers on the night of Qadr is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب الْجِهَادُ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Jihad (fighting in Allah's Cause) is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب تَطَوُّعُ قِيَامِ رَمَضَانَ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is a part of faith to establish the (Nawafil — voluntary) prayers during the nights of Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمُ رَمَضَانَ احْتِسَابًا مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To observe fasting (according to Islamic teachings)] during the month of Ramadan (sincerely and faithfully) hoping for Allah's Reward only, is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب الدِّينُ يُسْرٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Religion is very easy

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةُ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: The (offering of) Salat (prayers) is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب حُسْنِ إِسْلاَمِ الْمَرْءِ
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said regarding the superiority of) a person who embraces Islam sincerely.

titles.arabic: باب أَحَبُّ الدِّينِ إِلَى اللَّهِ أَدْوَمُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Ad-Din (good, righteous deed - act of worship) loved most by Allah Jalla Jalalahu is that which is done regularly. (And in fact the best religion with Allah is Islam)

titles.arabic: باب زِيَادَةِ الإِيمَانِ وَنُقْصَانِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Faith increases and decreases

titles.arabic: باب الزَّكَاةُ مِنَ الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To pay Zakat is a part of Islam

titles.arabic: باب اتِّبَاعُ الْجَنَائِزِ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To accompany the funeral processions (up to the place of burial) is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب خَوْفِ الْمُؤْمِنِ مِنْ أَنْ يَحْبَطَ عَمَلُهُ وَهُوَ لاَ يَشْعُرُ
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said regarding) the fear of a believer that his good deeds may be annulled (lost) without his knowledge

titles.arabic: بَابُ سُؤَالِ جِبْرِيلَ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَنِ الإِيمَانِ وَالإِسْلاَمِ وَالإِحْسَانِ وَعِلْمِ السَّاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The asking of (angel) Jibrll (Gabriel) from the Prophet (saws) about Iman, Islam, Ihsan and the knowledge of the Hour (Doomsday)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنِ اسْتَبْرَأَ لِدِينِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of that person who leaves all doubtful (unclear) things for the sake of his religion

titles.arabic: باب أَدَاءُ الْخُمُسِ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To pay Al-Khumus (one-fifth of the war booty to be given in Allah's Cause) is a part of faith

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ أَنَّ الأَعْمَالَ بِالنِّيَّةِ وَالْحِسْبَةِ وَلِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding the statement: "The reward of deeds depends upon the intention and hoping to get rewards from Allah."

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الدِّينُ النَّصِيحَةُ لِلَّهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلأَئِمَّةِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَعَامَّتِهِمْ»
titles.english: Chapter: The statement of the Prophet (saws): Religion is An-Nasihah (to be sincere and true) to Allah, to His Messenger (Muhammad (saws)), to the Muslim rulers, and to all the Muslims

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ مَكَّةَ وَالْمَدِينَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of offering As-Salat in the Mosque of Makkah and Al-Madina

titles.arabic: باب مَسْجِدِ قُبَاءٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Masjid Quba (the Mosque of Quba)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَتَى مَسْجِدَ قُبَاءٍ كُلَّ سَبْتٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever visited the mosque of Quba every Saturday

titles.arabic: باب إِتْيَانِ مَسْجِدِ قُبَاءٍ مَاشِيًا وَرَاكِبًا
titles.english: Chapter: To go to the Mosque of Quba

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَا بَيْنَ الْقَبْرِ وَالْمِنْبَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of the place between the pulpit and the grave (of the Prophet (pbuh))

titles.arabic: باب مَسْجِدِ بَيْتِ الْمَقْدِسِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Mosque of Bait-ul-Maqdis (Jerusalem)

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِعَانَةِ الْيَدِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ إِذَا كَانَ مِنْ أَمْرِ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To take the help of the hands while offering Salat

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى عَنْهُ مِنَ الْكَلاَمِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What speech is prohibited during As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ التَّسْبِيحِ وَالْحَمْدِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ لِلرِّجَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of Subhan Allah and Al-handulillah during As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ سَمَّى قَوْمًا أَوْ سَلَّمَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى غَيْرِهِ مُوَاجَهَةً وَهُوَ لاَ يَعْلَمُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever named some people or greeted somebody during As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب التَّصْفِيقُ لِلنِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Clapping [during the Salat] is permissible only for the women

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَجَعَ الْقَهْقَرَى فِي صَلاَتِهِ، أَوْ تَقَدَّمَ بِأَمْرٍ يَنْزِلُ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever came back or went forward during the Salat (prayer) because of some urgent need

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا دَعَتِ الأُمُّ وَلَدَهَا فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a mother calls her son while he is offering As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب مَسْحِ الْحَصَى فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The levelling of small stones during As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب بَسْطِ الثَّوْبِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ لِلسُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Spreading the clothes over the site of prostration

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What kind of actions are permissible during As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا انْفَلَتَتِ الدَّابَّةُ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If an animal runs away while one is in Salat

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الْبُصَاقِ وَالنَّفْخِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Blowing and splitting while in As-Salat (the Prayer)

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ صَفَّقَ جَاهِلاً مِنَ الرِّجَالِ فِي صَلاَتِهِ لَمْ تَفْسُدْ صَلاَتُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If a man claps during the Salat because of ignorance, his Salat will not be invalid

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قِيلَ لِلْمُصَلِّي تَقَدَّمْ أَوِ انْتَظِرْ فَانْتَظَرَ فَلاَ بَأْسَ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person in Salat is asked to step forward, or to wait, there will be no harm therein

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَرُدُّ السَّلاَمَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not return greetings during the Salat

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الأَيْدِي فِي الصَّلاَةِ لأَمْرٍ يَنْزِلُ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To raise the hands in Salat because of necessity

titles.arabic: باب الْخَصْرِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Keeping the hands on the hips during As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب تَفَكُّرِ الرَّجُلِ الشَّىْءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Thinking of something during As-Salat (the prayer)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي السَّهْوِ إِذَا قَامَ مِنْ رَكْعَتَىِ الْفَرِيضَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding the Sahw: If someone gets up (for the third rak'a without sitting) after the second rak'a of a compulsory salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا صَلَّى خَمْسًا
titles.english: Chapter: If one offers five Rak'a (instead of four)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا سَلَّمَ فِي رَكْعَتَيْنِ أَوْ ثَلاَثٍ فَسَجَدَ سَجْدَتَيْنِ مِثْلَ سُجُودِ الصَّلاَةِ أَوْ أَطْوَلَ
titles.english: Chapter: If one finishes his Salat wit Taslim after offering two or three Rak'a (by mistake)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَتَشَهَّدْ فِي سَجْدَتَىِ السَّهْوِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever did not recite Tashah-dud (At-Tahiyyat) after the two prostrations of Sahw

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ يُكَبِّرُ فِي سَجْدَتَىِ السَّهْوِ
titles.english: Chapter: To say Takbir in the prostrations of Sahw

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يَدْرِ كَمْ صَلَّى ثَلاَثًا أَوْ أَرْبَعًا سَجَدَ سَجْدَتَيْنِ وَهْوَ جَالِسٌ
titles.english: Chapter: When a person forgets whether he has offered three or four Rak'a

titles.arabic: باب السَّهْوِ فِي الْفَرْضِ وَالتَّطَوُّعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sahw in compulsory Salat and Nawafil

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا كُلِّمَ وَهُوَ يُصَلِّي فَأَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ وَاسْتَمَعَ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person speaks to a person offering Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الإِشَارَةِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Beckoning during the Salat [by a person in Salat]

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْجَنَائِزِ وَمَنْ كَانَ آخِرُ كَلاَمِهِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about funerals, and those whose last words were: La ilãha ilallãh (none has the right to be worshipped but Allah)

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْرِ بِاتِّبَاعِ الْجَنَائِزِ
titles.english: Chapter: The order of following the funeral procession

titles.arabic: باب الدُّخُولِ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ إِذَا أُدْرِجَ فِي كَفَنِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Visiting the deceased person after he has been put in his shroud

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجُلِ يَنْعَى إِلَى أَهْلِ الْمَيِّتِ بِنَفْسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A man who informs the relatives of the deceased person (of his death) by himself

titles.arabic: باب الإِذْنِ بِالْجَنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Conveying the news of funeral (procession)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ مَاتَ لَهُ وَلَدٌ فَاحْتَسَبَ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of the person whose child dies

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ لِلْمَرْأَةِ عِنْدَ الْقَبْرِ اصْبِرِي
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of a man to a woman at the grave, "Be patient"

titles.arabic: باب غُسْلِ الْمَيِّتِ وَوُضُوئِهِ بِالْمَاءِ وَالسِّدْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The bath of a dead (Muslim) and his ablution with water and Sidr (lote-tree leaves)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ يُغْسَلَ وِتْرًا
titles.english: Chapter: It is desirable to wash (the dead body) for an odd number of times

titles.arabic: باب يُبْدَأُ بِمَيَامِنِ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: To start from the right side while giving a bath to a dead body

titles.arabic: باب مَوَاضِعِ الْوُضُوءِ مِنَ الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: (To start with) the parts of the dead body which are washed in ablution

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ تُكَفَّنُ الْمَرْأَةُ فِي إِزَارِ الرَّجُلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Can a woman be shrouded in the waist-sheet of a man?

titles.arabic: باب يَجْعَلُ الْكَافُورَ فِي آخِرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To sprinkle camphor on the dead body

titles.arabic: باب نَقْضِ شَعَرِ الْمَرْأَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To undo the hair of a (dead) female

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ الإِشْعَارُ لِلْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: How to shroud a dead body

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُجْعَلُ شَعَرُ الْمَرْأَةِ ثَلاَثَةَ قُرُونٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To entwine the head-hair of a (dead) woman in three braids

titles.arabic: باب يُلْقَى شَعَرُ الْمَرْأَةِ خَلْفَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: To make the hair of a (dead) woman fall at her back

titles.arabic: باب الثِّيَابِ الْبِيضِ لِلْكَفَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: White cloth for the shroud

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفَنِ فِي ثَوْبَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Shrouding in two pieces of cloth

titles.arabic: باب الْحَنُوطِ لِلْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The perfuming of a dead body with Hanut

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يُكَفَّنُ الْمُحْرِمُ
titles.english: Chapter: How to shroud a Muhrim

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفَنِ فِي الْقَمِيصِ الَّذِي يُكَفُّ أَوْ لاَ يُكَفُّ ، وَمَنْ كُفِّنَ بِغَيْرِ قَمِيصٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To shroud one in a shirt, stitched or unstitched

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفَنِ بِغَيْرِ قَمِيصٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To shroud (a dead) body without using a shirt

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفَنِ وَلاَ عِمَامَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Using no turban in shrouding

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفَنِ مِنْ جَمِيعِ الْمَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: To shroud one with all of one's property

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُوجَدْ إِلاَّ ثَوْبٌ وَاحِدٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If there is nothing except one piece of cloth (for shrouding)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يَجِدْ كَفَنًا إِلاَّ مَا يُوَارِي رَأْسَهُ أَوْ قَدَمَيْهِ غَطَّى رَأْسَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If sufficient cloth for the shroud is not available

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَعَدَّ الْكَفَنَ فِي زَمَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَلَمْ يُنْكَرْ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: (if) somebody prepared his shroud (before his death)

titles.arabic: باب اتِّبَاعِ النِّسَاءِ الْجَنَائِزَ
titles.english: Chapter: (Is it permissible for) woman to accompany the funeral procession

titles.arabic: باب إِحْدَادِ الْمَرْأَةِ عَلَى غَيْرِ زَوْجِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The mooring of a woman for a dead person other than her husband

titles.arabic: باب زِيَارَةِ الْقُبُورِ
titles.english: Chapter: Visiting the graves

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «يُعَذَّبُ الْمَيِّتُ بِبَعْضِ بُكَاءِ أَهْلِهِ عَلَيْهِ» إِذَا كَانَ النَّوْحُ مِنْ سُنَّتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The statement of the Prophet ﷺ : "The deceased is punished because of the weeping (with wailing) of some of his relatives, if wailing was the custom of that dead person."

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ النِّيَاحَةِ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: What (sort of) wailing over a deceased is disliked

titles.arabic: باب لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ شَقَّ الْجُيُوبَ
titles.english: Chapter: He who tears off his clothes (when afflicted with a calamity) is not from us

titles.arabic: باب رِثَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم سَعْدَ ابْنَ خَوْلَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The sorrow of the Prophet (pbuh) for Sa'ad bin Khaula

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى مِنَ الْحَلْقِ عِنْدَ الْمُصِيبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Shaving the head on a calamity is forbidden

titles.arabic: باب لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ ضَرَبَ الْخُدُودَ
titles.english: Chapter: He who slaps his cheeks is not from us

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى مِنَ الْوَيْلِ وَدَعْوَى الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ عِنْدَ الْمُصِيبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibition of wailing and following the traditions of the Days of Ignorance when afflicted with a calamity

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ جَلَسَ عِنْدَ الْمُصِيبَةِ يُعْرَفُ فِيهِ الْحُزْنُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever sat down and looked sad when afflicted with a calamity

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يُظْهِرْ حُزْنَهُ عِنْدَ الْمُصِيبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever shows no signs of grief and sorrow on the falling of a calamity

titles.arabic: باب الصَّبْرِ عِنْدَ الصَّدْمَةِ الأُولَى
titles.english: Chapter: Patience is to be observed at the first stroke of a calamity

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «إِنَّا بِكَ لَمَحْزُونُونَ»
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of the Prophet (pbuh): " Indeed we are grieved by your separation."

titles.arabic: باب الْبُكَاءِ عِنْدَ الْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: To weep near a patient

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى عَنِ النَّوْحِ، وَالْبُكَاءِ، وَالزَّجْرِ، عَنْ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: The forbiddance of wailing and crying aloud

titles.arabic: باب الْقِيَامِ لِلْجَنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Standing for the funeral procession

titles.arabic: باب مَتَى يَقْعُدُ إِذَا قَامَ لِلْجَنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: when should one sit after standing for the funeral procession?

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَبِعَ جَنَازَةً فَلاَ يَقْعُدُ حَتَّى تُوضَعَ عَنْ مَنَاكِبِ الرِّجَالِ، فَإِنْ قَعَدَ أُمِرَ بِالْقِيَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever accompanies a funeral procession should not sit till the coffin is put down

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَامَ لِجَنَازَةِ يَهُودِيٍّ
titles.english: Chapter: Standing for the funeral procession of a jew

titles.arabic: باب حَمْلِ الرِّجَالِ الْجِنَازَةَ دُونَ النِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Men, and not women, are to carry the coffin

titles.arabic: باب السُّرْعَةِ بِالْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Hurrying up with the coffin

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الْمَيِّتِ وَهُوَ عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ قَدِّمُونِي
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of the deceased while he is being carried on the bier, "Take me quickly."

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَفَّ صَفَّيْنِ أَوْ ثَلاَثَةً عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ خَلْفَ الإِمَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever aligned in two or three rows behind the Imam for a funeral Salat (Prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الصُّفُوفِ عَلَى الْجِنَازَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The rows for a funeral prayer

titles.arabic: باب صُفُوفِ الصِّبْيَانِ مَعَ الرِّجَالِ عَلَى/فِي الْجَنَائِزِ
titles.english: Chapter: The lining up of boys in rows with men in the funeral

titles.arabic: باب سُنَّةِ الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْجَنَائِزِ
titles.english: Chapter: The legal way of offering the funeral prayer

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ اتِّبَاعِ الْجَنَائِزِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of accompanying funeral processions

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ انْتَظَرَ حَتَّى تُدْفَنَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever waits till the deceased is buried

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الصِّبْيَانِ مَعَ النَّاسِ عَلَى الْجَنَائِزِ
titles.english: Chapter: The offering of the funeral salat (prayer) by boys along with the men

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْجَنَائِزِ بِالْمُصَلَّى وَالْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the funeral Salat (prayer) at the Musalla and at the Mosque

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنِ اتِّخَاذِ الْمَسَاجِدِ عَلَى الْقُبُورِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked of establishing places of worship (mosques) over the graves,

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى النُّفَسَاءِ إِذَا مَاتَتْ فِي نِفَاسِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The offering of the funeral Salat of a woman who died during the delivery (of a child)

titles.arabic: باب أَيْنَ يَقُومُ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ وَالرَّجُلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Where should the Imam stand while leading the funeral prayer of a female or a male?

titles.arabic: باب التَّكْبِيرِ عَلَى الْجَنَازَةِ أَرْبَعًا
