titles.arabic: باب شِرَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِالنَّسِيئَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet saws purchased (foodgrains) on credit

titles.arabic: باب كَسْبِ الرَّجُلِ وَعَمَلِهِ بِيَدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The earnings of a person and his manual labour

titles.arabic: باب السُّهُولَةِ وَالسَّمَاحَةِ فِي الشِّرَاءِ وَالْبَيْعِ، وَمَنْ طَلَبَ حَقًّا فَلْيَطْلُبْهُ فِي عَفَافٍ
titles.english: Chapter: One should be lenient and generous in bargaining

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَنْظَرَ مُوسِرًا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever gave time to a rich person to pay at his convenience

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَنْظَرَ مُعْسِرًا
titles.english: Chapter: A person in hard circumstances to pay debt (when able to repay)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَيَّنَ الْبَيِّعَانِ وَلَمْ يَكْتُمَا وَنَصَحَا
titles.english: Chapter: To explain the good and bad points of the transaction

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْخِلْطِ مِنَ التَّمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of mixed dates

titles.arabic: باب مَا قِيلَ فِي اللَّحَّامِ وَالْجَزَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about the meat seller and the butcher

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَمْحَقُ الْكَذِبُ وَالْكِتْمَانُ فِي الْبَيْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The loss (of blessings) if one tells lies or hides the facts in a deal

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لاَ تَأْكُلُوا الرِّبَا أَضْعَافًا مُضَاعَفَةً وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah Ta'ala: "... Eat not Riba doubled and multiplied."

titles.arabic: باب آكِلِ الرِّبَا وَشَاهِدِهِ وَكَاتِبِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of Riba, its witness and its writer

titles.arabic: باب مُوكِلِ الرِّبَا
titles.english: Chapter: The Riba-giver

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {يَمْحَقُ اللَّهُ الرِّبَا وَيُرْبِي الصَّدَقَاتِ وَاللَّهُ لاَ يُحِبُّ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ أَثِيمٍ}
titles.english: Chapter: "Allah will destroy Riba and will give increase for Sadaqat"

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الْحَلِفِ فِي الْبَيْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Giving oaths (swearing) while selling

titles.arabic: باب مَا قِيلَ فِي الصَّوَّاغِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about the goldsmiths

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْقَيْنِ وَالْحَدَّادِ
titles.english: Chapter: The mentioning of blacksmiths

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْخَيَّاطِ
titles.english: Chapter: The mentioning of the tailor

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ النَّسَّاجِ
titles.english: Chapter: The weaver

titles.arabic: باب النَّجَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The carpenter

titles.arabic: باب شِرَاءِ الْحَوَائِجِ بِنَفْسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The purchase by the ruler himself

titles.arabic: باب شِرَاءِ الدَّوَابِّ وَالْحَمِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The purchase of animals and donkeys

titles.arabic: باب الأَسْوَاقِ الَّتِي كَانَتْ فِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ فَتَبَايَعَ بِهَا النَّاسُ فِي الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The markets of the Pre-Islamic Period of Ignorance

titles.arabic: باب شِرَاءِ الإِبِلِ الْهِيمِ أَوِ الأَجْرَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Purchasing of camel suffering from disease

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ السِّلاَحِ فِي الْفِتْنَةِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of arms during the period of Al-Fitnah

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْعَطَّارِ وَبَيْعِ الْمِسْكِ
titles.english: Chapter: The perfume seller and the seller of musk

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْحَجَّامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Hajjam (i.e. the one who practises cupping)

titles.arabic: باب التِّجَارَةِ فِيمَا يُكْرَهُ لُبْسُهُ لِلرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The trade of cloth, wearing of which is undesirable

titles.arabic: باب صَاحِبُ السِّلْعَةِ أَحَقُّ بِالسَّوْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The owner of a thing has to suggest a price

titles.arabic: باب كَمْ يَجُوزُ الْخِيَارُ
titles.english: Chapter: For what perios to confirm or cancel the bargain?

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُوَقِّتْ فِي الْخِيَارِ، هَلْ يَجُوزُ الْبَيْعُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the time for the option is not fixed, will the deal be considered as legal?

titles.arabic: باب الْبَيِّعَانِ بِالْخِيَارِ مَا لَمْ يَتَفَرَّقَا
titles.english: Chapter: To cancel or confirm the bargain

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا خَيَّرَ أَحَدُهُمَا صَاحِبَهُ بَعْدَ الْبَيْعِ فَقَدْ وَجَبَ الْبَيْعُ
titles.english: Chapter: The option of cancelling the bargain

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا كَانَ الْبَائِعُ بِالْخِيَارِ، هَلْ يَجُوزُ الْبَيْعُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the seller has the option of cancelling the bargain

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا اشْتَرَى شَيْئًا فَوَهَبَ مِنْ سَاعَتِهِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَتَفَرَّقَا وَلَمْ يُنْكِرِ الْبَائِعُ عَلَى الْمُشْتَرِي، أَوِ اشْتَرَى عَبْدًا فَأَعْتَقَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To buy a thing and give it as a present

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الْخِدَاعِ فِي الْبَيْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked as regards cheating in business

titles.arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي الأَسْوَاقِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about markets

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ السَّخَبِ فِي السُّوقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The dislike of raising voices in the market

titles.arabic: باب الْكَيْلِ عَلَى الْبَائِعِ وَالْمُعْطِي
titles.english: Chapter: Weighing goods by the seller or the giver

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الْكَيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is considered preferable regarding measuring

titles.arabic: باب بَرَكَةِ صَاعِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَمُدِّهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Allah's Blessing in the Sa' and Mudd of the Prophet saws

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُذْكَرُ فِي بَيْعِ الطَّعَامِ وَالْحُكْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of the foodstuff and its storage

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الطَّعَامِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقْبَضَ، وَبَيْعِ مَا لَيْسَ عِنْدَكَ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of the foodstuff before receiving it

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ رَأَى إِذَا اشْتَرَى طَعَامًا جِزَافًا أَنْ لاَ يَبِيعَهُ حَتَّى يُئْوِيَهُ إِلَى رَحْلِهِ، وَالأَدَبِ فِي ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever bought foodstuff without measuring or weighing should not sell before bringing into house

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اشْتَرَى مَتَاعًا أَوْ دَابَّةً فَوَضَعَهُ عِنْدَ الْبَائِع، أَوْ مَاتَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقْبَضَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody buys some goods or (an) animal and let it with the seller, or it dies before he takes it into his possession

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَبِيعُ عَلَى بَيْعِ أَخِيهِ وَلاَ يَسُومُ عَلَى سَوْمِ أَخِيهِ، حَتَّى يَأْذَنَ لَهُ أَوْ يَتْرُكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Not to cancel a bargain already agreed upon

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُزَايَدَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling by auction

titles.arabic: باب النَّجْشِ
titles.english: Chapter: An-Naish

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْغَرَرِ وَحَبَلِ الْحَبَلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Gharar and Habal-il-Habala

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُلاَمَسَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Limas or Mulamasa

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُنَابَذَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Munabadha

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ لِلْبَائِعِ أَنْ لاَ يُحَفِّلَ الإِبِلَ وَالْبَقَرَ وَالْغَنَمَ وَكُلَّ مُحَفَّلَة
titles.english: Chapter: The seller is not allowed to keep animal unmilked for a long time

titles.arabic: باب إِنْ شَاءَ رَدَّ الْمُصَرَّاةَ وَفِي حَلْبَتِهَا صَاعٌ مِنْ تَمْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Returning an animal after milking it

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْعَبْدِ الزَّانِي‏
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of an adulterer slave

titles.arabic: باب الْبَيْعِ وَالشِّرَاءِ مَعَ النِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Dealing with women in selling and buying

titles.arabic: بَابُ هَلْ يَبِيعُ حَاضِرٌ لِبَادٍ بِغَيْرِ أَجْرٍ وَهَلْ يُعِينُهُ أَوْ يَنْصَحُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Is it permissible for a person from the town to sell the goods of a desert dweller

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَرِهَ أَنْ يَبِيعَ حَاضِرٌ لِبَادٍ بِأَجْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever hated that an urban person should sell the goods of a desert dweller and charge him for that

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَبِيعُ حَاضِرٌ لِبَادٍ بِالسَّمْسَرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: A town dweller should not buy goods for a desert dweller and charge commission as a broker

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ تَلَقِّي الرُّكْبَان
titles.english: Chapter: It is forbidden to meet the caravans on the way (to buy the goods away from the market)

titles.arabic: باب مُنْتَهَى التَّلَقِّي
titles.english: Chapter: The limits to which one can go ahead to meet the caravan

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اشْتَرَطَ شُرُوطًا فِي الْبَيْعِ لاَ تَحِلُّ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody imposes conditions in selling against the Islamic Law

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ التَّمْرِ بِالتَّمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of dates for dates

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الزَّبِيبِ بِالزَّبِيبِ وَالطَّعَامِ بِالطَّعَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of dried grapes for dried grapes and meals for meals

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الشَّعِيرِ بِالشَّعِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of barley for barley

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الذَّهَبِ بِالذَّهَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of gold for gold

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْفِضَّةِ بِالْفِضَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of silver for silver

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الدِّينَارِ بِالدِّينَارِ نَسْأً
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of Dinar for Dinar on credit

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْوَرِقِ بِالذَّهَبِ نَسِيئَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of silver for gold on delayed payment

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الذَّهَبِ بِالْوَرِقِ يَدًا بِيَدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of gold for silver from hand to hand

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُزَابَنَة، وَهْيَ بَيْعُ الثَّمَرِ بِالتَّمْرِ وَبَيْعُ الزَّبِيبِ بِالْكَرْمِ وَبَيْعُ الْعَرَايَا
titles.english: Chapter: The sale called Al-Muzabana; which is the sale of dried dates for fresh ones (that are still on the trees), and dried grapes for fresh grapes and the sale called Al-‘Araya (i.e., the selling of ripe fresh date, still over the palms, by means of estimation, for dry dates).

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الثَّمَرِ عَلَى رُءُوسِ النَّخْلِ بِالذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of dates still on trees

titles.arabic: باب تَفْسِيرِ الْعَرَايَا
titles.english: Chapter: Araya

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الثِّمَارِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَبْدُوَ صَلاَحُهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of fruits before their benefit is evident

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ النَّخْلِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَبْدُوَ صَلاَحُهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of date-palms before their benefit is evident

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَاعَ الثِّمَارَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَبْدُوَ صَلاَحُهَا ثُمَّ أَصَابَتْهُ عَاهَةٌ فَهُوَ مِنَ الْبَائِع
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody sells fruits before their benefit is evident

titles.arabic: باب شِرَاءِ الطَّعَامِ إِلَى أَجَلٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To buy foodstuff on credit

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَرَادَ بَيْعَ تَمْرٍ بِتَمْرٍ خَيْرٍ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To buy dates for Riba-Al-Fadl

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَاعَ نَخْلاً قَدْ أُبِّرَتْ أَوْ أَرْضًا مَزْرُوعَةً أَوْ بِإِجَارَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Sold or rented date-palms which were pollinated, or land which was sown

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الزَّرْعِ بِالطَّعَامِ كَيْلاً
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of unharvested crops for a measured quantity of foodstuff

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ النَّخْلِ بِأَصْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of datepalms completely

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُخَاضَرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Bai' Al-Mukhadara

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْجُمَّارِ وَأَكْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sale and eating of spadix

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ أَجْرَى أَمْرَ الأَمْصَارِ عَلَى مَا يَتَعَارَفُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ فِي الْبُيُوعِ وَالإِجَارَةِ وَالْمِكْيَالِ، وَالْوَزْنِ، وَسُنَنِهِمْ عَلَى نِيَّاتِهِمْ وَمَذَاهِبِهِمِ الْمَشْهُورَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Where there is no fixed judgement, the traditions and conventions of community are to be referred

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الشَّرِيكِ مِنْ شَرِيكِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling of a jointproperty by one to the other

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الأَرْضِ وَالدُّورِ وَالْعُرُوضِ مُشَاعًا غَيْرَ مَقْسُومٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of undivided common belongings

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اشْتَرَى شَيْئًا لِغَيْرِهِ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِ فَرَضِيَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody buys something for another without his permission and the latter accepts it

titles.arabic: باب الشِّرَاءِ وَالْبَيْعِ مَعَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ وَأَهْلِ الْحَرْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Buying and selling with Mushrikun and the enemy

titles.arabic: باب شِرَاءِ الْمَمْلُوكِ مِنَ الْحَرْبِيِّ وَهِبَتِهِ وَعِتْقِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The purchase of a slave from the enemy

titles.arabic: باب جُلُودِ الْمَيْتَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تُدْبَغ
titles.english: Chapter: The hides of dead animals before tanning

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ الْخِنْزِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Killing of pigs

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُذَابُ شَحْمُ الْمَيْتَةِ وَلاَ يُبَاعُ وَدَكُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The fat of the dead animal should not be sold

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ التَّصَاوِيرِ الَّتِي لَيْسَ فِيهَا رُوحٌ وَمَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of the pictures

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ التِّجَارَةِ فِي الْخَمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Trade of alcoholic drinks is illegal

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ بَاعَ حُرًّا
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of a person who sells a free man

titles.arabic: بَابُ أَمْرِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ الْيَهُودَ بِبَيْعِ أَرَضِيهِمْ حِينَ أَجْلاَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet saws ordered the Jews to sell their land

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْعَبِيدِ وَالْحَيَوَانِ بِالْحَيَوَانِ نَسِيئَةً
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of a slave (for a slave) and an animal for an animal on credit

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الرَّقِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of slaves

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُدَبَّرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sale id a slave who is promised to be manumitted

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُسَافِرُ بِالْجَارِيَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْتَبْرِئَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Travel with a slave-girl

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمَيْتَةِ وَالأَصْنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of dead animals and idols

titles.arabic: باب ثَمَنِ الْكَلْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Price of a dog

titles.arabic: باب السَّلَمِ فِي كَيْلٍ مَعْلُومٍ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salam by a definite known specified measure

titles.arabic: باب السَّلَمِ فِي وَزْنٍ مَعْلُومٍ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salam for a known specified weight

titles.arabic: باب السَّلَمِ إِلَى مَنْ لَيْسَ عِنْدَهُ أَصْلٌ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salam to a person who has got nothing

titles.arabic: باب السَّلَمِ فِي النَّخْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salam for (the fruits of) dat-palms

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفِيلِ فِي السَّلَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The guarantor in As-Salam

titles.arabic: باب الرَّهْنِ فِي السَّلَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mortgaging in As-Salam

titles.arabic: باب السَّلَمِ إِلَى أَجَلٍ مَعْلُومٍ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salam for a fixed specified period

titles.arabic: باب السَّلَمِ إِلَى أَنْ تُنْتَجَ النَّاقَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salam in buying a she-camel to be delivered after it has given birth

titles.arabic: باب الشُّفْعَةُ مَا لَمْ يُقْسَمْ، فَإِذَا وَقَعَتِ الْحُدُودُ فَلاَ شُفْعَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Shuf'a is valid if the property is undivided

titles.arabic: باب عَرْضِ الشُّفْعَةِ عَلَى صَاحِبِهَا قَبْلَ الْبَيْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The partner should inform his partner before selling

titles.arabic: باب أَىُّ الْجِوَارِ أَقْرَبُ
titles.english: Chapter: Who is considered the nearer neighbour?

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِئْجَارِ الرَّجُلِ الصَّالِحِ
titles.english: Chapter: To hire a pious man

titles.arabic: باب رَعْىِ الْغَنَمِ عَلَى قَرَارِيطَ
titles.english: Chapter: To shepherd sheep for Qirat

titles.arabic: بَابُ اسْتِئْجَارِ الْمُشْرِكِينَ عِنْدَ الضَّرُورَةِ أَوْ إِذَا لَمْ يُوجَدْ أَهْلُ الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The employment of Mushrikun (by Muslims)

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا اسْتَأْجَرَ أَجِيرًا لِيَعْمَلَ لَهُ بَعْدَ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ أَوْ بَعْدَ شَهْرٍ أَوْ بَعْدَ سَنَةٍ جَازَ، وَهُمَا عَلَى شَرْطِهِمَا الَّذِي اشْتَرَطَاهُ إِذَا جَاءَ الأَجَلُ
titles.english: Chapter: It is legal if somebody hires someone to work for him after three days, or after one month or after a year. When that period elapses they should carry out their contract

titles.arabic: باب الأَجِيرِ فِي الْغَزْوِ
titles.english: Chapter: Employing labourers for services in holy battles

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنِ اسْتَأْجَرَ أَجِيرًا فَبَيَّنَ لَهُ الأَجَلَ وَلَمْ يُبَيِّنِ الْعَمَلَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody employs someone

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اسْتَأْجَرَ أَجِيرًا عَلَى أَنْ يُقِيمَ حَائِطًا يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَنْقَضَّ جَازَ
titles.english: Chapter: To employ someone to repair a wall which is about to collapse

titles.arabic: باب الإِجَارَةِ إِلَى نِصْفِ النَّهَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Employment up to midday

titles.arabic: باب الإِجَارَةِ إِلَى صَلاَةِ الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Employment up to the Asr

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ مَنَعَ أَجْرَ الأَجِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of him who withholds the wages of employee

titles.arabic: باب الإِجَارَةِ مِنَ الْعَصْرِ إِلَى اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Employment from Asr till night

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنِ اسْتَأْجَرَ أَجِيرًا فَتَرَكَ أَجْرَهُ، فَعَمِلَ فِيهِ الْمُسْتَأْجِرُ فَزَادَ، أَوْ مَنْ عَمِلَ فِي مَالِ غَيْرِهِ فَاسْتَفْضَلَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whosoever employed a labourer (and after completing the work) the labourer left the wages and went away. The employer invested that money in some way and increased it thereby, or whoever invested somebody else’s money in business and increased it thereby.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ آجَرَ نَفْسَهُ لِيَحْمِلَ عَلَى ظَهْرِهِ. ثُمَّ تَصَدَّقَ بِهِ وَأُجْرَةِ الْحَمَّالِ
titles.english: Chapter: One who employs himself to carry loads on his back and then gives in charity from his wages, and (what is said about) the wages of porters

titles.arabic: باب أَجْرِ السَّمْسَرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Wages of a broker

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُؤَاجِرُ الرَّجُلُ نَفْسَهُ مِنْ مُشْرِكٍ فِي أَرْضِ الْحَرْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: To work as an employee for Mushrikum

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُعْطَى فِي الرُّقْيَةِ عَلَى أَحْيَاءِ الْعَرَبِ بِفَاتِحَةِ الْكِتَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is paid for Ruqya

titles.arabic: باب ضَرِيبَةِ الْعَبْدِ، وَتَعَاهُدِ ضَرَائِبِ الإِمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The taxes imposed on the slaves by their masters

titles.arabic: باب خَرَاجِ الْحَجَّامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The wages of one who has the profession of cupping

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَلَّمَ مَوَالِيَ الْعَبْدِ أَنْ يُخَفِّفُوا عَنْهُ مِنْ خَرَاجِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever appealed to the masters to reduce his taxes

titles.arabic: باب كَسْبِ الْبَغِيِّ وَالإِمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The earnings of prostitutes and female-slaves

titles.arabic: باب عَسْبِ الْفَحْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Charging for) the semen of a male animal

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اسْتَأْجَرَ أَرْضًا فَمَاتَ أَحَدُهُمَا
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody rents land and he or the owner of the land dies (will the contract be cancelled)?

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْحَوَالَةِ، وَهَلْ يَرْجِعُ فِي الْحَوَالَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Hawala (the transference of a debt from one person to another. It is an agreement whereby a debtor is released from a debt by another becoming responsible for it). Can Hawala be rejected by the creditors after accepting it?

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَحَالَ عَلَى مَلِيٍّ فَلَيْسَ لَهُ رَدٌّ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody's debt are transferred to a rich debtor

titles.arabic: باب إِنْ أَحَالَ دَيْنَ الْمَيِّتِ عَلَى رَجُلٍ جَازَ
titles.english: Chapter: If the debts due on a dead person are transferred to somebody, the transference is legal

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفَالَةِ فِي الْقَرْضِ وَالدُّيُونِ بِالأَبْدَانِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Kafala (i.e., the pledge given by somebody to the creditor to guarantee that the debtor will be present at a certain specific place to pay his debt or fine, or to undergo a punishment, etc.) in loans and debts with oneself or other things (e.g., one’s money)

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَالَّذِينَ عَاقَدَتْ أَيْمَانُكُمْ فَآتُوهُمْ نَصِيبَهُمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah jala jalaaluhu:"... To those also with whom you have made a pledge, give them their due portion by Wasiya..."

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَكَفَّلَ عَنْ مَيِّتٍ، دَيْنًا فَلَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يَرْجِعَ
titles.english: Chapter: He who undertakes to repay the debts of a dead person

titles.arabic: باب جِوَارِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ فِي عَهْدِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَعَقْدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The pledge of protection given to Abu Bakr

titles.arabic: باب الدَّيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Debts

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What has been revealed regarding ablution?

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تُقْبَلُ صَلاَةٌ بِغَيْرِ طُهُورٍ
titles.english: Chapter. No Salat (prayer) Is Accepted Without Ablution (i.e, To Remove, The Small Hadith By Ablution Or The Big Hadith By Taking A Bath)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْوُضُوءِ، وَالْغُرُّ الْمُحَجَّلُونَ مِنْ آثَارِ الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter. The Superiority Of Ablution. And Al-ghurr-ul-muhajjalun (the Parts Of The Body Of The Muslims Washed In Ablution Will Shine On The Day Of Ressurrection And The Angels Will Call Them By That Name) From The Traces Of Ablution

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَتَوَضَّأُ مِنَ الشَّكِّ حَتَّى يَسْتَيْقِنَ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not repeat ablution if in doubt unless and until he is convinced (that he has lost his ablution by having Hadath)

titles.arabic: باب التَّخْفِيفِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To perform a light ablution

titles.arabic: باب إِسْبَاغِ الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The completion (or perfection) of ablution (one should wash all the parts perfectly)

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الْوَجْهِ بِالْيَدَيْنِ مِنْ غَرْفَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To wash the face with both hands by a handful of water

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْمِيَةِ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ وَعِنْدَ الْوِقَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: To recite "In the name of Allah," during every action and on having sexual relations with one's wife

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ عِنْدَ الْخَلاَءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What to say while going to the lavatory (water closet)

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الْمَاءِ عِنْدَ الْخَلاَءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Providing water at lavatories (for washing the private parts after answering the call of nature)

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تُسْتَقْبَلُ الْقِبْلَةُ بِغَائِطٍ أَوْ بَوْلٍ إِلاَّ عِنْدَ الْبِنَاءِ جِدَارٍ أَوْ نَحْوِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: While urinating or defecating, never face the Qiblah except when you are screened by a building or a wall or something like that

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَبَرَّزَ عَلَى لَبِنَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Defecating while sitting over two bricks

titles.arabic: باب خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ إِلَى الْبَرَازِ
titles.english: Chapter: The going out of women for answering the call of nature

titles.arabic: باب التَّبَرُّزِ فِي الْبُيُوتِ
titles.english: Chapter: To defecate in houses

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِنْجَاءِ بِالْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To wash the private parts with water after answering the call of nature

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ حُمِلَ مَعَهُ الْمَاءُ لِطُهُورِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Getting water carried by somebody else for purification (washing one's private parts).

titles.arabic: باب حَمْلِ الْعَنَزَةِ مَعَ الْمَاءِ فِي الاِسْتِنْجَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To carry an 'Anaza (spear-headed stick) along with the water for washing the private parts after answering the call of nature.

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ الاِسْتِنْجَاءِ، بِالْيَمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is forbidden to clean the private parts with the right hand

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُمْسِكُ ذَكَرَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ إِذَا بَالَ
titles.english: Chapter: While passing urine one should not hold his penis with his right hand.

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِنْجَاءِ بِالْحِجَارَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To clean the private parts with stones

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُسْتَنْجَى بِرَوْثٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Do not clean the private parts with dung

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً
titles.english: Chapter: The washing of the body parts (i.e., the parts which are washed in ablution) once only while performing ablution

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ مَرَّتَيْنِ مَرَّتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The washing of the body parts twice while performing ablution

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ ثَلاَثًا ثَلاَثًا
titles.english: Chapter: The washing of the parts thrice while performing ablution

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِنْثَارِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The cleaning of the nose by putting water in it and then blowing it out during ablution

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِجْمَارِ وِتْرًا
titles.english: Chapter: To clean the private parts with odd number of stones

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الرِّجْلَيْنِ وَلاَ يَمْسَحُ عَلَى الْقَدَمَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Washing both feet, and it is not sufficient to pass wet hands over the feet

titles.arabic: باب الْمَضْمَضَةِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To rinse the mouth with water while performing ablution

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الأَعْقَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: The washing of heels during ablution

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الرِّجْلَيْنِ فِي النَّعْلَيْنِ وَلاَ يَمْسَحُ عَلَى النَّعْلَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Washing the feet when one is wearing the shoes, and it is not sufficient for one to pass a wet hand over the shoes (but one should take off the shoes and wash one's feet)

titles.arabic: باب التَّيَمُّنِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ وَالْغُسْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: While performing ablution or taking a bath one should start from the right side of the body

titles.arabic: باب الْتِمَاسِ الْوَضُوءِ إِذَا حَانَتِ الصَّلاَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: To look for water (for ablution) when the time for the prayer is due

titles.arabic: باب الْمَاءِ الَّذِي يُغْسَلُ بِهِ شَعَرُ الإِنْسَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding the water with which human hair has been washed

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا شَرِبَ الْكَلْبُ فِي إِنَاءِ أَحَدِكُمْ فَلْيَغْسِلْهُ سَبْعًا
titles.english: Chapter: If a dog drinks from the utensil of any one of you then it is essential to wash it seven times

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَرَ الْوُضُوءَ إِلاَّ مِنَ الْمَخْرَجَيْنِ، مِنَ الْقُبُلِ وَالدُّبُرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whosoever considers not to repeat ablution except if something is discharged or passed from exit (front or back private parts)

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجُلِ يُوَضِّئُ صَاحِبَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said regarding) a man who helps his companion to perform ablution (by pouring water for him)

titles.arabic: باب قِرَاءَةِ الْقُرْآنِ بَعْدَ الْحَدَثِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The recitation of Quran or doing other invocations etc. after Hadath

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ إِلاَّ مِنَ الْغَشْىِ الْمُثْقِلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever does not repeat ablution except after fallinginto deep sleep - losing consciousness completely

titles.arabic: باب مَسْحِ الرَّأْسِ كُلِّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To pass wet hands over the whole head during ablution

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الرِّجْلَيْنِ إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The washing of feet unto the ankles

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِعْمَالِ فَضْلِ وَضُوءِ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: The using of the remaining water after ablution

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ مَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ مِنْ غَرْفَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Rinsing one's mouth and putting water in one's nose and cleaning it by blowing the water out with a single handful of water

titles.arabic: باب مَسْحِ الرَّأْسِ مَرَّةً
titles.english: Chapter: The passing of wet hands over the head once only (while performing ablution)

titles.arabic: باب وُضُوءِ الرَّجُلِ مَعَ امْرَأَتِهِ وَفَضْلِ وَضُوءِ الْمَرْأَةِ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The performance of ablution by a man along with his wife. The utilization of water remaining after a woman has performed ablution. Umar performed ablution with warm water and with water brought from the house of a Christian woman

titles.arabic: باب صَبِّ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَضُوءَهُ عَلَى الْمُغْمَى عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sprinkling of remaining water after performing ablution on an unconscious person by the prophet (saw)

titles.arabic: باب الْغُسْلِ وَالْوُضُوءِ فِي الْمِخْضَبِ وَالْقَدَحِ وَالْخَشَبِ وَالْحِجَارَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To take a bath or perform ablution from a Mikhdab (utensil), a tumbler, or a wooden or stone pot

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ مِنَ التَّوْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To perform ablution from an earthen-ware pot

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ بِالْمُدِّ
titles.english: Chapter: To perform ablution with one Mudd of water. (Mudd is practically 2/3 of the kilogram)

titles.arabic: باب الْمَسْحِ عَلَى الْخُفَّيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To pass wet hands over Khuffain [two leather socks covering the ankles]

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَدْخَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ وَهُمَا طَاهِرَتَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: If one puts on (Khuff) just after performing ablution (ther is no need to wash one's feet again in ablution) (24 hours for non-travellers and three days for travelers)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ مِنْ لَحْمِ الشَّاةِ وَالسَّوِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Not repeating ablution after eating mutton and As-Sawiq

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ مَضْمَضَ مِنَ السَّوِيقِ وَلَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ
titles.english: Chapter: Rinsing one's mouth (with water) after eating As-Sawiq without repaying ablution

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُمَضْمِضُ مِنَ اللَّبَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whether to rinse the mouth after drinking milk

titles.arabic: بَابُ الْوُضُوءِ مِنَ النَّوْمِ وَمَنْ لَمْ يَرَ مِنَ النَّعْسَةِ وَالنَّعْسَتَيْنِ أَوِ الْخَفْقَةِ وُضُوءًا
titles.english: Chapter: Ablution after sleep. And whoever considers it unnecessary to repeat ablution after dozing once or twice or after nodding once in slumber

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَدَثٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To perform ablution even on having no Hadath

titles.arabic: باب مِنَ الْكَبَائِرِ أَنْ لاَ يَسْتَتِرَ مِنْ بَوْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: One of the major sins is not to protect oneself (one's clothes and body) from one's urine (i.e., from being soiled with it)

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي غَسْلِ الْبَوْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding washing out urine

titles.arabic: باب تَرْكِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَالنَّاسِ الأَعْرَابِيَّ حَتَّى فَرَغَ مِنْ بَوْلِهِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saw) and the people left the bedouin undisturbed till he finished urinating in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب صَبِّ الْمَاءِ عَلَى الْبَوْلِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The pouring of water over the urine in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب بَوْلِ الصِّبْيَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: The urine of children

titles.arabic: باب الْبَوْلِ قَائِمًا وَقَاعِدًا
titles.english: Chapter: To pass urine while standing and sitting

titles.arabic: باب الْبَوْلِ عِنْدَ صَاحِبِهِ وَالتَّسَتُّرِ بِالْحَائِطِ
titles.english: Chapter: To urinate beside one's companion while screened by a wall

titles.arabic: باب الْبَوْلِ عِنْدَ سُبَاطَةِ قَوْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To urinate near the dumps of some people

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الدَّمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The washing out of blood

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الْمَنِيِّ وَفَرْكِهِ وَغَسْلِ مَا يُصِيبُ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The washing out of semen with water and rubbing it off (when it is dry) and the washing out of what comes out of women (i.e., discharge)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا غَسَلَ الْجَنَابَةَ أَوْ غَيْرَهَا فَلَمْ يَذْهَبْ أَثَرُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the (traces of) Janaba (semen) or other spots are not removed completely on washing

titles.arabic: باب أَبْوَالِ الإِبِلِ وَالدَّوَابِّ وَالْغَنَمِ وَمَرَابِضِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said) about the urine of camels, sheep and other animals and about their folds

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقَعُ مِنَ النَّجَاسَاتِ فِي السَّمْنِ وَالْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: An-Najasat (impure and filthy things) which fall in cooking butter (ghee - which is obtained by evaporating moisture from butter) and water

titles.arabic: باب الْبَوْلِ فِي الْمَاءِ الدَّائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Urinating in stagnant water

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أُلْقِيَ عَلَى ظَهْرِ الْمُصَلِّي قَذَرٌ أَوْ جِيفَةٌ لَمْ تَفْسُدْ عَلَيْهِ صَلاَتُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If a dead body or a polluted thing is put on the back of a person offering Salat (prayer), his Salat will not be annulled (rejected by Allah)

titles.arabic: باب الْبُزَاقِ وَالْمُخَاطِ وَنَحْوِهِ فِي الثَّوْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Spitting or blowing out the nose or doing similar action in one's own garment

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَجُوزُ الْوُضُوءُ بِالنَّبِيذِ وَلاَ الْمُسْكِرِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is unlawful to perform ablution with Nabidh (water in which dates or grapes etc, are soaked and is not yet fermented) or with any other intoxicant

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الْمَرْأَةِ أَبَاهَا الدَّمَ عَنْ وَجْهِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Washing blood by a women off her father's face

titles.arabic: باب السِّوَاكِ
titles.english: Chapter: Siwak (to clean the teeth with Siwak which is a tooth-brush in the form of a pencil from the roots of the Arak tree

titles.arabic: باب دَفْعِ السِّوَاكِ إِلَى الأَكْبَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To give Siwak to the oldest person of the group

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ بَاتَ عَلَى الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of a person who sleeps with ablution.

titles.arabic: باب وَكَالَةُ الشَّرِيكِ الشَّرِيكَ فِي الْقِسْمَةِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: A partner can deputize for another

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَكَّلَ الْمُسْلِمُ حَرْبِيًّا فِي دَارِ الْحَرْبِ أَوْ فِي دَارِ الإِسْلاَمِ، جَازَ
titles.english: Chapter: If a Muslim deputizes a non-Muslim

titles.arabic: باب الْوَكَالَةِ فِي الصَّرْفِ وَالْمِيزَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To deputize one in exchanging money and weighing goods

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا أَبْصَرَ الرَّاعِي أَوِ الْوَكِيلُ شَاةً تَمُوتُ أَوْ شَيْئًا يَفْسُدُ ذَبَحَ وَأَصْلَحَ مَا يَخَافُ عَلَيْهِ الْفَسَادَ
titles.english: Chapter: To save the thing liable to be spoiled

titles.arabic: باب وَكَالَةُ الشَّاهِدِ وَالْغَائِبِ جَائِزَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: To depute a person, present or absent

titles.arabic: باب الْوَكَالَةِ فِي قَضَاءِ الدُّيُونِ
titles.english: Chapter: To depute a person to repay debts

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَهَبَ شَيْئًا لِوَكِيلٍ أَوْ شَفِيعِ قَوْمٍ جَازَ
titles.english: Chapter: To give a gift to a deputy or to their intercessor

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَكَّلَ رَجُلٌ أَنْ يُعْطِيَ شَيْئًا وَلَمْ يُبَيِّنْ كَمْ يُعْطِي، فَأَعْطَى عَلَى مَا يَتَعَارَفُهُ النَّاسُ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone deputes a person to give something

titles.arabic: باب وَكَالَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ الإِمَامَ فِي النِّكَاحِ
titles.english: Chapter: A woman can depute the ruler in marriage

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا وَكَّلَ رَجُلاً، فَتَرَكَ الْوَكِيلُ شَيْئًا، فَأَجَازَهُ الْمُوَكِّلُ، فَهُوَ جَائِزٌ، وَإِنْ أَقْرَضَهُ إِلَى أَجَلٍ مُسَمًّى جَازَ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person deputes somebody, and the deputy leaves something

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَاعَ الْوَكِيلُ شَيْئًا فَاسِدًا فَبَيْعُهُ مَرْدُودٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If a deputy sells something (in an illegal manner)

titles.arabic: باب الْوَكَالَةِ فِي الْوَقْفِ وَنَفَقَتِهِ، وَأَنْ يُطْعِمَ صَدِيقًا لَهُ وَيَأْكُلَ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ
titles.english: Chapter: The deputyship for managing the Waaf and the expenses of the trustee. The trustee can provide his friends and can eat from it reasonably.

titles.arabic: باب الْوَكَالَةِ فِي الْحُدُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: To depute a person to carry out a punishment

titles.arabic: باب الْوَكَالَةِ فِي الْبُدْنِ وَتَعَاهُدِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: To depute someone to sacrifice Budn (camels for sacrifice) and to look after them

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا قَالَ الرَّجُلُ لِوَكِيلِهِ ضَعْهُ حَيْثُ أَرَاكَ اللَّهُ. وَقَالَ الْوَكِيلُ قَدْ سَمِعْتُ مَا قُلْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person tells his deputy, "Spend it as Allah directs you."

titles.arabic: باب وَكَالَةِ الأَمِينِ فِي الْخِزَانَةِ وَنَحْوِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: To depute a trustworthy treasurer

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الزَّرْعِ وَالْغَرْسِ إِذَا أُكِلَ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Sowing seeds and planting trees

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا يُحْذَرُ مِنْ عَوَاقِبِ الاِشْتِغَالِ بِآلَةِ الزَّرْعِ أَوْ مُجَاوَزَةِ الْحَدِّ الَّذِي أُمِرَ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The results of indulging in agricultural equipment

titles.arabic: باب اقْتِنَاءِ الْكَلْبِ لِلْحَرْثِ
titles.english: Chapter: Keeping a watchdog for the farm

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِعْمَالِ الْبَقَرِ لِلْحِرَاثَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Employing oxen for ploughing

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ اكْفِنِي مَئُونَةَ النَّخْلِ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ، وَتُشْرِكُنِي فِي الثَّمَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To say to another, "Look after my date-palm trees...

titles.arabic: باب قَطْعِ الشَّجَرِ وَالنَّخْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The cutting of trees and date-palm trees

titles.arabic: باب الْمُزَارَعَةِ بِالشَّطْرِ وَنَحْوِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Temporary share-cropping contract

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يَشْتَرِطِ السِّنِينَ فِي الْمُزَارَعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The contract of share-cropping

titles.arabic: باب الْمُزَارَعَةِ مَعَ الْيَهُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Share-cropping with the Jews

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْمُزَارَعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What conditions are disliked in share-cropping

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا زَرَعَ بِمَالِ قَوْمٍ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِمْ وَكَانَ فِي ذَلِكَ صَلاَحٌ لَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person invests the money of someone else in cultivation

titles.arabic: بَابُ أَوْقَافِ أَصْحَابِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَأَرْضِ الْخَرَاجِ وَمُزَارَعَتِهِمْ وَمُعَامَلَتِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The Auqaf, Kharaj, share-cropping and other agreements

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَحْيَا أَرْضًا مَوَاتًا
titles.english: Chapter: Cultivating the neglected land

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا قَالَ رَبُّ الأَرْضِ أُقِرُّكَ مَا أَقَرَّكَ اللَّهُ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ أَجَلاً مَعْلُومًا فَهُمَا عَلَى تَرَاضِيهِمَا
titles.english: Chapter: The lease can be continued according to the approval of both the parties

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يُوَاسِي بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضًا فِي الزِّرَاعَةِ وَالثَّمَرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To share the yields and fruits

titles.arabic: باب كِرَاءِ الأَرْضِ بِالذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To rent the land for gold and silver

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْغَرْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about planting trees

titles.arabic: بَابٌ في الشُّرْبِ وَقَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَجَعَلْنَا مِنَ الْمَاءِ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ حَيٍّ أَفَلاَ يُؤْمِنُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allāh تعالى: “… And We have made from water every living thing. Will they not then believe.” (V.21:30)

titles.arabic: بَابٌ في الشُّرْبِ، وَمَنْ رَأَى صَدَقَةَ الْمَاءِ وَهِبَتَهُ وَوَصِيَّتَهُ جَائِزَةً، مَقْسُومًا كَانَ أَوْ غَيْرَ مَقْسُومٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Giving water in charity, or as a gift, and whoever thinks that giving water in charity, or as a gift or by way of a testament is permissible, whether it is divided or not

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَالَ إِنَّ صَاحِبَ الْمَاءِ أَحَقُّ بِالْمَاءِ حَتَّى يَرْوَى لِقَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: لا يُمْنَعُ فَضْلُ الْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever said, “The owner of the water has the right to drink till he is satisfied, as the Prophet ﷺ said, ‘Superfluous water should not be withheld from others.’”

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ حَفَرَ بِئْرًا فِي مِلْكِهِ لَمْ يَضْمَنْ
titles.english: Chapter: If one digs a well and somebody falls in it and dies

titles.arabic: باب الْخُصُومَةِ فِي الْبِئْرِ وَالْقَضَاءِ فِيهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Disputes and controversies about wells

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ مَنَعَ ابْنَ السَّبِيلِ مِنَ الْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of him who witholds water from travellers

titles.arabic: باب سَكْرِ الأَنْهَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The dams of rivers

titles.arabic: باب شُرْبِ الأَعْلَى قَبْلَ الأَسْفَلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The land near the source of water to be irrigated first

titles.arabic: باب شِرْبِ الأَعْلَى إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The land to be covered with water up to the ankles

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ سَقْىِ الْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of providing water

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَأَى أَنَّ صَاحِبَ الْحَوْضِ وَالْقِرْبَةِ أَحَقُّ بِمَائِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The owner of a tank or a leather water-container

titles.arabic: باب لاَ حِمَى إِلاَّ لِلَّهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: Hima (private pasture)

titles.arabic: باب شُرْبِ النَّاسِ وَالدَّوَابِّ مِنَ الأَنْهَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Drinking water by people and animals from rivers

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْحَطَبِ وَالْكَلإِ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of wood and grass

titles.arabic: باب الْقَطَائِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The uncultivated pieces of land

titles.arabic: باب كِتَابَةِ الْقَطَائِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Documentation of the land grants

titles.arabic: باب حَلَبِ الإِبِلِ عَلَى الْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Milking she-camels at water places

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ لَهُ مَمَرٌّ، أَوْ شِرْبٌ فِي حَائِطٍ أَوْ فِي نَخْلٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To pass through a garden or to have a share in datepalms

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اشْتَرَى بِالدَّيْنِ وَلَيْسَ عِنْدَهُ ثَمَنُهُ، أَوْ لَيْسَ بِحَضْرَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever buys a thing on credit

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَخَذَ أَمْوَالَ النَّاسِ يُرِيدُ أَدَاءَهَا أَوْ إِتْلاَفَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Borrowing money from people

titles.arabic: باب أَدَاءِ الدُّيُونِ
titles.english: Chapter: Repayment of debts

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِقْرَاضِ الإِبِلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To buy camels on credit

titles.arabic: باب حُسْنِ التَّقَاضِي
titles.english: Chapter: Demanding debts handsomely

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُعْطَى أَكْبَرَ مِنْ سِنِّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Can one give an older (camel) than that he owes?

titles.arabic: باب حُسْنِ الْقَضَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Repaying debts handsomely

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَضَى دُونَ حَقِّهِ أَوْ حَلَّلَهُ فَهْوَ جَائِزٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody repays less than what he owes

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَاصَّ أَوْ جَازَفَهُ فِي الدَّيْنِ تَمْرًا بِتَمْرٍ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To settle one's accounts by repaying

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَعَاذَ مِنَ الدَّيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from being in debt

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى مَنْ تَرَكَ دَيْنًا
titles.english: Chapter: The funeral Salat (prayer) for a dead person in debt

titles.arabic: باب مَطْلُ الْغَنِيِّ ظُلْمٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Procrastination (delay) in repaying debts by a wealthy person is injustice

titles.arabic: باب لِصَاحِبِ الْحَقِّ مَقَالٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The owner of the right has the permission to demand his right

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَجَدَ مَالَهُ عِنْدَ مُفْلِسٍ فِي الْبَيْعِ وَالْقَرْضِ وَالْوَدِيعَةِ فَهْوَ أَحَقُّ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody lends something and the possessor gets bankrupt

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ أَخَّرَ الْغَرِيمَ إِلَى الْغَدِ أَوْ نَحْوِهِ، وَلَمْ يَرَ ذَلِكَ مَطْلاً
titles.english: Chapter: Delay in the repayment of debts for a day or so

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَاعَ مَالَ الْمُفْلِسِ أَوِ الْمُعْدِمِ فَقَسَمَهُ بَيْنَ الْغُرَمَاءِ، أَوْ أَعْطَاهُ حَتَّى يُنْفِقَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The property of a bankrupt

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَقْرَضَهُ إِلَى أَجَلٍ مُسَمًّى أَوْ أَجَّلَهُ فِي الْبَيْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: To lend money or sell on credit for a fixed time

titles.arabic: باب الشَّفَاعَةِ فِي وَضْعِ الدَّيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Intercession for the reduction of debts

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى عَنْ إِضَاعَةِ الْمَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: Wasting money

titles.arabic: باب الْعَبْدُ رَاعٍ فِي مَالِ سَيِّدِهِ وَلاَ يَعْمَلُ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A slave is a guardian of the property of his master

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُذْكَرُ فِي الإِشْخَاصِ وَالْخُصُومَةِ بَيْنَ الْمُسْلِمِ وَالْيَهُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: About the people and quarrels

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ رَدَّ أَمْرَ السَّفِيهِ وَالضَّعِيفِ الْعَقْلِ، وَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ حَجَرَ عَلَيْهِ الإِمَامُ
titles.english: Chapter: The deals done by a weak-minded or an extravagant person

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَاعَ عَلَى الضَّعِيفِ وَنَحْوِهِ فَدَفَعَ ثَمَنَهُ إِلَيْهِ، وَأَمَرَهُ بِالإِصْلاَحِ وَالْقِيَامِ بِشَأْنِهِ، فَإِنْ أَفْسَدَ بَعْدُ مَنَعَهُ، لأَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَهَى عَنْ إِضَاعَةِ الْمَالِ، وَقَالَ لِلَّذِي يُخْدَعُ فِي الْبَيْعِ: «إِذَا بَايَعْتَ فَقُلْ لاَ خِلاَبَةَ». وَلَمْ يَأْخُذِ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَالَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody sells a thing for a weak-minded person and pays him the price, and advised him to utilize it in a proper way and not to spoil it, and he spoils it, he can stop him from doing so, for the Prophet had forbidden the wasting of the property. The Prophet ordered the person who said that he had always been cheated in buying, to say, at the time of the deal, "No cheating!" The Prophet did not take his money (of the person who sold his slave, because he had not proved foolish).

titles.arabic: باب كَلاَمِ الْخُصُومِ بَعْضِهِمْ فِي بَعْضٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The talk of opponents against each other

titles.arabic: باب إِخْرَاجِ أَهْلِ الْمَعَاصِي وَالْخُصُومِ مِنَ الْبُيُوتِ بَعْدَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Turning out the sinners and the quarrelsome people of the houses

titles.arabic: باب دَعْوَى الْوَصِيِّ لِلْمَيِّتِ
titles.english: Chapter: To file a case for fulfilling the will of the deceased

titles.arabic: باب التَّوَثُّقِ مِمَّنْ تُخْشَى مَعَرَّتُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Tying the person liable to do mischievous things

titles.arabic: باب الرَّبْطِ وَالْحَبْسِ فِي الْحَرَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Fastening and imprisoning in the Haram

titles.arabic: باب الْمُلاَزَمَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: (The creditor's) pursuit (after his debtors)

titles.arabic: باب التَّقَاضِي
titles.english: Chapter: Demanding one's debts

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَخْبَرَهُ رَبُّ اللُّقَطَةِ، بِالْعَلاَمَةِ دَفَعَ إِلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Owner's proof

titles.arabic: باب ضَالَّةِ الإِبِلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Lost camels

titles.arabic: باب ضَالَّةِ الْغَنَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Lost sheep

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُوجَدْ صَاحِبُ اللُّقَطَةِ بَعْدَ سَنَةٍ فَهْىَ لِمَنْ وَجَدَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: If the owner of a lost thing is not found for one year

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَجَدَ خَشَبَةً فِي الْبَحْرِ أَوْ سَوْطًا أَوْ نَحْوَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone finds a thing in the sea

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَجَدَ تَمْرَةً فِي الطَّرِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody finds a date on the way

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ تُعَرَّفُ لُقَطَةُ أَهْلِ مَكَّةَ
titles.english: Chapter: How the Luqata at Makkah is to be announced

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تُحْتَلَبُ مَاشِيَةُ أَحَدٍ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنٍهِ
titles.english: Chapter: No animal may be milked without the permission of its owner

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا جَاءَ صَاحِبُ اللُّقَطَةِ بَعْدَ سَنَةٍ رَدَّهَا عَلَيْهِ، لأَنَّهَا وَدِيعَةٌ عِنْدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the owner of lost property comes back after a year

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَأْخُذُ اللُّقَطَةَ وَلاَ يَدَعُهَا تَضِيعُ، حَتَّى لاَ يَأْخُذَهَا مَنْ لاَ يَسْتَحِقُّ
titles.english: Chapter: Should one pick up a fallen thing?

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ عَرَّفَ اللُّقَطَةَ، وَلَمْ يَدْفَعْهَا إِلَى السُّلْطَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever announced the Luqata in public

titles.arabic: باب قِصَاصِ الْمَظَالِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Retaliation (on the Day of Judgement)

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {أَلاَ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ عَلَى الظَّالِمِينَ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah Taa'la: "... No doubt! The curse of Allah is on the Zalimun."

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَظْلِمُ الْمُسْلِمُ الْمُسْلِمَ وَلاَ يُسْلِمُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: A Muslim should not oppress another Muslim

titles.arabic: باب أَعِنْ أَخَاكَ ظَالِمًا أَوْ مَظْلُومًا
titles.english: Chapter: Help your brother

titles.arabic: باب نَصْرِ الْمَظْلُومِ
titles.english: Chapter: To help the oppressed

titles.arabic: بَابُ الاِنْتِصَارِ مِنَ الظَّالِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To retaliate upon an oppressor

titles.arabic: بَابُ عَفْوِ الْمَظْلُومِ
titles.english: Chapter: Forgiveness granted by the oppressed person

titles.arabic: باب الظُّلْمُ ظُلُمَاتٌ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Az-Zulm (oppression) will be a darkness

titles.arabic: باب الاِتِّقَاءِ وَالْحَذَرِ مِنْ دَعْوَةِ الْمَظْلُومِ
titles.english: Chapter: The curse of the oppressed

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَانَتْ لَهُ مَظْلَمَةٌ عِنْدَ الرَّجُلِ فَحَلَّلَهَا لَهُ، هَلْ يُبَيِّنُ مَظْلَمَتَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If the oppressed on forgives the oppressor

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا حَلَّلَهُ مِنْ ظُلْمِهِ فَلاَ رُجُوعَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If the oppressed person forgives the oppressor, he has no right to back out

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَذِنَ لَهُ أَوْ أَحَلَّهُ وَلَمْ يُبَيِّنْ كَمْ هُوَ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person allows another to have his right

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ ظَلَمَ شَيْئًا مِنَ الأَرْضِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of him who usurps the land of others

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَذِنَ إِنْسَانٌ لآخَرَ شَيْئًا جَازَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody allows another to do something

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَهُوَ أَلَدُّ الْخِصَامِ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah Taa'la: "Yet he is the most quarrelsome of the opponents..."

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ خَاصَمَ فِي بَاطِلٍ وَهْوَ يَعْلَمُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of a man who quarrels unjustly

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا خَاصَمَ فَجَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: The person who behaves impudently

titles.arabic: باب قِصَاصِ الْمَظْلُومِ إِذَا وَجَدَ مَالَ ظَالِمِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The retaliation of the oppressed person

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي السَّقَائِفِ
titles.english: Chapter: About sheds

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَمْنَعُ جَارٌ جَارَهُ أَنْ يَغْرِزَ خَشَبَهُ فِي جِدَارِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Not to prevent a neighbour from fixing a peg

titles.arabic: باب صَبِّ الْخَمْرِ فِي الطَّرِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Spilling wine on the way

titles.arabic: باب أَفْنِيَةِ الدُّورِ وَالْجُلُوسِ فِيهَا وَالْجُلُوسِ عَلَى الصُّعُدَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Open courtyards of houses and sitting on the ways

titles.arabic: باب الآبَارِ عَلَى الطُّرُقِ إِذَا لَمْ يُتَأَذَّ بِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The digging of wells on the ways

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِمَاطَةِ الأَذَى
titles.english: Chapter: To remove harmful things from the roads

titles.arabic: باب الْغُرْفَةِ وَالْعُلِّيَّةِ الْمُشْرِفَةِ وَغَيْرِ الْمُشْرِفَةِ فِي السُّطُوحِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Looking or not looking upon other houses

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ عَقَلَ بَعِيرَهُ عَلَى الْبَلاَطِ أَوْ باب الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever tied his camel at the gate of the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الْوُقُوفِ وَالْبَوْلِ عِنْدَ سُبَاطَةِ قَوْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Standing and urinating at the dumps

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَخَذَ الْغُصْنَ وَمَا يُؤْذِي النَّاسَ فِي الطَّرِيقِ فَرَمَى بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Removing a thing from the way which harms the people

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا اخْتَلَفُوا فِي الطَّرِيقِ الْمِيتَاءِ- وَهْيَ الرَّحْبَةُ تَكُونُ بَيْنَ الطَّرِيقِ- ثُمَّ يُرِيدُ أَهْلُهَا الْبُنْيَانَ، فَتُرِكَ مِنْهَا الطَّرِيقُ سَبْعَةَ أَذْرُعٍ
titles.english: Chapter: When there is a dispute about a public way

titles.arabic: باب النُّهْبَى بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ صَاحِبِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Robbing away somebody's property publicly

titles.arabic: باب كَسْرِ الصَّلِيبِ وَقَتْلِ الْخِنْزِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The breaking of the cross and the killing of the pigs

titles.arabic: بَابُ هَلْ تُكْسَرُ الدِّنَانُ الَّتِي فِيهَا الْخَمْرُ أَوْ تُخَرَّقُ الزِّقَاقُ
titles.english: Chapter: To break the pots containing wine

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَاتَلَ دُونَ مَالِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: One who fights to protect his property

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا كَسَرَ قَصْعَةً أَوْ شَيْئًا لِغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person breaks something belonging to somebody

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا هَدَمَ حَائِطًا فَلْيَبْنِ مِثْلَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If one pulls down a wall, should build a similar one in its place

titles.arabic: باب الشَّرِكَةِ فِي الطَّعَامِ وَالنَّهْدِ وَالْعُرُوضِ
titles.english: Chapter: About (sharing) meals and the Nahd and Urud

titles.arabic: باب مَا كَانَ مِنْ خَلِيطَيْنِ فَإِنَّهُمَا يَتَرَاجَعَانِ بَيْنَهُمَا بِالسَّوِيَّةِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Partners possessing joint property have to pay its Zakat equally

titles.arabic: باب قِسْمَةِ الْغَنَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Division of sheep

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَانِ فِي التَّمْرِ بَيْنَ الشُّرَكَاءِ حَتَّى يَسْتَأْذِنَ أَصْحَابَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: A partner should not eat two dates at a time

titles.arabic: باب تَقْوِيمِ الأَشْيَاءِ بَيْنَ الشُّرَكَاءِ بِقِيمَةِ عَدْلٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To get a joint property evaluated with a price

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُقْرَعُ فِي الْقِسْمَةِ وَالاِسْتِهَامِ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Can one draw lots for divisions and shares

titles.arabic: باب شَرِكَةِ الْيَتِيمِ وَأَهْلِ الْمِيرَاثِ
titles.english: Chapter: The partnership of orphans and inheritors

titles.arabic: باب الشَّرِكَةِ فِي الأَرَضِينَ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Sharing land, etc.

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اقْتَسَمَ الشُّرَكَاءُ الدُّورَ أَوْ غَيْرَهَا فَلَيْسَ لَهُمْ رُجُوعٌ وَلاَ شُفْعَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If partners divide the houses, etc.

titles.arabic: باب الاِشْتِرَاكِ فِي الذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ وَمَا يَكُونُ فِيهِ الصَّرْفُ
titles.english: Chapter: Sharing gold, silver and other articles

titles.arabic: باب مُشَارَكَةِ الذِّمِّيِّ وَالْمُشْرِكِينَ فِي الْمُزَارَعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Partnership with a Dhimmiin share-cropping

titles.arabic: باب قِسْمَةِ الْغَنَمِ وَالْعَدْلِ فِيهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Distribution of sheep and dividing them justly

titles.arabic: باب الشَّرِكَةِ فِي الطَّعَامِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sharing of food, etc.

titles.arabic: باب الشَّرِكَةِ فِي الرَّقِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sharing the slaves

titles.arabic: باب الاِشْتِرَاكِ فِي الْهَدْىِ وَالْبُدْنِ، وَإِذَا أَشْرَكَ الرَّجُلُ الرَّجُلَ فِي هَدْيِهِ بَعْدَ مَا أَهْدَى
titles.english: Chapter: Sharing the Hady and Budn

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ عَدَلَ عَشْرًا مِنَ الْغَنَمِ بِجَزُورٍ فِي الْقَسْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ten sheep as equal to one camel in distribution

titles.arabic: باب فِي الرَّهْنِ فِي الْحَضَرِ وَقَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {وَإِنْ كُنْتُمْ عَلَى سَفَرٍ وَلَمْ تَجِدُوا كَاتِبًا فَرِهَانٌ مَقْبُوضَةٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: The mortgaging in places occupied by settled population and the Statement of Allah تعالى: "And if you are on a journey and cannot find a scribe, then let there be a pledge taken (i.e., mortgaging)..." (V.2:283)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَهَنَ دِرْعَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Mortgaging an armour

titles.arabic: باب رَهْنِ السِّلاَحِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mortgaging the arms

titles.arabic: باب الرَّهْنُ مَرْكُوبٌ وَمَحْلُوبٌ
titles.english: Chapter: To mortgage an animal used for riding or milking

titles.arabic: باب الرَّهْنِ عِنْدَ الْيَهُودِ وَغَيْرِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Mortgaging things to Jews and others

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا اخْتَلَفَ الرَّاهِنُ وَالْمُرْتَهِنُ وَنَحْوُهُ فَالْبَيِّنَةُ عَلَى الْمُدَّعِي وَالْيَمِينُ عَلَى الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Dispute between the mortgagor and mortgagee

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْعِتْقِ وَفَضْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The manumission and its superiority

titles.arabic: باب أَىُّ الرِّقَابِ أَفْضَلُ
titles.english: Chapter: What is the best kind of manumission (of slaves)?

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الْعَتَاقَةِ فِي الْكُسُوفِ وَالآيَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Manumitting slaves at the time of eclipses

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَعْتَقَ عَبْدًا بَيْنَ اثْنَيْنِ أَوْ أَمَةً بَيْنَ الشُّرَكَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: If one manumits a male slave owned by two persons

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَعْتَقَ نَصِيبًا فِي عَبْدٍ، وَلَيْسَ لَهُ مَالٌ اسْتُسْعِيَ الْعَبْدُ غَيْرَ مَشْقُوقٍ عَلَيْ، عَلَى نَحْوِ الْكِتَابَةِه
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever manumits his portion of a common slave

titles.arabic: باب الْخَطَإِ وَالنِّسْيَانِ فِي الْعَتَاقَةِ وَالطَّلاَقِ وَنَحْوِهِ، وَلاَ عَتَاقَةَ إِلاَّ لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Manumission and divorce by mistake or forgetfulness

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ رَجُلٌ لِعَبْدِهِ هُوَ لِلَّهِ وَنَوَى الْعِتْقَ، وَالإِشْهَادُ فِي الْعِتْقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The witness for manumission

titles.arabic: باب أُمِّ الْوَلَدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Umm Al-Walad

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُدَبَّرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of a Mudabbar

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْوَلاَءِ وَهِبَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Wala' of a manumitted slave

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أُسِرَ أَخُو الرَّجُلِ أَوْ عَمُّهُ هَلْ يُفَادَى إِذَا كَانَ مُشْرِكًا
titles.english: Chapter: If the brother or the uncle of somebody was taken as to ransom a Mushrik

titles.arabic: باب عِتْقِ الْمُشْرِكِ
titles.english: Chapter: Manumission of a Mushrik

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ مَلَكَ مِنَ الْعَرَبِ رَقِيقًا فَوَهَبَ وَبَاعَ وَجَامَعَ وَفَدَى وَسَبَى الذُّرِّيَّةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever possessed Arab slaves

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ أَدَّبَ جَارِيَتَهُ وَعَلَّمَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of him who teaches his slave-girl good manners

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏
titles.english: Chapter: "Slaves are your brothers, so feed them with the like of what you eat."

titles.arabic: باب الْعَبْدِ إِذَا أَحْسَنَ عِبَادَةَ رَبِّهِ وَنَصَحَ سَيِّدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: A slave who worships his Lord and he is also honest and faithful to his master

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ التَّطَاوُلِ عَلَى الرَّقِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is dislike to look down upon a slave

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَتَاهُ خَادِمُهُ بِطَعَامِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: When your servant brings your meal to you?

titles.arabic: باب الْعَبْدُ رَاعٍ فِي مَالِ سَيِّدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The slave is a guardian of the property of his master.

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا ضَرَبَ الْعَبْدَ فَلْيَجْتَنِبِ الْوَجْهَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody beats a slave, he should avoid his face.

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ قَبْلَ الْغُسْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The performance of ablution before taking a bath

titles.arabic: باب غُسْلِ الرَّجُلِ مَعَ امْرَأَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Taking a bath by a man along with his wife

titles.arabic: باب الْغُسْلِ بِالصَّاعِ وَنَحْوِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Taking a bath with a Sa' of water or so (One Sa' = 3 kilograms approx.)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَفَاضَ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ ثَلاَثًا
titles.english: Chapter: Pouring water thrice on one's head

titles.arabic: باب الْغُسْلِ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً
titles.english: Chapter: To wash the body (parts) once only

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَدَأَ بِالْحِلاَبِ أَوِ الطِّيبِ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Starting one's bath by scenting oneself with Hilab or some other scent

titles.arabic: باب الْمَضْمَضَةِ وَالاِسْتِنْشَاقِ فِي الْجَنَابَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To rinse the mouth and to clean the nose by putting water in it and then blowing it out while taking the bath of Janaba

titles.arabic: باب مَسْحِ الْيَدِ بِالتُّرَابِ لِيَكُونَ أَنْقَى
titles.english: Chapter: The rubbing of hands with earth in ore to clean them thoroughly

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُدْخِلُ الْجُنُبُ يَدَهُ فِي الإِنَاءِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَغْسِلَهَا إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَى يَدِهِ قَذَرٌ غَيْرُ الْجَنَابَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Can a Junub (a person who has yet to take bath after the sexual act or wet dream) put his hands in a pot (containing water) before washing them if they are not polluted with a dirty thing except Janaba?

titles.arabic: باب تَفْرِيقِ الْغُسْلِ وَالْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Interval during ablution or bath

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَفْرَغَ بِيَمِينِهِ عَلَى شِمَالِهِ فِي الْغُسْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Pouring water with one's right hand over the left one, during the bath

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا جَامَعَ ثُمَّ عَادَ، وَمَنْ دَارَ عَلَى نِسَائِهِ فِي غُسْلٍ وَاحِدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Having sexual intercourse and repeating it. And engaging with one's own wives and taking a single bath (after doing so)

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ الْمَذْىِ وَالْوُضُوءِ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The washing away of emotional urethral discharge and performing ablution after it

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَطَيَّبَ ثُمَّ اغْتَسَلَ وَبَقِيَ أَثَرُ الطِّيبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever scented himself and then took a bath while the effect of scent remained even after bathing

titles.arabic: باب تَخْلِيلِ الشَّعَرِ حَتَّى إِذَا ظَنَّ أَنَّهُ قَدْ أَرْوَى بَشَرَتَهُ أَفَاضَ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To rub the hair thoroughly (while taking a bath) till one feels that one has made his skin wet (underneath the hair) and the one pours water over it

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ فِي الْجَنَابَةِ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ سَائِرَ جَسَدِهِ، وَلَمْ يُعِدْ، غَسْلَ مَوَاضِعِ الْوُضُوءِ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever performed the ablution of Janaba and then washed his body but did not wash once again the parts which were washed in ablution

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا ذَكَرَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ أَنَّهُ جُنُبٌ يَخْرُجُ كَمَا هُوَ وَلاَ يَتَيَمَّمُ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone while in the mosque remembers that he is Junub, he should leave (the mosque to take a bath) and should not perform Tayammum

titles.arabic: باب نَفْضِ الْيَدَيْنِ مِنَ الْغُسْلِ عَنِ الْجَنَابَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The removing of water from one's body with one's hands after taking the bath of Janaba

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَدَأَ بِشِقِّ رَأْسِهِ الأَيْمَنِ فِي الْغُسْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Starting from the right side of one's head while taking a bath

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اغْتَسَلَ عُرْيَانًا وَحْدَهُ فِي الْخَلْوَةِ، وَمَنْ تَسَتَّرَ فَالتَّسَتُّرُ أَفْضَلُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whosoever took a bath alone (in seclusion) completely naked

titles.arabic: باب التَّسَتُّرِ فِي الْغُسْلِ عِنْدَ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: To screen oneself from the people while taking a bath

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا احْتَلَمَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: If a woman has a wet dream (nocturnal sexual discharge)

titles.arabic: باب عَرَقِ الْجُنُبِ وَأَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ لاَ يَنْجُسُ
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said regarding) the sweat of a Junub. And a Muslim never becomes impure

titles.arabic: باب الْجُنُبُ يَخْرُجُ وَيَمْشِي فِي السُّوقِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A Junub person) can go out and walk in the market or anywhere else

titles.arabic: باب كَيْنُونَةِ الْجُنُبِ فِي الْبَيْتِ إِذَا تَوَضَّأَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَغْتَسِلَ
titles.english: Chapter: A Junub can stay at home without taking a bath but with ablution

titles.arabic: باب نَوْمِ الْجُنُبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sleeping of a Junub person

titles.arabic: باب الْجُنُبِ يَتَوَضَّأُ ثُمَّ يَنَامُ
titles.english: Chapter: A Junub person should perform ablution before sleeping

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا الْتَقَى الْخِتَانَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: When male and female organs come in close contact (bath becomes compulsory)

titles.arabic: باب غَسْلِ مَا يُصِيبُ مِنْ فَرْجِ الْمَرْأَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Washing away what comes out from the private parts of a woman (woman's discharge) if one gets soiled with that

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ قَذَفَ مَمْلُوكَهُ الْمُكَاتَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of one who falsely accuses his slave of illegal sexual intercourse

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنْ شُرُوطِ الْمُكَاتَبِ، وَمَنِ اشْتَرَطَ شَرْطًا لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Writing of emancipations and conditions

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِعَانَةِ الْمُكَاتَبِ، وَسُؤَالِهِ النَّاسَ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Mukatab is permitted to ask others to help him

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الْمُكَاتَبِ إِذَا رَضِيَ
titles.english: Chapter: The selling of a Mukatab on his agreement

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ الْمُكَاتَبُ اشْتَرِنِي وَأَعْتِقْنِي فَاشْتَرَاهُ لِذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: If a Mukatab slave asks somebody to buy and free him
Chapter: Superiority of giving gifts

titles.arabic: باب الْقَلِيلِ مِنَ الْهِبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Giving a little gift

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَوْهَبَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ شَيْئًا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever asks his friends to grant him a gift

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَسْقَى
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever asks others to give him water

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ هَدِيَّةِ الصَّيْدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The gift of game

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ الْهَدِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Accepting a gift

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ الْهَدِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Accepting a gift

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَهْدَى إِلَى صَاحِبِهِ وَتَحَرَّى بَعْضَ نِسَائِهِ دُونَ بَعْضٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Chosing the to give a gift

titles.arabic: باب مَا لاَ يُرَدُّ مِنَ الْهَدِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Gift should not be rejected

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَأَى الْهِبَةَ الْغَائِبَةَ جَائِزَةً
titles.english: Chapter: To give as a gift, something not present

titles.arabic: باب الْمُكَافَأَةِ فِي الْهِبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Compensation for a gift

titles.arabic: باب الْهِبَةِ لِلْوَلَدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Giving gifts to one's sons

titles.arabic: باب الإِشْهَادِ فِي الْهِبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The witnesses for the gifts

titles.arabic: باب هِبَةِ الرَّجُلِ لاِمْرَأَتِهِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ لِزَوْجِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Giving gifts by a husband to his wife, and by a wife to her husband

titles.arabic: باب هِبَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ لِغَيْرِ زَوْجِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: A woman giving gifts to someone other than husband

titles.arabic: باب بِمَنْ يُبْدَأُ بِالْهَدِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Who is to be given the gift first?

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَقْبَلِ الْهَدِيَّةَ لِعِلَّةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever refused to accept a present

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَهَبَ هِبَةً أَوْ وَعَدَ ثُمَّ مَاتَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَصِلَ إِلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody gives another a present and dies before the gift reaches the other person

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يُقْبَضُ الْعَبْدُ وَالْمَتَاعُ
titles.english: Chapter: To take over the slave and property (given as gift)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَهَبَ هِبَةً فَقَبَضَهَا الآخَرُ، وَلَمْ يَقُلْ قَبِلْتُ
titles.english: Chapter: The receiver taking the gift into his possession

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَهَبَ دَيْنًا عَلَى رَجُلٍ
titles.english: Chapter: If a creditor gives the debt, due to him, as a gift, ...

titles.arabic: باب هِبَةِ الْوَاحِدِ لِلْجَمَاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The giving of a gift by one person to a group

titles.arabic: باب الْهِبَةِ الْمَقْبُوضَةِ وَغَيْرِ الْمَقْبُوضَةِ، وَالْمَقْسُومَةِ وَغَيْرِ الْمَقْسُومَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The received, unreceived, divided and undivided gifts

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَهَبَ جَمَاعَةٌ لِقَوْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: If a group of persons gives a gift to some people

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أُهْدِيَ لَهُ هَدِيَّةٌ وَعِنْدَهُ جُلَسَاؤُهُ فَهْوَ أَحَقُّ
titles.english: Chapter: Whosoever is given a gift while some people are sitting with him, he only has the right to have it

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَهَبَ بَعِيرًا لِرَجُلٍ وَهْوَ رَاكِبُهُ، فَهُوَ جَائِزٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone gives a camel as a gift to a man riding it

titles.arabic: باب هَدِيَّةِ مَا يُكْرَهُ لُبْسُهَا
titles.english: Chapter: A gift of clothes, wearing of which is disliked

titles.arabic: باب قَبُولِ الْهَدِيَّةِ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The acceptance of presents from Al-Mushrikun

titles.arabic: باب الْهَدِيَّةِ لِلْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Giving presents to Al-Mushrikun

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَحِلُّ لأَحَدٍ أَنْ يَرْجِعَ فِي هِبَتِهِ وَصَدَقَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Not to take back presents or Sadaqa

titles.arabic: باب مَا قِيلَ فِي الْعُمْرَى وَالرُّقْبَى
titles.english: Chapter: 'Umra and Ruqba

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَعَارَ مِنَ النَّاسِ الْفَرَسَ
titles.english: Chapter: Borrowing a horse from some people

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِعَارَةِ لِلْعَرُوسِ عِنْدَ الْبِنَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To borrow something for the bride

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْمَنِيحَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of the Maniha

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ أَخْدَمْتُكَ هَذِهِ الْجَارِيَةَ عَلَى مَا يَتَعَارَفُ النَّاسُ فَهْوَ جَائِزٌ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible if somebody says, "I give this slave-girl to you for your service. ..."

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا حَمَلَ رَجُلٌ عَلَى فَرَسٍ فَهْوَ كَالْعُمْرَى وَالصَّدَقَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody gives another person a horse (as a gift)

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي الْبَيِّنَةِ عَلَى الْمُدَّعِي
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding the rule that the plaintiff has to produce a proof

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا عَدَّلَ رَجُلٌ أَحَدًا فَقَالَ لاَ نَعْلَمُ إِلاَّ خَيْرًا
titles.english: Chapter: If a person attests the honouroable record of a witness

titles.arabic: باب شَهَادَةِ الْمُخْتَبِي
titles.english: Chapter: The witness of an eavesdropper

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا شَهِدَ شَاهِدٌ أَوْ شُهُودٌ بِشَيْءٍ فَقَالَ آخَرُونَ مَا عَلِمْنَا ذَلِكَ. يُحْكَمُ بِقَوْلِ مَنْ شَهِدَ
titles.english: Chapter: When a witness or witnesses give an evidence

titles.arabic: بَابُ الشُّهَدَاءِ الْعُدُولِ
titles.english: Chapter: The just witnesses

titles.arabic: باب تَعْدِيلِ كَمْ يَجُوزُ
titles.english: Chapter: How many witnesses are sufficient to attest

titles.arabic: باب الشَّهَادَةِ عَلَى الأَنْسَابِ وَالرَّضَاعِ الْمُسْتَفِيضِ وَالْمَوْتِ الْقَدِيمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To give witness concerning lineage, foster suckling relations and dead persons

titles.arabic: باب شَهَادَةِ الْقَاذِفِ وَالسَّارِقِ وَالزَّانِي
titles.english: Chapter: The witness of a person falsely accusing somebody of illegal sexual intercourse and the witness of a thief or an adulterer

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَشْهَدُ عَلَى شَهَادَةِ جَوْرٍ إِذَا أُشْهِدَ
titles.english: Chapter: Do not be a witness for injustice, if asked for that

titles.arabic: باب مَا قِيلَ فِي شَهَادَةِ الزُّورِ
titles.english: Chapter: False witness

titles.arabic: بَابُ شَهَادَةِ الأَعْمَى، وَأَمْرِهِ وَنِكَاحِهِ وَإِنْكَاحِهِ وَمُبَايَعَتِهِ وَقَبُولِهِ فِي التَّأْذِينِ وَغَيْرِهِ، وَمَا يُعْرَفُ بِالأَصْوَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The witness of a blind man, his marriage, his affairs

titles.arabic: بَابُ شَهَادَةِ النِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The witness of women

titles.arabic: باب شَهَادَةِ الإِمَاءِ وَالْعَبِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The witness of male and female slaves

titles.arabic: باب شَهَادَةِ الْمُرْضِعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The witness of a wet nurse

titles.arabic: باب تَعْدِيلِ النِّسَاءِ بَعْضِهِنَّ بَعْضًا
titles.english: Chapter: The women attesting each other

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا زَكَّى رَجُلٌ رَجُلاً كَفَاهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If only one man attests the conduct of another

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الإِطْنَابِ فِي الْمَدْحِ وَلْيَقُلْ مَا يَعْلَمُ
titles.english: Chapter: One should say only what he knows

titles.arabic: باب بُلُوغِ الصِّبْيَانِ وَشَهَادَتِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The boys attaining the age of puberty and their witness

titles.arabic: باب سُؤَالِ الْحَاكِمِ الْمُدَّعِيَ هَلْ لَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ قَبْلَ الْيَمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: The question of the judge to the plaintiff, "Have you a proof?"

titles.arabic: بَابُ الْيَمِينُ عَلَى الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ، فِي الأَمْوَالِ وَالْحُدُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: The defendant must take an oath

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا ادَّعَى أَوْ قَذَفَ فَلَهُ أَنْ يَلْتَمِسَ الْبَيِّنَةَ، وَيَنْطَلِقَ لِطَلَبِ الْبَيِّنَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone claims something or accuses somebody he should be given respite to get evidence

titles.arabic: باب الْيَمِينِ بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The taking of an oath after the Asr prayer

titles.arabic: باب يَحْلِفُ الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ حَيْثُمَا وَجَبَتْ عَلَيْهِ الْيَمِينُ، وَلاَ يُصْرَفُ مِنْ مَوْضِعٍ إِلَى غَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The defendant has to take an oath wherever it becomes legally compulsory

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا تَسَارَعَ قَوْمٌ فِي الْيَمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: If (some people have to take an oath) and each of them wants to take it first

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah Ta'ala: "Verily, those who purchase a small gain at the cost of Allah's Covenant and their oaths, they shall have no portion in the Hereafter..."

titles.arabic: بَابُ كَيْفَ يُسْتَحْلَفُ
titles.english: Chapter: How to swear?

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَقَامَ الْبَيِّنَةَ بَعْدَ الْيَمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: The proof after (the defendant) has taken the oath

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَمَرَ بِإِنْجَازِ الْوَعْدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever sees that promises should be fulfilled

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُسْأَلُ أَهْلُ الشِّرْكِ عَنِ الشَّهَادَةِ، وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Mushrikun should not be asked to give witness

titles.arabic: بَابُ الْقُرْعَةِ فِي الْمُشْكِلاَتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Drawing lots to solve problems

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الإِصْلاَحِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: What has been said regarding (re)conciliation between the people

titles.arabic: باب لَيْسَ الْكَاذِبُ الَّذِي يُصْلِحُ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: He who makes peace between the people is not a liar

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الإِمَامِ لأَصْحَابِهِ اذْهَبُوا بِنَا نُصْلِحُ
titles.english: Chapter: "Let us go to bring about a (re)conciliation."

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {أَنْ يَصَّالَحَا بَيْنَهُمَا صُلْحًا وَالصُّلْحُ خَيْرٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah azza'wajal: "... If they make terms of peace between themselves; and making peace is better..."

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اصْطَلَحُوا عَلَى صُلْحِ جَوْرٍ فَالصُّلْحُ مَرْدُودٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If some people are (re)conciled on illegal basis, their reconciliation is rejected

titles.arabic: بَابُ كَيْفَ يُكْتَبُ هَذَا مَا صَالَحَ فُلاَنُ بْنُ فُلاَنٍ. وَفُلاَنُ بْنُ فُلاَنٍ وَإِنْ لَمْ يَنْسُبْهُ إِلَى قَبِيلَتِهِ، أَوْ نَسَبِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: How to write (re)conciliation

titles.arabic: باب الصُّلْحِ مَعَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: To make peace with Al-Mushrikun

titles.arabic: باب الصُّلْحِ فِي الدِّيَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Agreement about Diya (blood money)

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلُ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لِلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا: «ابْنِي هَذَا سَيِّدٌ، وَلَعَلَّ اللَّهَ أَنْ يُصْلِحَ بِهِ بَيْنَ فِئَتَيْنِ عَظِيمَتَيْنِ»
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of the Prophet ﷺ to Al-Hasan bin ‘Ali رضي الله عنهما, “This son of mine is Saiyid (a noble) and may Allah make peace between two big groups (of Muslims) through him.”

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُشِيرُ الإِمَامُ بِالصُّلْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: Should the Imam suggest reconciliation?

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الإِصْلاَحِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ وَالْعَدْلِ بَيْنَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The superoirity of making peace and establishing justice among the people

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَشَارَ الإِمَامُ بِالصُّلْحِ فَأَبَى حَكَمَ عَلَيْهِ بِالْحُكْمِ الْبَيِّنِ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Imam (i.ei., ruler) suggests a (re)conciliation

titles.arabic: باب الصُّلْحِ بَيْنَ الْغُرَمَاءِ وَأَصْحَابِ الْمِيرَاثِ وَالْمُجَازَفَةِ فِي ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Reconciliation between the creditors and between the inheritors

titles.arabic: باب الصُّلْحِ بِالدَّيْنِ وَالْعَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Reconciliation in case of dispute concerning debts

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الشُّرُوطِ فِي الإِسْلاَمِ وَالأَحْكَامِ وَالْمُبَايَعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The conditions permissible on embracing Islam, and in contracts and transactions

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَاعَ نَخْلاً قَدْ أُبِّرَتْ
titles.english: Chapter: The sale of pollinated date-palms

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْبَيْعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The conditions of selling

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اشْتَرَطَ الْبَائِعُ ظَهْرَ الدَّابَّةِ إِلَى مَكَانٍ مُسَمًّى جَازَ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible for the seller to ride the (sold) animal up to a certain place

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْمُعَامَلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Conditions in contracts (of share-cropping etc.)

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْمَهْرِ عِنْدَ عُقْدَةِ النِّكَاحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The terms and the conditions of Mahr

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْمُزَارَعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The conditions in share-cropping

titles.arabic: باب مَا لاَ يَجُوزُ مِنَ الشُّرُوطِ فِي النِّكَاحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The conditions not permissible in marriage contracts

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ الَّتِي لاَ تَحِلُّ فِي الْحُدُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: The conditions not permissible in legal punishments

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنْ شُرُوطِ الْمُكَاتَبِ إِذَا رَضِيَ بِالْبَيْعِ عَلَى أَنْ يُعْتَقَ
titles.english: Chapter: The conditions permissible in the case of a slave who has a writing for emancipation

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الطَّلاَقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Conditions concerning divorce

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ مَعَ النَّاسِ بِالْقَوْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Verbal conditions with the people

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْوَلاَءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Conditions for Wala'

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اشْتَرَطَ فِي الْمُزَارَعَةِ إِذَا شِئْتُ أَخْرَجْتُكَ
titles.english: Chapter: If the landlord stipulates that he would terminate the contract whenever he likes

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْجِهَادِ وَالْمُصَالَحَةِ مَعَ أَهْلِ الْحَرْبِ وَكِتَابَةِ الشُّرُوطِ
titles.english: Chapter: The conditions of Jihad and peace treaties

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْقَرْضِ
titles.english: Chapter: Conditions in loans

titles.arabic: باب الْمُكَاتَبِ وَمَا لاَ يَحِلُّ مِنَ الشُّرُوطِ الَّتِي تُخَالِفُ كِتَابَ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Mukatab conditions which contradict Allah's Laws

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الاِشْتِرَاطِ وَالثُّنْيَا فِي الإِقْرَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: What kinds of conditions are permissible; and what is exempted from the decision

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرُوطِ فِي الْوَقْفِ
