titles.arabic: باب تَزْوِيجُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَائِشَةَ وَقُدُومُهَا الْمَدِينَةَ وَبِنَاؤُهُ بِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Marriage of the Prophet (saws) with ‘Aishah رضي الله عنها

titles.arabic: باب هِجْرَةُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَأَصْحَابِهِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The emigration of the Prophet (saws) to Al-Madina

titles.arabic: باب مَقْدَمِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَأَصْحَابِهِ الْمَدِينَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The arrival of the Prophet (saws) at Al-Madina

titles.arabic: باب إِقَامَةِ الْمُهَاجِرِ بِمَكَّةَ بَعْدَ قَضَاءِ نُسُكِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The stay of the emigrants in Makkah after Hajj

titles.arabic: باب التَّارِيخِ مِنْ أَيْنَ أَرَّخُوا التَّارِيخَ
titles.english: Chapter: When did the Muslim calendar start?

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «اللَّهُمَّ أَمْضِ لأَصْحَابِي هِجْرَتَهُمْ». وَمَرْثِيَتِهِ لِمَنْ مَاتَ بِمَكَّةَ
titles.english: Chapter: “O Allah! Complete the emigration of my Companions”

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ آخَى النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بَيْنَ أَصْحَابِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: How the Prophet (saws) established the bond of brotherhood between his
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب إِتْيَانِ الْيَهُودِ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم حِينَ قَدِمَ الْمَدِينَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The coming of the Jews to the Prophet (saws) on his arrival at Al-Madina

titles.arabic: باب إِسْلاَمُ سَلْمَانَ الْفَارِسِيِّ رضى الله عنه
titles.english: Chapter: The conversion of Salman Al-Farisi to Islam رضي الله عنه

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الْعُشَيْرَةِ أَوِ الْعُسَيْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Al-‘Ushaira or Al-usaira

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مَنْ يُقْتَلُ بِبَدْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet’s (saws) prediction about whom he thought would be killed at Badr

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةُ غَزْوَةِ بَدْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The story of the Ghazwa of Badr

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى {إِذْ تَسْتَغِيثُونَ رَبَّكُمْ فَاسْتَجَابَ لَكُمْ أَنِّي مُمِدُّكُمْ بِأَلْفٍ مِنْ الْمَلَائِكَةِ مُرْدِفِينَ وَمَا جَعَلَهُ اللَّهُ إِلاَّ بُشْرَى وَلِتَطْمَئِنَّ بِهِ قُلُوبُكُمْ وَمَا النَّصْرُ إِلاَّ مِنْ عِنْدِ اللَّهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ إِذْ يُغَشِّيكُمُ النُّعَاسَ أَمَنَةً مِنْهُ وَيُنَزِّلُ عَلَيْكُمْ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً لِيُطَهِّرَكُمْ بِهِ وَيُذْهِبَ عَنْكُمْ رِجْزَ الشَّيْطَانِ وَلِيَرْبِطَ عَلَى قُلُوبِكُمْ وَيُثَبِّتَ بِهِ الأَقْدَامَ إِذْ يُوحِي رَبُّكَ إِلَى الْمَلاَئِكَةِ أَنِّي مَعَكُمْ فَثَبِّتُوا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا سَأُلْقِي فِي قُلُوبِ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا الرُّعْبَ فَاضْرِبُوا فَوْقَ الأَعْنَاقِ وَاضْرِبُوا مِنْهُمْ كُلَّ بَنَانٍ ذَلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ شَاقُّوا اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ وَمَنْ يُشَاقِقِ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah تعالى: "(Remember) when you sought help of your Lord and He answered you (saying: 'I will help you with a thousand of the angels each behind the other (following one another) in succession.' Allah made it only as glad tidings, and that your hearts be at rest therewith. And there is no victory except from Allah. Verily, Allah is All-Mighty, All-Wise. (Remember) when He covered you with a slumber as a security from Him, and He caused water (rain) to descend on you from the sky, to clean you thereby and to remove from you the Rijz (whispering, evil-suggestions) of Shaitan (Satan), and to strengthen your hearts, and make your feet firm thereby. (Remember) when your Lord revealed to the angels, 'Verily, I am with you, so keep firm those who have believed. I will cast terror into the hearts of those who have disbelieved, so strike them over the necks, and smite over all their fingers and toes.' This is because they defied and disobeyed Allah and His Messenger. And whoever defies and disobeys Allah and His Messenger, then verily, Allah is Severe in punishment." (V.8:9-13)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب عِدَّةِ أَصْحَابِ بَدْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The number of the warriors of Badr

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاءُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَلَى كُفَّارِ قُرَيْشٍ شَيْبَةَ وَعُتْبَةَ وَالْوَلِيدِ وَأَبِي جَهْلِ بْنِ هِشَامٍ وَهَلَاكِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Invoking evil of the Prophet (saws) on the disbelievers of Quraish and their death

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ أَبِي جَهْلٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The killing of Abu Jahl

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلُ مَنْ شَهِدَ بَدْرًا
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of those who fought the battle of Badr
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب شُهُودِ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ بَدْرًا
titles.english: Chapter: The participation of angels in (the battle) of Badr
Chapter

titles.arabic: بَابُ تَسْمِيةُ مَنْ سُمِّيَ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَدْرٍ فِي الْجَامِعِ الَّذِي وَضَعَهُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَى حُرُوفِ الْمُعْجَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: A list of those who took part in the battle of Badr

titles.arabic: باب حَدِيثِ بَنِي النَّضِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The story of Bani An-Nadir

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلُ كَعْبِ بْنِ الأَشْرَفِ
titles.english: Chapter: The killing of Ka'b bin Al-Ashraf

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلُ أَبِي رَافِعٍ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي الْحُقَيْقِ وَيُقَالُ سَلاَّمُ بْنُ أَبِي الْحُقَيْقِ كَانَ بِخَيْبَرَ، وَيُقَالُ فِي حِصْنٍ لَهُ بِأَرْضِ الْحِجَازِ
titles.english: Chapter: The killing of Abu Rafi’, ‘Abdullah bin Abi Al-Huqaiq and he was also called Salam bin Abi Al-Huqaiq who used to live in Khaybar, and some said that he used to live in his castle in the land of Hijaz

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ أُحُدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Uhud

titles.arabic: باب {‏إِذْ هَمَّتْ طَائِفَتَانِ مِنْكُمْ أَنْ تَفْشَلاَ وَاللَّهُ وَلِيُّهُمَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…but Allah was their Wali.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى {‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ تَوَلَّوْا مِنْكُمْ يَوْمَ الْتَقَى الْجَمْعَانِ إِنَّمَا اسْتَزَلَّهُمُ الشَّيْطَانُ بِبَعْضِ مَا كَسَبُوا وَلَقَدْ عَفَا اللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ حَلِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: “But Allah indeed has forgiven them.”

titles.arabic: باب {‏إِذْ تُصْعِدُونَ وَلاَ تَلْوُونَ عَلَى أَحَدٍ وَالرَّسُولُيَدْعُوكُمْ فِي أُخْرَاكُمْ فَأَثَابَكُمْ غَمًّا بِغَمٍّ لِكَيْلاَ تَحْزَنُوا عَلَى مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلاَ مَا أَصَابَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ خَبِيرٌ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ} ، {تُصْعِدُونَ} تَذْهَبُونَ، أَصْعَدَ وَصَعِدَ فَوْقَ الْبَيْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: “(And remember) when you ran away

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏ثُمَّ أَنْزَلَ عَلَيْكُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِ الْغَمِّ أَمَنَةً نُعَاسًا يَغْشَى طَائِفَةً مِنْكُمْ وَطَائِفَةٌ قَدْ أَهَمَّتْهُمْ أَنْفُسُهُمْ يَظُنُّونَ بِاللَّهِ غَيْرَ الْحَقِّ ظَنَّ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ يَقُولُونَ هَلْ لَنَا مِنَ الأَمْرِ مِنْ شَيْءٍ قُلْ إِنَّ الأَمْرَ كُلَّهُ لِلَّهِ يُخْفُونَ فِي أَنْفُسِهِمْ مَا لاَ يُبْدُونَ لَكَ يَقُولُونَ لَوْ كَانَ لَنَا مِنَ الأَمْرِ شَيْءٌ مَا قُتِلْنَا هَاهُنَا قُلْ لَوْ كُنْتُمْ فِي بُيُوتِكُمْ لَبَرَزَ الَّذِينَ كُتِبَ عَلَيْهِمُ الْقَتْلُ إِلَى مَضَاجِعِهِمْ وَلِيَبْتَلِيَ اللَّهُ مَا فِي صُدُورِكُمْ وَلِيُمَحِّصَ مَا فِي قُلُوبِكُمْ وَاللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Then after the distress, He sent down security for you…”

titles.arabic: باب {‏لَيْسَ لَكَ مِنَ الأَمْرِ شَىْءٌ أَوْ يَتُوبَ عَلَيْهِمْ أَوْ يُعَذِّبَهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ ظَالِمُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Not for you is the decision…”

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ أُمِّ سَلِيطٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Narration regarding Umm Salit

titles.arabic: بَاب قَتْلِ حَمْزَةَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمُطَّلِبِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The martyrdom of Hamza رضي الله عنه

titles.arabic: باب مَا أَصَابَ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الْجِرَاحِ يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The wounds inflicted on the Prophet (saws) on the day (of the battle) of Uhud

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏الَّذِينَ اسْتَجَابُوا لِلَّهِ وَالرَّسُولِ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Those who answered (the Call of) Allah and the Messenger…”

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قُتِلَ مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Muslims who were killed on the day of Uhud

titles.arabic: باب أُحُدٌ يُحِبُّنَا ‏وَنُحِبُّهُ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Uhud is a mountain that loves us and is loved by us.”

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ الرَّجِيعِ وَرِعْلٍ وَذَكْوَانَ وَبِئْرِ مَعُونَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Ar-Raji’, Ri’l, Dhakwan and Bi’r Ma’una and the narration about Khubaib and his companions

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ الْخَنْدَقِ وَهْىَ الأَحْزَابُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Al-Khandaq or Al-Ahzab Battle

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَرْجَعِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مِنَ الأَحْزَابِ وَمَخْرَجِهِ إِلَى بَنِي قُرَيْظَةَ وَمُحَاصَرَتِهِ إِيَّاهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The return of the Prophet (saws) from Ahzab and his going out to Bani Quraiza

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ ذَاتِ الرِّقَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Dhat-ur-Riqa

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ بَنِي الْمُصْطَلِقِ مِنْ خُزَاعَةَ وَهْىَ غَزْوَةُ الْمُرَيْسِيعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ghazwa of Banu Al-Mustaliq or the Ghazwa of Al-Muraisi’

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ أَنْمَارٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Anmar

titles.arabic: باب حَدِيثُ الإِفْكِ
titles.english: Chapter: The narration of Al-Ifk

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الْحُدَيْبِيَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Al-Hudaibiya

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةِ عُكْلٍ وَعُرَيْنَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The story of (the tribes of) ‘Ukl and ‘Uraina

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ ذَاتِ الْقَرَدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ghazwa Dhat-Qarad

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ خَيْبَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Ghazwa of Khaibar

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِعْمَالُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَلَى أَهْلِ خَيْبَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Appointment of a ruler for Khaibar by the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب مُعَامَلَةُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَهْلَ خَيْبَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Prophet’s (saws) dealing with the people of Khaibar

titles.arabic: باب الشَّاةِ الَّتِي سُمَّتْ لِلنَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِخَيْبَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: The sheep which qas poisoned (and presented) to the Prophet (saws) at Khaibar

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ زَيْدِ بْنِ حَارِثَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Zaid bin Haritha

titles.arabic: باب عُمْرَةُ الْقَضَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: ‘'Umra Al-Qada’

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ مُوتَةَ مِنْ أَرْضِ الشَّأْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The expedition of Mu`tah to the land of Syria

titles.arabic: باب بَعْثُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أُسَامَةَ بْنَ زَيْدٍ إِلَى الْحُرَقَاتِ مِنْ جُهَيْنَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The dispatch of Usama bin Zaid to Al-Huraqat

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الْفَتْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ghazwa of Al-Fath

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةِ الْفَتْحِ فِي رَمَضَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Al-Fath during Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب أَيْنَ رَكَزَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم الرَّايَةَ يَوْمَ الْفَتْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: Where did the Prophet (saws) fix the flag on the day of the conquest of Makkah?

titles.arabic: باب دُخُولُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنْ أَعْلَى مَكَّةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The entrance of the Prophet (saws) from the upper part of Makkah

titles.arabic: باب مَنْزِلُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يَوْمَ الْفَتْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The encamping place of the Prophet (saws) on the day of the Conquest (of Makkah)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب مَقَامُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِمَكَّةَ زَمَنَ الْفَتْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The stay of the Prophet (saws) in Makkah
Chapter

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَيَوْمَ حُنَيْنٍ إِذْ أَعْجَبَتْكُمْ كَثْرَتُكُمْ فَلَمْ تُغْنِ عَنْكُمْ شَيْئًا وَضَاقَتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الأَرْضُ بِمَا رَحُبَتْ ثُمَّ وَلَّيْتُمْ مُدْبِرِينَ ثُمَّ أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ سَكِينَتَهُ} إِلَى قَوْلِهِ: {غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…and on the day of Hunain when you rejoiced at your great number….”

titles.arabic: باب غَزَاةِ أَوْطَاسٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Autas

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ الطَّائِفِ فِي شَوَّالٍ سَنَةَ ثَمَانٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of At-Taif

titles.arabic: باب السَّرِيَّةِ الَّتِي قِبَلَ نَجْدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Sariya which was sent towards Najd

titles.arabic: باب بَعْثِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم خَالِدَ بْنَ الْوَلِيدِ إِلَى بَنِي جَذِيمَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Sending Khalid bin Al-Walid to Banu Jadhima

titles.arabic: بَابُ سَرِيَّةُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ حُذَافَةَ السَّهْمِيِّ وَعَلْقَمَةَ بْنِ مُجَزِّزٍ الْمُدْلِجِيِّ
titles.english: Chapter: The Sariya of the Ansar

titles.arabic: باب بَعْثُ أَبِي مُوسَى وَمُعَاذٍ إِلَى الْيَمَنِ قَبْلَ حَجَّةِ الْوَدَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sending Abu Musa and Mu'adh to Yemen

titles.arabic: باب بَعْثُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ـ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ـ وَخَالِدِ بْنِ الْوَلِيدِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ إِلَى الْيَمَنِ قَبْلَ حَجَّةِ الْوَدَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sending 'Ali and Khalid رضي الله عنهما to Yemen

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ ذِي الْخَلَصَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ghazwa Dhul-Khalasa

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ ذَاتِ السَّلاَسِلِ وَهْيَ غَزْوَةُ لَخْمٍ وَجُذَامَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of Dhat-us-Salasil

titles.arabic: باب ذَهَابُ جَرِيرٍ إِلَى الْيَمَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The departure of Jarir to Yemen

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ سِيفِ الْبَحْرِ وَهُمْ يَتَلَقَّوْنَ عِيرًا لِقُرَيْشٍ وَأَمِيرُهُمْ أَبُو عُبَيْدَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Ghazwa of the sea-coast

titles.arabic: باب حَجُّ أَبِي بَكْرٍ بِالنَّاسِ فِي سَنَةِ تِسْعٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hajj in which Abu Bakr led the people

titles.arabic: باب وَفْدُ بَنِي تَمِيمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The delegation of Bani Tamim
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب وَفْدُ عَبْدِ الْقَيْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: The delegation of ‘Abdul-Qais

titles.arabic: باب وَفْدِ بَنِي حَنِيفَةَ، وَحَدِيثِ ثُمَامَةَ بْنِ أُثَالٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The delegation of Banu Hanifa

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةُ الأَسْوَدِ الْعَنْسِيِّ
titles.english: Chapter: The story of Al-Aswad Al-‘Ansi

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةُ أَهْلِ نَجْرَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: The story of the people of Najran (Christians)

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةُ عُمَانَ وَالْبَحْرَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The story of ‘Oman and Al-Bahrain

titles.arabic: باب قُدُومُ الأَشْعَرِيِّينَ وَأَهْلِ الْيَمَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The arrival of Al-Ash’ariyun and the people of Yemen

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةُ دَوْسٍ وَالطُّفَيْلِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو الدَّوْسِيِّ
titles.english: Chapter: The story of Daus and Tufail bin ‘Amr Ad-Dausi

titles.arabic: باب قِصَّةِ وَفْدِ طَيِّئٍ وَحَدِيثِ عَدِيِّ بْنِ حَاتِمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The delegation of Taiy’

titles.arabic: باب حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Hajjat-ul-Wada

titles.arabic: باب غَزْوَةُ تَبُوكَ، وَهْىَ غَزْوَةُ الْعُسْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ghazwa of Tabuk, also called Ghazwa Al-‘Usrah

titles.arabic: باب حَدِيثُ كَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The narration of Ka'b bin Malik

titles.arabic: باب نُزُولُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم الْحِجْرَ
titles.english: Chapter: The dismounting of the Prophet (saws) at Al-Hijr
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب كِتَابِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم إِلَى كِسْرَى وَقَيْصَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: The letter of the Prophet (saws) to Kisra (Khosrau) and Qaiser (Caesar)

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَرَضِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَوَفَاتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sickness of the Prophet (saws) and his death

titles.arabic: باب آخِرِ مَا تَكَلَّمَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: The last statement, the Prophet (saws) spoke

titles.arabic: باب وَفَاةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: The death of the Prophet (saws)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب بَعْثُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أُسَامَةَ بْنَ زَيْدٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ فِي مَرَضِهِ الَّذِيتُوُفِّيَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The dispatch of Usama bin Zaid رضي الله عنهما by the Prophet (saws) during his fatal illness
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب كَمْ غَزَا النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: How many Ghazawat the Prophet (saws) fought

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَاتِحَةِ الْكِتَابِ
titles.english: What has been said about Fãtihat al-Kitab (i.e., the Opening of the Book)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ الضَّالِّينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "...Not (the way) of those who earned Your Anger, nor of those who went astray." (V.1:7)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ ‏ {‏وَعَلَّمَ آدَمَ الأَسْمَاءَ كُلَّهَا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: “And He taught Adam all the names (of everything)..." (V.2:31)

titles.arabic: بَابٌ
باب قَوْلُهُ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏فَلاَ تَجْعَلُوا لِلَّهِ أَنْدَادًا وَأَنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "...Then do not set up rivals unto Allah (in worship) while you know (that He Alone has the right to be worshipped)..." (V.2:22)

titles.arabic: باب وَقَوْلُهُ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ الْغَمَامَ وَأَنْزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَنَّ وَالسَّلْوَى كُلُوا مِنْ طَيِّبَاتِ مَا رَزَقْنَاكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلَكِنْ كَانُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And We shaded with clouds and sent down on you Al-Manna and the quail,... (up to) wronged themselves." (V.2:57)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِذْ قُلْنَا ادْخُلُوا هَذِهِ الْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُوا مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَدًا وَادْخُلُوا الْبَابَ سُجَّدًا وَقُولُوا حِطَّةٌ نَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ خَطَايَاكُمْ وَسَنَزِيدُ الْمُحْسِنِينَ‏}
titles.english: "And (remember) when We said: Enter this town (Jerusalem) and eat bountifully therein with pleasure and delight wherever you wish..." (V.2:58)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ ‏ {‏مَنْ كَانَ عَدُوًّا لِجِبْرِيلَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Whoever is an enemy to Jibril (Gabriel)..." (V.2:97)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏مَا نَنْسَخْ مِنْ آيَةٍ أَوْ نَنْسَأْهَا‏}‏
titles.english: His Statement: "Whatever a Verse (revelation) do We abrogate or cause to be forgotten, We bring a better one or similar to it..." (V.2:106)

titles.arabic: باب {‏وَ قَالُوا اتَّخَذَ اللَّهُ وَلَدًا سُبْحَانَهُ‏}
titles.english: "And they (pagans, Jews and Christians) say: 'Allah has begotten a son (children or offspring).' Glory is to Him.. (V.2:116)

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلُهُ: {وَاتَّخِذُوا مِنْ مَقَامِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ مُصَلًّى}
titles.english: "...And take you (people) the Maqam (place) of Ibrähim (Abraham) (or the stone on which Ibrãhim LiI stood while he was building the Ka'bah) as a place of prayer (for some of your prayers, e.g. two Rak'at after the Tawaf of Ka'bah) . . ." (V.2:125)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَإِذْ يَرْفَعُ إِبْرَاهِيمُ الْقَوَاعِدَ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ وَإِسْمَاعِيلُ رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And (remember) when Ibrãhim (Abraham) and (his son) Isma'il (Ishmael) were raising the foundations of the House (Ka'bah at Makkah) (saying): 'Our Lord! Accept (this service) from us. Verily! You are the All-Hearer, the All-Knower'." (V.2:127)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏قُولُوا آمَنَّا بِاللَّهِ وَمَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْنَا‏} ‏
titles.english: "Say (0 Muslims), We believe in Allah and that which has been sent down to us..." (V.2:136)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏سَيَقُولُ السُّفَهَاءُ مِنَ النَّاسِ مَا وَلاَّهُمْ عَنْ قِبْلَتِهِمُ الَّتِي كَانُوا عَلَيْهَا قُلْ لِلَّهِ الْمَشْرِقُ وَالْمَغْرِبُ يَهْدِي مَنْ يَشَاءُ إِلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "The fools (pagans, hypocrites and Jews) among the people will say, 'What has turned them (Muslims) from their Qiblah [Salat (prayer) direction (towards Jerusalem)]..." (V.2:142)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَكَذَلِكَ جَعَلْنَاكُمْ أُمَّةً وَسَطًا لِتَكُونُوا شُهَدَاءَ عَلَى النَّاسِ وَيَكُونَ الرَّسُولُ عَلَيْكُمْ شَهِيدًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah Jt: "Thus We have made of you [true Muslims— real believers of Islamic Monotheism, true followers of Prophet Muhammad jR and his Sunna (legal ways)], a just (and the best) nation, that you may be witnesses over mankind, and the Messenger (Muhammad ) will be a witness over you..." (V.2:143)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَمَا جَعَلْنَا الْقِبْلَةَ الَّتِي كُنْتَ عَلَيْهَا إِلاَّ لِنَعْلَمَ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الرَّسُولَ مِمَّنْ يَنْقَلِبُ عَلَى عَقِبَيْهِ وَإِنْ كَانَتْ لَكَبِيرَةً إِلاَّ عَلَى الَّذِينَ هَدَى اللَّهُ وَمَا كَانَ اللَّهُ لِيُضِيعَ إِيمَانَكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بِالنَّاسِ لَرَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "...And We made the Qiblah (prayer direction towards Jerusalem) which you used to face, only to test those who followed the Messenger (Muhammad ) . . ." (V.2:143)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏قَدْ نَرَى تَقَلُّبَ وَجْهِكَ فِي السَّمَاءِ‏} ‏ إِلَى ‏{‏يعْمَلُونَ‏}‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "Verily! We have seen the turning of your (Muhammad's ) face towards the heaven..." (V.2:144)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلَئِنْ أَتَيْتَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ بِكُلِّ آيَةٍ مَا تَبِعُوا قِبْلَتَكَ‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِنَّكَ إِذًا لَمِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah J: "And even if you were to bring to the people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians), all the Ayãt (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations,-etc.) they would not follow your Qiblah (prayer direction)..." (V.2:145)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏الَّذِينَ آتَيْنَاهُمُ الْكِتَابَ يَعْرِفُونَهُ كَمَا يَعْرِفُونَ أَبْنَاءَهُمْ وَإِنَّ فَرِيقًا مِنْهُمْ لَيَكْتُمُونَ الْحَقَّ‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏مِنَ الْمُمْتَرِينَ‏}‏
titles.english: "Those to whom We gave the Scripture (Jews and Christians) recognise him (Muhammad or the Ka'bah at Makkah) as they recognise their sons..." (V.2:146).

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏وَلِكُلٍّ وِجْهَةٌ هُوَ مُوَلِّيهَا فَاسْتَبِقُوا الْخَيْرَاتِ أَيْنَمَا تَكُونُوا يَأْتِ بِكُمُ اللَّهُ جَمِيعًا إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ‏}‏
titles.english: "For every nation there is a direction to which they face (in their prayers)..." (V.2:148)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمِنْ حَيْثُ خَرَجْتَ فَوَلِّ وَجْهَكَ شَطْرَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ وَإِنَّهُ لَلْحَقُّ مِنْ رَبِّكَ وَمَا اللَّهُ بِغَافِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ‏} ‏ شَطْرُهُ تِلْقَاؤُهُ‏.‏
titles.english: "And from wheresoever you start forth (for prayers) turn your face in the direction of AI-Masjid-al-Haram (at Makkah)..." (V.2:149)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمِنْ حَيْثُ خَرَجْتَ فَوَلِّ وَجْهَكَ شَطْرَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ وَحَيْثُمَا كُنْتُمْ‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And from wheresoever you start forth (for prayers), turn your face in the direction of Al-Masjid-al-Harãm (at Makkah), and wheresoever you are, turn your face towards it [when you pray)]..." (V.2:150)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِنْ شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ فَمَنْ حَجَّ الْبَيْتَ أَوِ اعْتَمَرَ فَلاَ جُنَاحَ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَطَّوَّفَ بِهِمَا وَمَنْ تَطَوَّعَ خَيْرًا فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ شَاكِرٌ عَلِيمٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "Verily! A-afã and Al-Marwa (two mountains in Makkah) are of the Symbols of Allah..." (V.2:158)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنْ يَتَّخِذُ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ أَنْدَادًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah :"And of mankind are some who take (for worship) others besides Allah as rivals (to Allah). They love them as they love Allah..." (V.2:165)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْقِصَاصُ فِي الْقَتْلَى الْحُرُّ بِالْحُرِّ‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ‏}‏
titles.english: "O you who believe! Al- Qisas (the Law of Equality in punishment) is prescribed for you..." (V.2:178)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ الصِّيَامُ كَمَا كُتِبَ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: “O you who believe! Observing As-Saum (the fasting) is prescribed for you as it was prescribed for those before you that you, may become Al- Muttaqun (V.2:183).

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أَيَّامًا مَعْدُودَاتٍ فَمَنْ كَانَ مِنْكُمْ مَرِيضًا أَوْ عَلَى سَفَرٍ فَعِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَيَّامٍ أُخَرَ وَعَلَى الَّذِينَ يُطِيقُونَهُ فِدْيَةٌ طَعَامُ مِسْكِينٍ فَمَنْ تَطَوَّعَ خَيْرًا فَهُوَ خَيْرٌ لَهُ وَأَنْ تَصُومُوا خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "[Observing Saum (fasts)] for a fixed number of days but if any of you is ill, or on a journey, the same number (should be made up) from other days. And as for those who can fast with difficulty (e.g., an old man, etc.) they have (a choice, either to fast or) to feed a Miskin (poor person) (for every day). But whoever does good of his own accord, it is better for him. And that you fast is better for you, if only you know." (V.2:184)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَمَنْ شَهِدَ مِنْكُمُ الشَّهْرَ فَلْيَصُمْهُ‏} ‏
titles.english: "So whoever of you sights (the crescent on the first night of) the month (of Ramadan, i.e., is present at his home), he must observe Saum (fast) that month... (V.2:185)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏أُحِلَّ لَكُمْ لَيْلَةَ الصِّيَامِ الرَّفَثُ إِلَى نِسَائِكُمْ هُنَّ لِبَاسٌ لَكُمْ وَأَنْتُمْ لِبَاسٌ لَهُنَّ عَلِمَ اللَّهُ أَنَّكُمْ كُنْتُمْ تَخْتَانُونَ أَنْفُسَكُمْ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعَفَا عَنْكُمْ فَالآنَ بَاشِرُوهُنَّ وَابْتَغُوا مَا كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: "It is made lawful for you to have sexual relation with your wives on the night of As-Saum (the fasts) ... (till) ... and seek that which Allah has ordained for you (offspring).. ." (V.2:187)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا حَتَّى يَتَبَيَّنَ لَكُمُ الْخَيْطُ الأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الْخَيْطِ الأَسْوَدِ مِنَ الْفَجْرِ ثُمَّ أَتِمُّوا الصِّيَامَ إِلَى اللَّيْلِ وَلاَ تُبَاشِرُوهُنَّ وَأَنْتُمْ عَاكِفُونَ فِي الْمَسَاجِدِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "...And eat and drink until the white thread (light) of dawn appears to you distinct from the black thread (darkness of the night).. ." (V.2:187)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَلَيْسَ الْبِرُّ بِأَنْ تَأْتُوا الْبُيُوتَ مِنْ ظُهُورِهَا وَلَكِنَّ الْبِرَّ مَنِ اتَّقَى وَأْتُوا الْبُيُوتَ مِنْ أَبْوَابِهَا وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "...It is not A1-Birr (piety, righteousness) that you enter the houses from the back, but A1-Birr (is the quality of the one) who fears Allah." (V.2:189)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَقَاتِلُوهُمْ حَتَّى لاَ تَكُونَ فِتْنَةٌ وَيَكُونَ الدِّينُ لِلَّهِ فَإِنِ انْتَهَوْا فَلاَ عُدْوَانَ إِلاَّ عَلَى الظَّالِمِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "And fight them until there is no more Fitnah (disbelief and worshipping of others along with Allah) and (all and every kind of) worship is for Allah (Alone). But if they cease, let there be no transgression except against Az-Zalimün (the polytheists and wrong-doers) ." (V.2:193)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَأَنْفِقُوا فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَلاَ تُلْقُوا بِأَيْدِيكُمْ إِلَى التَّهْلُكَةِ وَأَحْسِنُوا إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "And spend in the Cause of Allah (i.e., Jihad of all kinds), and do not throw yourselves into destruction (by not spending your wealth in the Cause of Allah), and do good. Truly, Allah loves A1-Muhsinun (the good-doers) ." (V.2:195)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَمَنْ كَانَ مِنْكُمْ مَرِيضًا أَوْ بِهِ أَذًى مِنْ رَأْسِهِ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "And whosoever of you is ill or has an ailment in his scalp..." (V.2:196)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَمَنْ تَمَتَّعَ بِالْعُمْرَةِ إِلَى الْحَجِّ‏} ‏
titles.english: "...And whosoever performs the 'Umra in the months of Hajj before (performing) the Hajj (i.e., Hajj At.Tamattu' and AI-Qiran) ." (V.2:196)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏لَيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ جُنَاحٌ أَنْ تَبْتَغُوا فَضْلاً مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: "There is no sin on you if you ask the Bounty of your Lord (during pilgrimage by trading)..." (V.2:198)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏ثُمَّ أَفِيضُوا مِنْ حَيْثُ أَفَاضَ النَّاسُ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Then depart from the place whence all the people depart..." (V.2:199)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَقُولُ رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And of them there are some who say: 'Our Lord! Give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good...'" (V.2:201)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَهُوَ أَلَدُّ الْخِصَامِ‏}‏
titles.english: "...Yet he is the most quarrelsome of the opponents." (V.2:204)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏أَمْ حَسِبْتُمْ أَنْ تَدْخُلُوا الْجَنَّةَ وَلَمَّا يَأْتِكُمْ مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ خَلَوْا مِنْ قَبْلِكُمْ مَسَّتْهُمُ الْبَأْسَاءُ وَالضَّرَّاءُ‏} ‏ إِلَى ‏{‏قَرِيبٌ‏}‏
titles.english: "Or think you that you will enter Paradise without such (trials) as came to those who passed away before you?" (V.2:214)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏نِسَاؤُكُمْ حَرْثٌ لَكُمْ فَأْتُوا حَرْثَكُمْ أَنَّى شِئْتُمْ وَقَدِّمُوا لأَنْفُسِكُمْ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "Your wives are a tilth for you; so go to your tilth (have sexual relations with your wives in any manner as long as it is in the vagina and not in the anus) when or how you will..." (V.2:223)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِذَا طَلَّقْتُمُ النِّسَاءَ فَبَلَغْنَ أَجَلَهُنَّ فَلاَ تَعْضُلُوهُنَّ أَنْ يَنْكِحْنَ أَزْوَاجَهُنَّ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And when you have divorced women and they have fulfilled the term of their prescribed period, do not prevent them from marrying their (former) husbands..." (V.2:232)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَالَّذِينَ يُتَوَفَّوْنَ مِنْكُمْ وَيَذَرُونَ أَزْوَاجًا يَتَرَبَّصْنَ بِأَنْفُسِهِنَّ أَرْبَعَةَ أَشْهُرٍ وَعَشْرًا‏} ‏ إِلَى ‏ {‏بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And those of you who die and leave wives behind them, they (the wives) shall wait (as regards their marriage) for four months and ten days. Then when they have fulfilled their term, there is no sin on you if they (the wives) dispose of themselves in a just and honourable manner (i.e., they can marry). And Allah is Well-Acquainted with what you do." (V.2:234)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏حَافِظُوا عَلَى الصَّلَوَاتِ وَالصَّلاَةِ الْوُسْطَى‏} ‏
titles.english: "Guard strictly the (five obligatory) A.s-Salawãt (the prayers), especially the middle SaM! (i.e., the best prayer - 'Asr) .. ." (V.2:238)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَقُومُوا لِلَّهِ قَانِتِينَ‏} ‏ مُطِيعِينَ
titles.english: "...And stand before Allah with obedience [and do not speak to others during the Salat (prayers)]” (V.2:238)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏ {‏فَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ فَرِجَالاً أَوْ رُكْبَانًا فَإِذَا أَمِنْتُمْ فَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ كَمَا عَلَّمَكُمْ مَا لَمْ تَكُونُوا تَعْلَمُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "If you fear (an enemy), perform Salãt (prayer) on foot or riding. And when you are in safety..." (V.2:239)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَالَّذِينَ يُتَوَفَّوْنَ مِنْكُمْ وَيَذَرُونَ أَزْوَاجًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "And those of you who die and leave behind wives..." (V.2:240)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ رَبِّ أَرِنِي كَيْفَ تُحْيِي الْمَوْتَى‏} ‏
titles.english: "And (remember) when Ibrãhim (Abraham) said: My Lord! Show me how You give life to the dead..." (V.2:260)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أَيَوَدُّ أَحَدُكُمْ أَنْ تَكُونَ لَهُ جَنَّةٌ‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏تَتَفَكَّرُونَ‏}‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "Would any of you wish to have a garden with date palms and vines ... (till) ... that you may give thought." (V.2:266)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏لاَ يَسْأَلُونَ النَّاسَ إِلْحَافًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "...They do not beg of people at all..." (V.2:273)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَأَحَلَّ اللَّهُ الْبَيْعَ وَحَرَّمَ الرِّبَا‏} ‏
titles.english: "...Whereas Allah has permitted trading and forbidden Riba (usury) (V.2 :275)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يَمْحَقُ اللَّهُ الرِّبَا‏} ‏ يُذْهِبُهُ
titles.english: "Allah will destory Riba (usury) ." (V.2:276)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَأْذَنُوا بِحَرْبٍ‏} ‏ فَاعْلَمُوا
titles.english: "...Then take a notice of war from Allah and His Messenger..." (V.2:279)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِنْ كَانَ ذُو عُسْرَةٍ فَنَظِرَةٌ إِلَى مَيْسَرَةٍ‏} ‏ ‏ {‏وَأَنْ تَصَدَّقُوا خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And if the debtor is in a hard time (has no money), then grant him time till it is easy for him to repay..." (V.2:280)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَاتَّقُوا يَوْمًا تُرْجَعُونَ فِيهِ إِلَى اللَّهِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And be afraid of the Day when you shall be brought back to Allah.. ." (V.2:281)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِنْ تُبْدُوا مَا فِي أَنْفُسِكُمْ أَوْ تُخْفُوهُ يُحَاسِبْكُمْ بِهِ اللَّهُ فَيَغْفِرُ لِمَنْ يَشَاءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَاللَّهُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ‏}‏
titles.english: "And whether you disclose what is in your ownselves or conceal it..." (V.2:284)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ رَبِّهِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "The Messenger (Muhammad ﷺ) believes in what has been sent down to him from his Lord..." (V.2:285)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏مِنْهُ آيَاتٌ مُحْكَمَاتٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: "In it are Verses that are entirely clear." (3:7)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِنِّي أُعِيذُهَا بِكَ وَذُرِّيَّتَهَا مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "...And I seek refuge with You (Allah) for her and her offspring from Shaitan (Satan), the outcast." (V.3:36)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً أُولَئِكَ لاَ خَلاَقَ لَهُمْ‏} ‏ لاَ خَيْرَ
titles.english: "Verily, those who purchase a small gain at the cost of Allah's Covenant and their oaths, they shall have no portion in the Hereafter (Paradise)... (till) ... and they shall have a painful torment." (V.3 -77)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏قُلْ يَا أَهْلَ الْكِتَابِ تَعَالَوْا إِلَى كَلِمَةٍ سَوَاءٍ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمْ أَنْ لاَ نَعْبُدَ إِلاَّ اللَّهَ‏}‏
titles.english: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh), 'O people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians)! Come to a word that is just between us and you, that we worship none but Allah..." (V.3:64)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏لَنْ تَنَالُوا الْبِرَّ حَتَّى تُنْفِقُوا مِمَّا تُحِبُّونَ‏} ‏ إِلَى ‏{‏بِهِ عَلِيمٌ‏}‏
titles.english: "By no means shall you attain Al-Birr (piety, righteousness; it means here Allah's Reward, i.e., Paradise) unless you spend (in Allah's Cause) of that which you love..." (V.3:92)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏قُلْ فَأْتُوا بِالتَّوْرَاةِ فَاتْلُوهَا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ صَادِقِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh): Bring here the Taurāt (Torah) and recite it, if you are truthful." (V.3:93)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏كُنْتُمْ خَيْرَ أُمَّةٍ أُخْرِجَتْ لِلنَّاسِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "You (true believers in Islamic Monotheism, and real followers of Prophet Muḥammad pbuh and his Sunna) are the best of peoples ever raised up for mankind..." (V.3:110)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِذْ هَمَّتْ طَائِفَتَانِ مِنْكُمْ أَنْ تَفْشَلاَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "When two parties from among you were about to lose heart..." (V.3:122)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏لَيْسَ لَكَ مِنَ الأَمْرِ شَىْءٌ‏}‏
titles.english: "Not for you (O Muḥammad pbuh, but for Allah) is the decision.." (V.3:128)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَالرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ فِي أُخْرَاكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "...And the Messenger (Muḥammad pbuh) was in your rear calling you back..." (V3:153)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أَمَنَةً نُعَاسًا‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "...He sent down security for you. Slumber..." (V.3:154)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏الَّذِينَ اسْتَجَابُوا لِلَّهِ وَالرَّسُولِ مِنْ بَعْدِ مَا أَصَابَهُمُ الْقَرْحُ لِلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا مِنْهُمْ وَاتَّقَوْا أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ‏}
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Those who answered (the Call of) Allah and the Messenger (Muḥammad pbuh) after being wounded; for those of them who did good deeds and feared Allah, there is a great reward." (V.3:172)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِنَّ النَّاسَ قَدْ جَمَعُوا لَكُمْ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: His Statement: "Those (i.e., believers) unto whom the people (hypocrites) said, 'Verily the people (Mushrikūn) have gathered against you (a great army), therefore, fear them..."' (V .3:173)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلاَ يَحْسِبَنَّ الَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ بِمَا آتَاهُمُ اللَّهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "And let not those who covetously withhold of that which Allah has bestowed on them of His Bounty .. ." (V.3:180)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلَتَسْمَعُنَّ مِنَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ مِنْ قَبْلِكُمْ وَمِنَ الَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوا أَذًى كَثِيرًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "...And you shall certainly hear much that will grieve you from those who received the Scripture before you (Jews and Christians) and from those who ascribe partners to Allāh.. ." (V.3:186)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏لاَ يَحْسِبَنَّ الَّذِينَ يَفْرَحُونَ بِمَا أَتَوْا‏}‏
titles.english: "Think not that those who rejoice in what they have done (or brought about)..." (V.3:188)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِنَّ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "Verily! In the creation of the heavens and the earth, and in the alternation of night and day, there are indeed signs for men of understanding." (V.3:190)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏الَّذِينَ يَذْكُرُونَ اللَّهَ قِيَامًا وَقُعُودًا وَعَلَى جُنُوبِهِمْ وَيَتَفَكَّرُونَ فِي خَلْقِ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "Those who remember Allāh (always and in prayers), standing, sitting, and lying down on their sides; and think deeply about the creation of the heavens and the earth...." (V.3:191)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ مَنْ تُدْخِلِ النَّارَ فَقَدْ أَخْزَيْتَهُ وَمَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ مِنْ أَنْصَارٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Our Lord! Verily, whom You admit to the Fire, indeed, You have disgraced him and never will the Ẓalimūn (polytheists and wrong-doers) find any helpers." (V.3:192)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا مُنَادِيًا، يُنَادِي لِلإِيمَانِ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "Our Lord! Verily, we have heard the call of one (i.e., Muḥammad pbuh) calling to Faith..." (V.3:193)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏وَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ أَنْ لاَ تُقْسِطُوا فِي الْيَتَامَى‏}‏
titles.english: "And if you fear that you shall not be able to deal justly with the orphan girls..." (V.4:3)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمَنْ كَانَ فَقِيرًا فَلْيَأْكُلْ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ فَإِذَا دَفَعْتُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ أَمْوَالَهُمْ فَأَشْهِدُوا عَلَيْهِمْ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "...But if he (the guardian) is poor, let him have for himself what is just and reasonable (according to his work). And when you release their property to them, take witness in their presence; and Allah is All-Sufficient in taking account." (V.4:6)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِذَا حَضَرَ الْقِسْمَةَ أُولُو الْقُرْبَى وَالْيَتَامَى وَالْمَسَاكِينُ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "And when the relatives and the orphans and the poor are present at the time of division..." (V.4:8)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يُوصِيكُمُ اللَّهُ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Allah commands you as regards your children's (inheritance)..." (V.4:11)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلَكُمْ نِصْفُ مَا تَرَكَ أَزْوَاجُكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement "In that which your wives leave, your share is a half..." (V.4:12)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏لاَ يَحِلُّ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَرِثُوا النِّسَاءَ كَرْهًا‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "...You are forbidden to inherit women against their will, and you should not treat them with harshness, that you may take back part of the Mahr (bridal money given by the husband to his wife at the time of marriage) you have given them..." (V.4:19)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلِكُلٍّ جَعَلْنَا مَوَالِيَ مِمَّا تَرَكَ الْوَالِدَانِ وَالأَقْرَبُونَ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "And to everyone, We have appointed heirs of that (property) left by parents and relatives. To those, also, with whom you have made a pledge (brotherhood), give them their due portion [by Wasiya (wills)]. Truly, Allah is Ever a Witness over all things." (V.4:33)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِنَّ اللَّهَ لاَ يَظْلِمُ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ‏} ‏ يَعْنِي زِنَةَ ذَرَّةٍ
titles.english: "Surely! Allah wrongs not even of the weight of an atom (or a small ant)..." (V.4:40)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَكَيْفَ إِذَا جِئْنَا مِنْ كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ بِشَهِيدٍ وَجِئْنَا بِكَ عَلَى هَؤُلاَءِ شَهِيدًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "How (will it be) then when We bring from each nation a witness and We bring you (O Muhammad) as a witness against these people?" (V.4:41)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَإِنْ كُنْتُمْ مَرْضَى أَوْ عَلَى سَفَرٍ أَوْ جَاءَ أَحَدٌ مِنْكُمْ مِنَ الْغَائِطِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "...And if you are ill, or on a journey, or one of you comes after answering the call of nature..." (V.4:43)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏أَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ وَأُولِي الْأَمْرِ مِنكُمْ} ‏ ذَوِي الأَمْرِ
titles.english: "Obey Allah and obey the Messenger (Muhammad ﷺ ) and those of you (Muslims) who are in authority..." (V.4:59)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَلاَ وَرَبِّكَ لاَ يُؤْمِنُونَ حَتَّى يُحَكِّمُوكَ فِيمَا شَجَرَ بَيْنَهُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: "But no, by your Lord, they can have no Faith, until they make you (Muhammad ﷺ ) judge in all disputes between them..." (V.4:65)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَأُولَئِكَ مَعَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ النَّبِيِّينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "...Then they will be in the company of those on whom A11ah has bestowed His Grace, of the Prophets..." (V.4:69)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ ‏ {‏وَمَا لَكُمْ لاَ تُقَاتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ‏} ‏ إِلَى ‏ {‏الظَّالِمِ أَهْلُهَا‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement "And what is wrong with you that you fight not in the Cause of Allah... (till) ... whose people are oppressors..." (V.4:75)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَمَا لَكُمْ فِي الْمُنَافِقِينَ فِئَتَيْنِ وَاللَّهُ أَرْكَسَهُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Then what is the matter with you that you are divided into two parties about the hypocrites? Allah has cast them back (to disbelief) because of what they have earned..." (V.4:88)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمَنْ يَقْتُلْ مُؤْمِنًا مُتَعَمِّدًا فَجَزَاؤُهُ جَهَنَّمُ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And whoever kills a believer intentionally, his recompense is Hell..." (V.4:93)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلاَ تَقُولُوا لِمَنْ أَلْقَى إِلَيْكُمُ السَّلاَمَ لَسْتَ مُؤْمِنًا‏} ‏ السِّلْمُ وَالسَّلَمُ وَالسَّلاَمُ وَاحِدٌ‏.‏
titles.english: "And say not to anyone who greets you (by embracing Islam), 'You are not a believer..." (V.4:94)

titles.arabic: باب {لاَ يَسْتَوِي الْقَاعِدُونَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُجَاهِدُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ}
titles.english: "Not equal are those of the believers who sit (at home)..." (V.4:95)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ تَوَفَّاهُمُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ ظَالِمِي أَنْفُسِهِمْ قَالُوا فِيمَ كُنْتُمْ قَالُوا كُنَّا مُسْتَضْعَفِينَ فِي الأَرْضِ قَالُوا أَلَمْ تَكُنْ أَرْضُ اللَّهِ وَاسِعَةً فَتُهَاجِرُوا فِيهَا‏} ‏ الآيَةَ‏.‏
titles.english: "Verily! As for those whom the angels take (in death) while they are wronging themselves (as they stayed among the disbelievers even though emigration was obligatory for them), they (angels) say (to them): In what (condition) were you?..."(V.4:97)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏إِلاَّ الْمُسْتَضْعَفِينَ مِنَ الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ وَالْوِلْدَانِ لاَ يَسْتَطِيعُونَ حِيلَةً وَلاَ يَهْتَدُونَ سَبِيلاً‏}‏
titles.english: "Except the weak ones among men, women..." (V.4:98)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَأُولَئِكَ عَسَى اللَّهُ أَنْ يَعْفُوَ عَنْهُمْ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ عَفُوًّا غَفُورًا ‏} ‏
titles.english: "These are they whom Allah is likely to forgive them..." (V.4:99)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلاَ جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنْ كَانَ بِكُمْ أَذًى مِنْ مَطَرٍ أَوْ كُنْتُمْ مَرْضَى أَنْ تَضَعُوا أَسْلِحَتَكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: "But there is no sin on you if you put away your arms because of the inconvenience of rain…" (V.4:102)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَيَسْتَفْتُونَكَ فِي النِّسَاءِ قُلِ اللَّهُ يُفْتِيكُمْ فِيهِنَّ وَمَا يُتْلَى عَلَيْكُمْ فِي الْكِتَابِ فِي يَتَامَى النِّسَاءِ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "They ask your legal instruction concerning women, say: Allah instructs you about them, and about what is recited unto you in the Book concerning orphan girls.. ." (V.4:127)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِنِ امْرَأَةٌ خَافَتْ مِنْ بَعْلِهَا نُشُوزًا أَوْ إِعْرَاضًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "If a woman fears cruelty or desertion on her husband's part..." (V.4:128)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ فِي الدَّرَكِ الأَسْفَلِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Verily, the hypocrites will be in the lowest depths (grade) of the Fire..." (V.4:145)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏إِنَّا أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْكَ‏}‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَيُونُسَ وَهَارُونَ وَسُلَيْمَانَ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "Verily, We have sent revelation to you, (O Muhammad ﷺ ) ... (till) ... as We sent revelation to Nuh (Noah) and Yunus (Jonah), Hãrün (Aaron) and Sulaimãn (Solomon)..." (V.4:163)

titles.arabic: باب {‏يَسْتَفْتُونَكَ قُلِ اللَّهُ يُفْتِيكُمْ فِي الْكَلاَلَةِ إِنِ امْرُؤٌ هَلَكَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَلَدٌ وَلَهُ أُخْتٌ فَلَهَا نِصْفُ مَا تَرَكَ وَهُوَ يَرِثُهَا إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا وَلَدٌ‏}
titles.english: "They ask you for a legal verdict. Say: 'Allah directs (thus) about Al-Kalal,a (those who leave neither descendants nor ascendants as heirs). If it is a man that dies, leaving a sister, but no child, she shall have half the inheritance. If (such a deceased was) a woman who left no child, her brother takes her inheritance..." (V.4:176)
"[Game (also) being unlawful] when you assume Ihrãm for Hail or Umra (pilgrimage)"... (V.5:1) "So, because of their breach of their covenant "... (V.5 :13)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏الْيَوْمَ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمْ دِينَكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "This day, I have perfected your religion for you..." (V.5:3)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَلَمْ تَجِدُوا مَاءً فَتَيَمَّمُوا صَعِيدًا طَيِّبًا‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "...And you find no water, then perform Tayammum with clean earth..." (V.5:6)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَاذْهَبْ أَنْتَ وَرَبُّكَ فَقَاتِلاَ إِنَّا هَا هُنَا قَاعِدُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah:"...So go you and your Lord and fight you two, we are sitting right here." (V.5:24)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِنَّمَا جَزَاءُ الَّذِينَ يُحَارِبُونَ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ وَيَسْعَوْنَ فِي الأَرْضِ فَسَادًا أَنْ يُقَتَّلُوا أَوْ يُصَلَّبُوا‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أَوْ يُنْفَوْا مِنَ الأَرْضِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "The recompense of those who wage war against Allah and His Messenger, and do mischief in the land is only that they shall be killed or crucified or their hands and feet be cut off from opposite sides..." (V.5:33)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَالْجُرُوحَ قِصَاصٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "...And wounds, equal for equal (A1-Qisas i.e., the law of equality in punishment)..." (V.5:45)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يَا أَيُّهَا الرَّسُولُ بَلِّغْ مَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ رَبِّكَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "O Messenger (Muhammad ﷺ)! Proclaim (the Message) which has been sent down to you from your Lord..." (V.5:67)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏لاَ يُؤَاخِذُكُمُ اللَّهُ بِاللَّغْوِ فِي أَيْمَانِكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "Allah will not punish you for what is unintentional in your oaths..." (V.5:89)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏لاَ تُحَرِّمُوا طَيِّبَاتِ مَا أَحَلَّ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "O you who believe! Make not unlawful the Tayyibãt (all that is good as regards foods, things, deeds, beliefs, persons) which Allah has made lawful to you..." (V.5:87)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِنَّمَا الْخَمْرُ وَالْمَيْسِرُ وَالأَنْصَابُ وَالأَزْلاَمُ رِجْسٌ مِنْ عَمَلِ الشَّيْطَانِ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "Intoxicants (all kinds of alcoholic drinks), gambling, Al-Ansab and Al-AzIam (arrows for seeking luck or a decision) are an abomination of Satan's handiwork..." (V.5:90)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏لَيْسَ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ جُنَاحٌ فِيمَا طَعِمُوا‏}‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَاللَّهُ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Those who believe and do righteous good deeds, there is no sin on them for what they ate (in the past)..." (V.5:93)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏لاَ تَسْأَلُوا عَنْ أَشْيَاءَ، إِنْ تُبْدَ لَكُمْ تَسُؤْكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "...Ask not about things which, if made plain to you, may cause you trouble..." (V.5:101)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏مَا جَعَلَ اللَّهُ مِنْ بَحِيرَةٍ وَلاَ سَائِبَةٍ وَلاَ وَصِيلَةٍ وَلاَ حَامٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: 'Allah has not instituted things like Bahirah or a Sã'ibah, or a Wasilah or a Ham..." (V.5:103)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏وَكُنْتُ عَلَيْهِمْ شَهِيدًا مَا دُمْتُ فِيهِمْ فَلَمَّا تَوَفَّيْتَنِي كُنْتَ أَنْتَ الرَّقِيبَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَأَنْتَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ‏}‏
titles.english: "And I was a witness over them while I dwelt amongst them; but when You took me up, You were the Watcher over them, and You are a Witness to all things." (V.5:117)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِنْ تُعَذِّبْهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ عِبَادُكَ وَإِنْ تَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ فَإِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "If You punish them, they are Your slaves."(V.5:118)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَعِنْدَهُ مَفَاتِحُ الْغَيْبِ لاَ يَعْلَمُهَا إِلاَّ هُوَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And With Him are the keys of the Ghaib, (all that is hidden), none knows them but He..." (V.6:59)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏قُلْ هُوَ الْقَادِرُ عَلَى أَنْ يَبْعَثَ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابًا مِنْ فَوْقِكُمْ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "Say: He has power to send torment on you from above..." (V.6:65)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلَمْ يَلْبِسُوا إِيمَانَهُمْ بِظُلْمٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: "It is those who believe (in the Oneness of Allah and worship none but Him Alone) and confuse not their belief with Zuim (wrong i.e., by worshipping others besides Allah).. ." (V.6:82)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَيُونُسَ وَلُوطًا وَكُلاًّ فَضَّلْنَا عَلَى الْعَالَمِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "...And Yünus (Jonah) and Lut (Lot), and each one of them We preferred above Al-Alamin (mankind and jinn) (of their times)" (V.6:86)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ هَدَى اللَّهُ فَبِهُدَاهُمُ اقْتَدِهْ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "They are those whom Allah had guided. So, follow their guidance..." (V.6:90)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَعَلَى الَّذِينَ هَادُوا حَرَّمْنَا كُلَّ ذِي ظُفُرٍ وَمِنَ الْبَقَرِ وَالْغَنَمِ حَرَّمْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ شُحُومَهُمَا‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "And unto those who are Jews, We forbade every (animal) with undivided hoof..." (V.6:146)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَلاَ تَقْرَبُوا الْفَوَاحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "...Come not near to Al-Fawahish (shameful sins, illegal sexual intercourse), whether committed openly or secretly..." (V.6:151)

titles.arabic: بَابُ وَكِيلٌ حَفِيظٌ وَمُحِيطٌ بِهِ
بَابُ قَوْلِهِ: {هَلُمَّ شُهَدَاءَكُمُ}:
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Say: 'Bring forward your witnesses..." (V.6:150)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏لاَ يَنْفَعُ نَفْسًا إِيمَانُهَا‏} ‏
titles.english: "The day that some of the signs of your Lord do come, no good will it do to a person to believe..." (V.6:158)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏ {‏قُلْ إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ رَبِّيَ الْفَوَاحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Say (O Muhammad ﷺ): '(But) the things that my Lord has indeed forbidden are Al-Fawãhish (great evil sins, every kind of unlawful sexual intercourse) whether committed openly or secretly."' (V.7:33)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلَمَّا جَاءَ مُوسَى لِمِيقَاتِنَا وَكَلَّمَهُ رَبُّهُ قَالَ رَبِّ أَرِنِي أَنْظُرْ إِلَيْكَ قَالَ لَنْ تَرَانِي وَلَكِنِ انْظُرْ إِلَى الْجَبَلِ فَإِنِ اسْتَقَرَّ مَكَانَهُ فَسَوْفَ تَرَانِي فَلَمَّا تَجَلَّى رَبُّهُ لِلْجَبَلِ جَعَلَهُ دَكًّا وَخَرَّ مُوسَى صَعِقًا فَلَمَّا أَفَاقَ قَالَ سُبْحَانَكَ تُبْتُ إِلَيْكَ وَأَنَا أَوَّلُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And when Musa (Moses) came at the time and place appointed by Us, and his Lord (Allah) spoke to him, he said, 'O my Lord! Show me (Yourself) that I may look upon You." (V.7:143)

titles.arabic: {‏قُلْ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنِّي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ جَمِيعًا الَّذِي لَهُ مُلْكُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ فَآمِنُوا بِاللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ النَّبِيِّ الأُمِّيِّ الَّذِي يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَكَلِمَاتِهِ وَاتَّبِعُوهُ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ‏}
titles.english: "Say (O Muhammad ﷺ : 'O mankind. Verily, I am sent to you all as the Messenger of Allah - to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Lailaha ilIa Huwa (none has the right to be worshipped but He). It is He Who gives life and causes death. So believe in Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad ﷺ,), the Prophet who can neither read nor write (i.e., Muhammad ﷺ) ,who believes in Allah and His Words [(this Qur'an), the Taurat (Torah) and the Injeel (Gpspel) and also Allah's Word: "Be! - and he was, i.e., 'Isa (Jesus) son of Maryam (Mary) ;and follow him so that you may be guided." (V.7:158)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏وَقُولُوا حِطَّةٌ‏}‏
titles.english: Allah's Saying: "And say ... Hittatun..." [i.e., (O Allah) forgive our sins] (V.7:161)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏خُذِ الْعَفْوَ وَأْمُرْ بِالْعُرْفِ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ الْجَاهِلِينَ‏} ‏ الْعُرْفُ: الْمَعْرُوفُ
titles.english: "Show forgiveness, enjoin what is good, and turn away from the foolish (i.e., don't punish them)." (V.7:199)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ ‏ {‏يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الأَنْفَالِ، قُلِ الأَنْفَالُ لِلَّهِ وَالرَّسُولِ فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَأَصْلِحُوا ذَاتَ بَيْنِكُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "They ask you (O Muhammad ﷺ) about Al-Anfal (the spoils of war). Say: 'The spoils are for Allah and the Messenger ﷺ.' So fear Allah and adjust all matters of difference among you..." (V.8:1)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏إِنَّ شَرَّ الدَّوَابِّ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ الصُّمُّ الْبُكْمُ الَّذِينَ لاَ يَعْقِلُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Verily! The worst of (moving) living creatures with Allah are the deaf and the dumb, those who understand not (i.e., the disbelievers) ." (V.8:22) (1 م)

titles.arabic: ‏ {‏يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اسْتَجِيبُوا لِلَّهِ وَلِلرَّسُولِ إِذَا دَعَاكُمْ لِمَا يُحْيِيكُمْ وَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّ اللَّهَ يَحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ وَأَنَّهُ إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "O you who believe! Answer Allah (by obeying Him) and (His) Messenger when he () calls you to that which will give you life, and know that Allah comes in between a man and his heart (i.e., He prevents an evil person to decide anything). And verily, to Him you shall (all) be gathered." (V.8:24)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَإِذْ قَالُوا اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كَانَ هَذَا هُوَ الْحَقَّ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ فَأَمْطِرْ عَلَيْنَا حِجَارَةً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ أَوِ ائْتِنَا بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "And (remember) when they said, 'O Allah! If this (the Qur'an) is indeed the truth (revealed) from You, then rain down stones on us..." (V.8:32)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمَا كَانَ اللَّهُ لِيُعَذِّبَهُمْ وَأَنْتَ فِيهِمْ وَمَا كَانَ اللَّهُ مُعَذِّبَهُمْ وَهُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "And Allah would not punish them while you (Muhammad ﷺ) are amongst them, nor will He punish them while they seek (Allah's) forgiveness." (V.8:33)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَقَاتِلُوهُمْ حَتَّى لاَ تَكُونَ فِتْنَةٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And fight them until there is no more Fitnah (disbelief and polytheism, i.e., worshipping others besides Allah) and the religion (worship) will be all for Allah (Alone) (in the whole of the world)..." (V.8:39)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ حَرِّضِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَى الْقِتَالِ إِنْ يَكُنْ مِنْكُمْ عِشْرُونَ صَابِرُونَ يَغْلِبُوا مِائَتَيْنِ وَإِنْ يَكُنْ مِنْكُمْ مِائَةٌ يَغْلِبُوا أَلْفًا مِنَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لاَ يَفْقَهُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "0 Prophet (Muhammad ﷺ)! Urge the believers to fight..." (V.8:65)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏الآنَ خَفَّفَ اللَّهُ عَنْكُمْ وَعَلِمَ أَنَّ فِيكُمْ ضُعْفًا‏} ‏ الآيَةَ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏وَاللَّهُ مَعَ الصَّابِرِينَ‏}‏
titles.english: "Now that Allah has lightened your (task), for He knows that there is weakness in you..." (V.8:66)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏بَرَاءَةٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ إِلَى الَّذِينَ عَاهَدْتُمْ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "Freedom from (all) obligations (is declared) from Allah and His Messenger ﷺ to those of the Mushrikin [polytheists, pagans, idolaters, disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah and in His Messenger Muhammad ﷺ] with whom you made a treaty." (V.9:1)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَسِيحُوا فِي الأَرْضِ أَرْبَعَةَ أَشْهُرٍ وَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّكُمْ غَيْرُ مُعْجِزِي اللَّهِ وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ مُخْزِي الْكَافِرِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "So travel freely (O Mushrikün) for four months (as you will) throughout the land, but know that you cannot escape (from the punishment of) Allah, and Allah will disgrace the disbelievers." (V.9:2)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَأَذَانٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ إِلَى النَّاسِ يَوْمَ الْحَجِّ الأَكْبَرِ أَنَّ اللَّهَ بَرِيءٌ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ وَرَسُولُهُ فَإِنْ تُبْتُمْ فَهُوَ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ وَإِنْ تَوَلَّيْتُمْ فَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّكُمْ غَيْرُ مُعْجِزِي اللَّهِ وَبَشِّرِ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: Allah's Statement: "And a declaration from Allah and His Messenger... (up to)... Mushrikün ." (V.9:3)

titles.arabic: ‏باب {‏إِلاَّ الَّذِينَ عَاهَدْتُمْ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Except those of the Mushrikün [polytheists, pagans, idolaters, and disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah and in His Messenger Muhammad ﷺ] with whom you (Muslims) have a treaty..." (V.9:4)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏فَقَاتِلُوا أَئِمَّةَ الْكُفْرِ إِنَّهُمْ لاَ أَيْمَانَ لَهُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Fight you the leaders of disbelief (chiefs of Quraish - Mushrikün of Makkah) for surely their oaths are nothing to them..." (V.9:12)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَالَّذِينَ يَكْنِزُونَ الذَّهَبَ وَالْفِضَّةَ وَلاَ يُنْفِقُونَهَا فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ فَبَشِّرْهُمْ بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "...And those who hoard up gold and silver (AI-Kanz—the money, the Zakãt of which has not been paid) and spend it not in the Way of Allah—announce to them a painful torment." (V.9:34)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏ {‏يَوْمَ يُحْمَى عَلَيْهَا فِي نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ فَتُكْوَى بِهَا جِبَاهُهُمْ وَجُنُوبُهُمْ وَظُهُورُهُمْ هَذَا مَا كَنَزْتُمْ لأَنْفُسِكُمْ فَذُوقُوا مَا كُنْتُمْ تَكْنِزُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "On the Day when that (Al-Kanz—money gold and silver, etc., the Zakät of which has not been paid) will be heated in the fire of Hell, and with it will be branded their foreheads…" (V.9:35)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِنَّ عِدَّةَ الشُّهُورِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ اثْنَا عَشَرَ شَهْرًا فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ يَوْمَ خَلَقَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ مِنْهَا أَرْبَعَةٌ حُرُمٌ‏} ‏ ‏{‏الْقَيِّمُ‏}‏ هُوَ الْقَائِمُ‏.‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Verily, the number of months with Allah is twelve months (in a year) so was it ordained by Allah on the Day when He created the heavens and the earth; of them four are sacred, (i.e., the 1st, the 7th, the 11th, and the 12th months of the Islamic calendar). That is the right religion; so wrong not yourself therein.. ." (V.9:36)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏ثَانِيَ اثْنَيْنِ إِذْ هُمَا فِي الْغَارِ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: “...The second of two, when they (Muhammad ﷺ and Abü Bakr were in the cave, and he ﷺ said to his companion (Abu Bakr ) ‘Be not sad (or afraid), surely Allah is with us.'" (V.9:40)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَالْمُؤَلَّفَةِ قُلُوبُهُمْ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "...And (for) to attract the hearts of those who have been inclined (towards Islam) ; and to free the captives..." (V.9:60)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏الَّذِينَ يَلْمِزُونَ الْمُطَّوِّعِينَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "Those who defame such of the believers who give charity (in Allah's Cause) voluntarily..." (V.9:79)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏اسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ أَوْ لاَ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ إِنْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ سَبْعِينَ مَرَّةً‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah 'Whether you (O Muhammad ﷺ ask forgiveness for them (hypocrites) or ask not forgiveness for them - (and even) if you ask seventy times for their forgiveness – Allah will not forgive them..." (V.9:80)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَلاَ تُصَلِّ عَلَى أَحَدٍ مِنْهُمْ مَاتَ أَبَدًا وَلاَ تَقُمْ عَلَى قَبْرِهِ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: 'And never (O Muhammad ﷺ ) pray (funeral prayer) for any of them (hypocrites) who dies, nor stand at his grave." (V.9:84)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏سَيَحْلِفُونَ بِاللَّهِ لَكُمْ إِذَا انْقَلَبْتُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لِتُعْرِضُوا عَنْهُمْ فَأَعْرِضُوا عَنْهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ رِجْسٌ وَمَأْوَاهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ جَزَاءً بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "They will swear by Allah to you (Muslims) when you return to them, that you may turn away from them..." (V.9:95)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَآخَرُونَ اعْتَرَفُوا بِذُنُوبِهِمْ خَلَطُوا عَمَلاً صَالِحًا وَآخَرَ سَيِّئًا عَسَى اللَّهُ أَنْ يَتُوبَ عَلَيْهِمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "And (there are) others who have acknowledged their sins..." (V.9:102)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏مَا كَانَ لِلنَّبِيِّ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَنْ يَسْتَغْفِرُوا لِلْمُشْرِكِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "It is not (proper) for the Prophet (ﷺ) and those who believe to ask for Allah's forgiveness for the Mushrikun [polytheists, pagans, idolaters, and disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah and in His Messenger Muhammad ﷺ] . . ."(V.9 :113)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏لَقَدْ تَابَ اللَّهُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ وَالْمُهَاجِرِينَ وَالأَنْصَارِ الَّذِينَ اتَّبَعُوهُ فِي سَاعَةِ الْعُسْرَةِ مِنْ بَعْدِ مَا كَادَ يَزِيغُ قُلُوبُ فَرِيقٍ مِنْهُمْ ثُمَّ تَابَ عَلَيْهِمْ إِنَّهُ بِهِمْ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "Allah has forgiven the Prophet, the Muhãjirun and the Ansãr...' (V.9:117)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَعَلَى الثَّلاَثَةِ الَّذِينَ خُلِّفُوا حَتَّى إِذَا ضَاقَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ الأَرْضُ بِمَا رَحُبَتْ وَضَاقَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ أَنْفُسُهُمْ وَظَنُّوا أَنْ لاَ مَلْجَأَ مِنَ اللَّهِ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ ثُمَّ تَابَ عَلَيْهِمْ لِيَتُوبُوا إِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ‏} ‏
titles.english: And (He did forgive also) the three [who did not join the Tabuk expedition] till for them the earth, vast as it is, was straitened..." (V.9:118)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَكُونُوا مَعَ الصَّادِقِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "O you who believe! Be afraid of Allah, and be with those who are true (in words and deeds) ." (V.9:119)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏لَقَدْ جَاءَكُمْ رَسُولٌ مِنْ أَنْفُسِكُمْ عَزِيزٌ عَلَيْهِ مَا عَنِتُّمْ حَرِيصٌ عَلَيْكُمْ بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ‏} ‏ مِنَ الرَّأْفَةِ
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "Verily, there has come unto you a Messenger (Muhammad ﷺ) from amongst yourselves (i.e., whom you know well). It grieves him that you should receive any injury or difficulty..." (V.9:128)

titles.arabic: بَابٌ

باب ‏ {‏وَجَاوَزْنَا بِبَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ الْبَحْرَ فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ وَجُنُودُهُ بَغْيًا وَعَدْوًا حَتَّى إِذَا أَدْرَكَهُ الْغَرَقُ قَالَ آمَنْتُ أَنَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ الَّذِي آمَنَتْ بِهِ بَنُو إِسْرَائِيلَ وَأَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And We took the Children of Israel across the sea, and Fir'aun (Pharaoh) and his hosts followed them in oppression and enmity, till when the drowning overtook him, he said, 'I believe that La ilaha jib (Huwa) (none has the right to be worshipped but) He (Allah), in Whom the Children of IsrAel believe, and I am one of the Muslims (those who submit to Allah's Will)." (V.10:90)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏أَلاَ إِنَّهُمْ يَثْنُونَ صُدُورَهُمْ لِيَسْتَخْفُوا مِنْهُ أَلاَ حِينَ يَسْتَغْشُونَ ثِيَابَهُمْ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ إِنَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُور‏} ‏
titles.english: "No doubt! They did fold up their breasts, that they may hide from Him. Surely, even when they cover themselves with their garments, He knows what they conceal and what they reveal. Verily, He is the All-Knower of the (innermost secrets) of the breasts." (V.11:5)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَكَانَ عَرْشُهُ عَلَى الْمَاءِ‏}
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "...And His Throne was on the water..." (V.11:7)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِلَى مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًا‏}
titles.english: "And to the Madyan (Midian) people (We sent) their brother Shu'aib." (11:84)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَيَقُولُ الأَشْهَادُ هَؤُلاَءِ الَّذِينَ كَذَبُوا عَلَى رَبِّهِمْ أَلاَ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ عَلَى الظَّالِمِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah:"...The witnesses will say, 'These are the ones who lied..." (V.11:18)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَكَذَلِكَ أَخْذُ رَبِّكَ إِذَا أَخَذَ الْقُرَى وَهِيَ ظَالِمَةٌ إِنَّ أَخْذَهُ أَلِيمٌ شَدِيدٌ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Such is the Seizure of your Lord when He seizes the (population of) towns while they are doing wrong. Verily, His Seizure is painful and severe." (V.11:102)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏وَأَقِمِ الصَّلاَةَ طَرَفَىِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِنَ اللَّيْلِ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ ذَلِكَ ذِكْرَى لِلذَّاكِرِينَ‏}‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "And perform As-Salat (Iqa ma as-SaIãt)" at the two ends of the day, and in some hours of the night; [i.e ., five compulsory Salãt (prayers)]. Verily, the good deeds remove the evil deeds (small sins)…" ('V.11 :114)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَيُتِمُّ نِعْمَتَهُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَى آلِ يَعْقُوبَ كَمَا أَتَمَّهَا عَلَى أَبَوَيْكَ مِنْ قَبْلُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَإِسْحَاقَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "...and perfect His Favour on you and on the offspring of Ya'qub (Jacob)..." (V.12:6)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏لَقَدْ كَانَ فِي يُوسُفَ وَإِخْوَتِهِ آيَاتٌ لِلسَّائِلِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Verily, in Yusuf (Joseph) and his brethren, there were Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) for those who ask." (V.12:7)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏قَالَ بَلْ سَوَّلَتْ لَكُمْ أَنْفُسُكُمْ أَمْرًا‏} ‏ ‏{‏سَوَّلَتْ‏}‏ زَيَّنَتْ
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "He said, 'Nay, but your ownselves have made up a tale. So (for me), patience is most fitting. And it is Allah (Alone) Whose help can be sought against that (lie) which you describe." (V.12:18)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَرَاوَدَتْهُ الَّتِي هُوَ فِي بَيْتِهَا عَنْ نَفْسِهِ وَغَلَّقَتِ الأَبْوَابَ وَقَالَتْ هَيْتَ لَكَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "And she, in whose house he was, sought to seduce him (to do an evil act). She closed the doors and said, 'Come on, O you.' He said: 'I seek refuge in Allah (or Allah forbid)'..." (V.12:23)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏فَلَمَّا جَاءَهُ الرَّسُولُ قَالَ ارْجِعْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ فَاسْأَلْهُ مَا بَالُ النِّسْوَةِ اللاَّتِي قَطَّعْنَ أَيْدِيَهُنَّ إِنَّ رَبِّي بِكَيْدِهِنَّ عَلِيمٌ * قَالَ مَا خَطْبُكُنَّ إِذْ رَاوَدْتُنَّ يُوسُفَ عَنْ نَفْسِهِ قُلْنَ حَاشَى لِلَّهِ‏}‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "But when the messenger came to him, [Yusuf (Joseph)] said, 'Return to your lord..(up to).. the women said: Allah forbid." (V.12:50,51)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏حَتَّى إِذَا اسْتَيْأَسَ الرُّسُلُ‏} ‏
titles.english: "(They were reprieved) until, when the Messengers gave up hope..." (V.12:110)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏اللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تَحْمِلُ كُلُّ أُنْثَى وَمَا تَغِيضُ الأَرْحَامُ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Allah knows what every female bears, and by how much the wombs fall short (of their time or number)..." (V.13:8)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏كَشَجَرَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ أَصْلُهَا ثَابِتٌ وَفَرْعُهَا فِي السَّمَاءِ * تُؤْتِي أُكْلَهَا كُلَّ حِينٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "... As a goodly tree, whose root is firmly fixed..." (V.14:24)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يُثَبِّتُ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا بِالْقَوْلِ الثَّابِتِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "Allah will keep firm those who believe with, the word that stands firm..." (V.14:27)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى الَّذِينَ بَدَّلُوا نِعْمَةَ اللَّهِ كُفْرًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "Have you not seen those who have changed the Blessings of Allah into disbelief?..." (V.14:28)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِلاَّ مَنِ اسْتَرَقَ السَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُ شِهَابٌ مُبِينٌ‏}
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "Except him (devil) that gains hearing by stealing, he is pursued by a clear flaming fire." (V.15:18)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَابُ الْحِجْرِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "And verily, the dwellers of AI-Hijr (Rocky Tract, i.e., Thamud people) denied the Messengers." (V.15:80)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَاكَ سَبْعًا مِنَ الْمَثَانِي وَالْقُرْآنَ الْعَظِيمَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "And indeed, We have bestowed upon you seven Al-Mathãni (i.e., seven repeatedly recited Verses i.e., Sürat AI-Fatiha) and the Grand Qur'an." (V.15:87)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏الَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا الْقُرْآنَ عِضِينَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah "Who have made the Qur'an into parts (i.e., believed in one part and disbelieved in the other) ." (V.15:91)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّى يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِين‏}
titles.english: The Statement of Allah: "And worship your Lord until there comes unto you the certainty (i.e., death)." (V.15:99)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَمِنْكُمْ مَنْ يُرَدُّ إِلَى أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...And of you there are some who are sent back to senility..." (V.16:70)

titles.arabic: ‏ {‏وَقَضَيْنَا إِلَى بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ‏}
titles.english: "And we decreed for the Children of Israel." (17:4)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أَسْرَى بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلاً مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Glorified (and Exalted) is He (Allah) [above all that (evil) they associate with Him], Who took His slave (Muḥammad pbuh) for a Journey by Night from Al-Masjid-al-Ḥarām (at Makkah) to Al-Masjid-al-Aqsā (in Jerusalem)..." (V.17:1)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَلَقَدْ كَرَّمْنَا بَنِي آدَمَ‏}
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "And indeed, We have honoured the Children of Adam..." (V.17:70)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏ذُرِّيَّةَ مَنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ إِنَّهُ كَانَ عَبْدًا شَكُورًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "O offspring of those whom We carried (in the ship) with Nūh (Noah)! Verily, he was a grateful slave." (V.17:3)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَآتَيْنَا دَاوُدَ زَبُورًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...And to Dāwūd (David) We gave the Zabūr (Psalms) ." (V.17:55)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏قُلِ ادْعُوا الَّذِينَ زَعَمْتُمْ مِنْ دُونِهِ فَلاَ يَمْلِكُونَ كَشْفَ الضُّرِّ عَنْكُمْ وَلاَ تَحْوِيلاً‏} ‏
titles.english: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh): 'Call upon those besides Him whom you pretend (to be gods)..." (V.17:56)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ يَبْتَغُونَ إِلَى رَبِّهِمِ الْوَسِيلَةَ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Those whom they call upon [like 'Isa (Jesus) the son of Maryam (Mary), 'Uzair (Ezra) angels, etc.] desire (for themselves) means of access to their Lord (Allah)..." (V.17:57)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمَا جَعَلْنَا الرُّؤْيَا الَّتِي أَرَيْنَاكَ إِلاَّ فِتْنَةً لِلنَّاسِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And We made not the vision which We showed you (O Muḥammad [pbuh] as an actual eye-witness and not as a dream on the night of Al-Isrā') , but a trial for mankind..." (V.17:60)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏إِنَّ قُرْآنَ الْفَجْرِ كَانَ مَشْهُودًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Verily, the recitation of the Qur'ān in the early dawn (i.e. the morning - Fajr prayer) is ever witnessed (attended by the angels in charge of mankind of the day and the night) ." (V.17:78)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏عَسَى أَنْ يَبْعَثَكَ رَبُّكَ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "It may be that your Lord will raise you to Maqām Mahmūd (a station of praise and glory, i.e., the honour of intercession on the Day of Resurrection) ." (V.17:79)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَقُلْ جَاءَ الْحَقُّ وَزَهَقَ الْبَاطِلُ إِنَّ الْبَاطِلَ كَانَ زَهُوقًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "And say 'Truth (i.e., Islamic Monotheism or this Qur'ān or Jihād against polytheists) has come and Bāṭil (falsehood i.e., Satan or polytheism, etc.) has vanished...'" (V.17:81)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الرُّوحِ‏} ‏
titles.english: "And they ask you (O Muḥammad pbuh) concerning the Rūḥ (the Spirit)..." (V.17:85)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَلاَ تَجْهَرْ بِصَلاَتِكَ وَلاَ تُخَافِتْ بِهَا‏} ‏
titles.english: "...And offer your Salāt (prayer) neither aloud nor in a low voice..." (V.17:110)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏وَكَانَ الإِنْسَانُ أَكْثَرَ شَىْءٍ جَدَلاً‏}‏
titles.english: "But man is ever more quarrelsome than anything." (V.18:54)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَى لِفَتَاهُ لاَ أَبْرَحُ حَتَّى أَبْلُغَ مَجْمَعَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ أَوْ أَمْضِيَ حُقُبًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And (remember) when Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant: 'I will not give up (travelling) until I reach the junction of the two seas or (until) I spend years and years in travelling." (V.18:60)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَلَمَّا بَلَغَا مَجْمَعَ بَيْنِهِمَا نَسِيَا حُوتَهُمَا فَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُ فِي الْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "But when they reached the junction of the two seas, they forgot their fish, and it took its way through the sea as in a tunnel." (V.18:61)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَلَمَّا جَاوَزَا قَالَ لِفَتَاهُ آتِنَا غَدَاءَنَا لَقَدْ لَقِينَا مِنْ سَفَرِنَا هَذَا نَصَبًا‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏قَصَصًا}‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "So, when they had passed further on (beyond that fixed place), Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant, 'Bring us our morning meal; truly, we have suffered much fatigue in this, our journey... (up to) retracing their footsteps!" (V.18:62,63)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُمْ بِالأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَالاً‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh): 'Shall We tell you the greatest losers in respect of (their) deeds?" (V.18:103)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏قَالَ أَرَأَيْتَ إِذْ أَوَيْنَا إِلَى الصَّخْرَةِ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: The Statement of Allāh the Exalted: "He said: 'Do you remember when we betook ourselves to the rock." (V.18:63)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَائِهِ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَالُهُمْ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "They are those who deny in the Ayāt (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of their Lord and the Meeting with Him (in the Hereafter). So their works are in vain..." (V.18:105)

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏وَكَانَ الإِنْسَانُ أَكْثَرَ شَىْءٍ جَدَلاً‏}‏
titles.english: "But man is ever more quarrelsome than anything." (V.18:54)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَى لِفَتَاهُ لاَ أَبْرَحُ حَتَّى أَبْلُغَ مَجْمَعَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ أَوْ أَمْضِيَ حُقُبًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And (remember) when Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant: 'I will not give up (travelling) until I reach the junction of the two seas or (until) I spend years and years in travelling." (V.18:60)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَلَمَّا بَلَغَا مَجْمَعَ بَيْنِهِمَا نَسِيَا حُوتَهُمَا فَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُ فِي الْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "But when they reached the junction of the two seas, they forgot their fish, and it took its way through the sea as in a tunnel." (V.18:61)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏فَلَمَّا جَاوَزَا قَالَ لِفَتَاهُ آتِنَا غَدَاءَنَا لَقَدْ لَقِينَا مِنْ سَفَرِنَا هَذَا نَصَبًا‏} ‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏قَصَصًا}‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "So, when they had passed further on (beyond that fixed place), Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant, 'Bring us our morning meal; truly, we have suffered much fatigue in this, our journey... (up to) retracing their footsteps!" (V.18:62,63)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُمْ بِالأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَالاً‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh): 'Shall We tell you the greatest losers in respect of (their) deeds?" (V.18:103)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏قَالَ أَرَأَيْتَ إِذْ أَوَيْنَا إِلَى الصَّخْرَةِ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: The Statement of Allāh the Exalted: "He said: 'Do you remember when we betook ourselves to the rock." (V.18:63)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَائِهِ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَالُهُمْ‏} ‏ الآيَةَ
titles.english: "They are those who deny in the Ayāt (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of their Lord and the Meeting with Him (in the Hereafter). So their works are in vain..." (V.18:105)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَأَنْذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ الْحَسْرَةِ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And warn them (O Muḥammad pbuh) of the Day of grief and regrets..." (V.19:39)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلاَّ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And we (angels) descend not except by the Command of your Lord (O Muḥammad pbuh). To Him belongs what is before us and what is behind us and what is between those two..." (V.19:64)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أَفَرَأَيْتَ الَّذِي كَفَرَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَقَالَ لأُوتَيَنَّ مَالاً وَوَلَدًا‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Have you seen him who disbelieved in Our Ayāt (this Qur'an and Muḥammad pbuh) and said: 'I shall certainly be given wealth and children?" (V.19:77)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏أَطَّلَعَ الْغَيْبَ أَمِ اتَّخَذَ عِنْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ عَهْدًا‏} ‏ قَالَ مَوْثِقًا
titles.english: "Has he known the Unseen, or has he taken a convenant from the Most Gracious (Allāh)?" (V.19:78)

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏كَلاَّ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ مَدًّا‏} ‏
titles.english: "Nay, We shall record what he says, and We shall increase his torment (in the Hell) ." (V.19:79)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏ {‏وَنَرِثُهُ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا‏} ‏
titles.english: "And We shall inherit from him (at his death) all that he talks of (i.e., wealth and children which Allah has bestowed upon him in this world), and he shall come to Us alone." (V.19:80)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَاصْطَنَعْتُكَ لِنَفْسِي‏} ‏
titles.english: The Statement of Allāh the Exalted: "And I have chosen you for Myself." (V.20:41) (i.e., for My Revelation and My Message, or created you for Myself or strengthened and taught you as to how to preach My Message to My worshippers)] ."

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَى مُوسَى أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي فَاضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِي الْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لاَ تَخَافُ دَرَكًا وَلاَ تَخْشَى * فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِ فَغَشِيَهُمْ مِنَ الْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ * وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُ وَمَا هَدَى‏} ‏
