titles.arabic: باب مَا كَانَ السَّلَفُ يَدَّخِرُونَ فِي بُيُوتِهِمْ وَأَسْفَارِهِمْ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ وَاللَّحْمِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Storage of food in the houses and on a journey

titles.arabic: باب الْحَيْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Hais (dish prepared from dried yoghourt, butter and dates).

titles.arabic: باب الأَكْلِ فِي إِنَاءٍ مُفَضَّضٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Eating in a dish decorated with silver

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الطَّعَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The mention of food

titles.arabic: باب الأُدْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Udm (additional food taken with bread).

titles.arabic: باب الْحَلْوَاءِ وَالْعَسَلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sweet edible things and honey.

titles.arabic: باب الدُّبَّاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ad-Dubba' (gourd)

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَكَلَّفُ الطَّعَامَ لإِخْوَانِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To prepare a meal for (Muslim) brethren

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَضَافَ رَجُلاً إِلَى طَعَامٍ، وَأَقْبَلَ هُوَ عَلَى عَمَلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever invited a man to a meal and then went to carry on his job.

titles.arabic: باب الْمَرَقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Soup

titles.arabic: باب الْقَدِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Cured meat.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَاوَلَ أَوْ قَدَّمَ إِلَى صَاحِبِهِ عَلَى الْمَائِدَةِ شَيْئًا
titles.english: Chapter: To present something to the companion across the dining table.

titles.arabic: باب الرُّطَبِ بِالْقِثَّاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The eating of snake cucumber with fresh dates
Chapter

titles.arabic: بَابُ الرُّطَبِ وَالتَّمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Fresh dates and dry dates

titles.arabic: باب أَكْلِ الْجُمَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The eating of a spadix of the palm tree.

titles.arabic: باب الْعَجْوَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-'Ajwa (a special kind of date).

titles.arabic: باب الْقِرَانِ فِي التَّمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To eat two dates at a time

titles.arabic: باب الْقِثَّاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The snake cucumber

titles.arabic: باب بَرَكَةِ النَّخْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The goodness of the date-palm tree.

titles.arabic: باب جَمْعِ اللَّوْنَيْنِ أَوِ الطَّعَامَيْنِ بِمَرَّةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The taking of two kinds of fruit or food at a time.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَدْخَلَ الضِّيفَانَ عَشَرَةً عَشَرَةً وَالْجُلُوسِ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ عَشَرَةً عَشَرَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever admitted the guests in batches of ten persons (by turns).

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الثُّومِ وَالْبُقُولِ
titles.english: Chapter: The eating of garlic or other (bad smelling vegetables).

titles.arabic: باب الْكَبَاثِ وَهْوَ ثَمَرُ الأَرَاكِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Kabath, i.e., the leaves of Al-Arak

titles.arabic: باب الْمَضْمَضَةِ بَعْدَ الطَّعَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: To rinse the mouth after taking meals

titles.arabic: باب لَعْقِ الأَصَابِعِ وَمَصِّهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ تُمْسَحَ بِالْمِنْدِيلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To lick and suck the fingers

titles.arabic: باب الْمِنْدِيلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The handkerchief.

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا فَرَغَ مِنْ طَعَامِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What one should say after finishing one's meal.

titles.arabic: باب الأَكْلِ مَعَ الْخَادِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To eat with one's servant.

titles.arabic: بَابُ الطَّاعِمُ الشَّاكِرُ مِثْلُ الصَّائِمِ الصَّابِرِ
titles.english: Chapter: A person who thanks Allah after taking his meals.

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجُلِ يُدْعَى إِلَى طَعَامٍ فَيَقُولُ وَهَذَا مَعِي
titles.english: Chapter: "May this (person) come with me too?"

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا حَضَرَ الْعَشَاءُ فَلاَ يَعْجَلْ عَنْ عَشَائِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If supper or dinner is served (when the time for Salat is due).

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏فَإِذَا طَعِمْتُمْ فَانْتَشِرُوا‏}
titles.english: Chapter: "And when you have taken your meal disperse."

titles.arabic: باب تَسْمِيَةِ الْمَوْلُودِ غَدَاةَ يُولَدُ، لِمَنْ لَمْ يَعُقَّ عَنْهُ، وَتَحْنِيكِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The naming of a newly born child, Al-'Al-'Aqiqa and its Tahnik

titles.arabic: باب إِمَاطَةِ الأَذَى عَنِ الصَّبِيِّ، فِي الْعَقِيقَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: 'Aqiqa is to remove what harms the child

titles.arabic: باب الْفَرَعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Fara’

titles.arabic: باب الْعَتِيرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-‘Atira

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْمِيَةِ عَلَى الصَّيْدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The mentioning of Allah's Name while hunting

titles.arabic: باب صَيْدِ الْمِعْرَاضِ
titles.english: Chapter: The game killed by the Mi'rad

titles.arabic: باب مَا أَصَابَ الْمِعْرَاضُ بِعَرْضِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The game killed by the broad side of Al- Mi'rad

titles.arabic: باب صَيْدِ الْقَوْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: About hunting with a bow

titles.arabic: باب الْخَذْفِ وَالْبُنْدُقَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Khadhf and Al-Bunduqa

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اقْتَنَى كَلْبًا لَيْسَ بِكَلْبِ صَيْدٍ أَوْ مَاشِيَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: A (pet) dog

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَكَلَ الْكَلْبُ
titles.english: Chapter: If a hound eats (of the game)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّيْدِ إِذَا غَابَ عَنْهُ يَوْمَيْنِ أَوْ ثَلاَثَةً
titles.english: Chapter: If the hunter hits a game but does not catch it till two or three days

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَجَدَ مَعَ الصَّيْدِ كَلْبًا آخَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody finds another hound with the game

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّصَيُّدِ
titles.english: Chapter: What have been said about hunting

titles.arabic: باب التَّصَيُّدِ عَلَى الْجِبَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: To hunt on mountains

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏أُحِلَّ لَكُمْ صَيْدُ الْبَحْرِ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: "Lawful to you is water-game and its use for food .... For the benefit of yourselves

titles.arabic: باب أَكْلِ الْجَرَادِ
titles.english: Chapter: The eating of locusts

titles.arabic: باب آنِيَةِ الْمَجُوسِ وَالْمَيْتَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The utensils of Magians and (eating) dead flesh

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْمِيَةِ عَلَى الذَّبِيحَةِ وَمَنْ تَرَكَ مُتَعَمِّدًا
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning Allah's Name on slaughtering an animal

titles.arabic: باب مَا ذُبِحَ عَلَى النُّصُبِ وَالأَصْنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Animals sacrificed on An-Nusub and for the idols

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ فَلْيَذْبَحْ عَلَى اسْمِ اللَّهِ ‏"‏‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: "So slaughter by mentioning the Name of Allah."

titles.arabic: باب مَا أَنْهَرَ الدَّمَ مِنَ الْقَصَبِ وَالْمَرْوَةِ وَالْحَدِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The instruments that cause the blood to gush out

titles.arabic: باب ذَبِيحَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ وَالأَمَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The animal slaughtered by a lady

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُذَكَّى بِالسِّنِّ وَالْعَظْمِ وَالظُّفُرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Not to slaughter with a tooth, a bone or a nail

titles.arabic: باب ذَبِيحَةِ الأَعْرَابِ وَنَحْوِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The animals slaughtered by Bedouins or the like

titles.arabic: باب ذَبَائِحِ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ وَشُحُومِهَا مِنْ أَهْلِ الْحَرْبِ وَغَيْرِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The animals slaughtered by the people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians)

titles.arabic: باب مَا نَدَّ مِنَ الْبَهَائِمِ فَهْوَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ الْوَحْشِ
titles.english: Chapter: Any domestic animal that runs away, should be treated like a wild animal

titles.arabic: باب النَّحْرِ وَالذَّبْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: An-Nahr and Adh-Dhabh

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الْمُثْلَةِ وَالْمَصْبُورَةِ وَالْمُجَثَّمَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Muthla, Al-Masbura, and Mujaththama

titles.arabic: باب الدَّجَاجِ
titles.english: Chapter: The meat of chickens

titles.arabic: باب لُحُومِ الْخَيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Horse flesh

titles.arabic: باب لُحُومِ الْحُمُرِ الإِنْسِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The meat of donkeys

titles.arabic: باب أَكْلِ كُلِّ ذِي نَابٍ مِنَ السِّبَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The meat of beasts of prey having fangs

titles.arabic: باب جُلُودِ الْمَيْتَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The skin of dead animals

titles.arabic: باب الْمِسْكِ
titles.english: Chapter: The musk

titles.arabic: باب الأَرْنَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The rabbit

titles.arabic: باب الضَّبِّ
titles.english: Chapter: The mastigure

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَقَعَتِ الْفَأْرَةُ فِي السَّمْنِ الْجَامِدِ أَوِ الذَّائِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a mouse falls into solid or liquid butter-fat

titles.arabic: باب الْوَسْمِ وَالْعَلَمِ فِي الصُّورَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Branding the faces

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَصَابَ قَوْمٌ غَنِيمَةً فَذَبَحَ بَعْضُهُمْ غَنَمًا أَوْ إِبِلاً بِغَيْرِ أَمْرِ أَصْحَابِهِمْ لَمْ تُؤْكَلْ
titles.english: Chapter: To slaughter sheep or camels from war booty without the permission of the companions

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا نَدَّ بَعِيرٌ لِقَوْمٍ فَرَمَاهُ بَعْضُهُمْ بِسَهْمٍ فَقَتَلَهُ فَأَرَادَ إِصْلاَحَهُمْ فَهْوَ جَائِزٌ
titles.english: Chapter: To kill a runaway camel.

titles.arabic: بَابُ أَكْلِ الْمُضْطَرِّ
titles.english: Chapter: The eating (of dead animals etc.) out of necessity

titles.arabic: باب سُنَّةِ الأُضْحِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The legal way of Al-Udhiya

titles.arabic: باب قِسْمَةِ الإِمَامِ الأَضَاحِيَّ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: The distribution of the animals among the people

titles.arabic: باب الأُضْحِيَّةِ لِلْمُسَافِرِ وَالنِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sacrifices on behalf of travelers and women

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُشْتَهَى مِنَ اللَّحْمِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Meat is desired on the day of Nahr

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَالَ الأَضْحَى يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sacrifices on the day of Nahr

titles.arabic: باب الأَضْحَى وَالْمَنْحَرِ بِالْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Adha and to slaughter sacrifices at the Musalla

titles.arabic: باب فِي أُضْحِيَّةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِكَبْشَيْنِ أَقْرَنَيْنِ وَيُذْكَرُ سَمِينَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) slaughtered two horned rams

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لأَبِي بُرْدَةَ: «ضَحِّ بِالْجَذَعِ مِنَ الْمَعَزِ وَلَنْ تَجْزِيَ عَنْ أَحَدٍ بَعْدَكَ»
titles.english: Chapter: "Slaughter a young goat as a sacrifice, but it will not be sufficient for anybody else after you."

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ ذَبَحَ الأَضَاحِيَّ بِيَدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Slaughtering the sacrifice with own hands.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ ذَبَحَ ضَحِيَّةَ غَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Slaughtering the sacrifices on behalf of others.

titles.arabic: باب الذَّبْحِ بَعْدَ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To slaughter the sacrifice after the ('Eid) Salat

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ ذَبَحَ قَبْلَ الصَّلاَةِ أَعَادَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever slaughters his sacrifice before the 'Eid prayer should repeat it

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الْقَدَمِ عَلَى صَفْحِ الذَّبِيحَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To put one's foot on the side of the animal at the time of slaughtering

titles.arabic: باب التَّكْبِيرِ عِنْدَ الذَّبْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: To say Takbir while slaughtering

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَعَثَ بِهَدْيِهِ لِيُذْبَحَ لَمْ يَحْرُمْ عَلَيْهِ شَىْءٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone sends his Hadi to be slaughtered

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُؤْكَلُ مِنْ لُحُومِ الأَضَاحِيِّ وَمَا يُتَزَوَّدُ مِنْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What may be eaten of the meat of sacrifices and what may be taken as journey food

titles.arabic: بَابُ وَقَوْلُ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {إِنَّمَا الْخَمْرُ وَالْمَيْسِرُ وَالأَنْصَابُ وَالأَزْلاَمُ رِجْسٌ مِنْ عَمَلِ الشَّيْطَانِ فَاجْتَنِبُوهُ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: "Intoxicants, gambling, Al-Ansab and Al-Azlam are an abomination of Shaitan's handiwork ..."

titles.arabic: باب الْخَمْرُ مِنَ الْعِنَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Alcoholic drinks prepared from grapes and other things

titles.arabic: باب نَزَلَ تَحْرِيمُ الْخَمْرِ وَهْىَ مِنَ الْبُسْرِ وَالتَّمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Prohibition of alcoholic drinks prepared from unripe and ripe dates

titles.arabic: باب الْخَمْرُ مِنَ الْعَسَلِ وَهْوَ الْبِتْعُ
titles.english: Chapter: Alcoholic drinks prepared from honey

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَنَّ الْخَمْرَ مَا خَامَرَ الْعَقْلَ مِنَ الشَّرَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: Alcoholic drink is any drink that disturbs the mind

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ يَسْتَحِلُّ الْخَمْرَ وَيُسَمِّيهِ بِغَيْرِ اسْمِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The one who regards an alcoholic drink lawful to drink, and calls it by another name

titles.arabic: باب الاِنْتِبَاذِ فِي الأَوْعِيَةِ وَالتَّوْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To prepare non-alcoholic drinks in bowls or Taur

titles.arabic: باب تَرْخِيصِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي الأَوْعِيَةِ وَالظُّرُوفِ بَعْدَ النَّهْىِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) re-allowed the use of forbidden bowls and containers

titles.arabic: باب نَقِيعِ التَّمْرِ مَا لَمْ يُسْكِرْ
titles.english: Chapter: (One can drink) date-syrup as long as it does not intoxicate (not fermented)

titles.arabic: باب الْبَاذَقِ وَمَنْ نَهَى عَنْ كُلِّ، مُسْكِرٍ مِنَ الأَشْرِبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Badhaq (a kind of alcoholic drink)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَأَى أَنْ لاَ يَخْلِطَ الْبُسْرَ وَالتَّمْرَ إِذَا كَانَ مُسْكِرًا وَأَنْ لاَ يَجْعَلَ إِدَامَيْنِ فِي إِدَامٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Unripe-date drink and ripe-date drink should not be mixed if it is an intoxicant, and two cooked foods should not be put in one dish

titles.arabic: بَابُ شُرْبِ اللَّبَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The drink of milk

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِعْذَابِ الْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Fresh water

titles.arabic: باب شَوْبِ اللَّبَنِ بِالْمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The drinking of milk with water

titles.arabic: باب شَرَابِ الْحَلْوَاءِ وَالْعَسَلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The drinking of sweet edible things and honey

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرْبِ قَائِمًا
titles.english: Chapter: To drink while standing

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ شَرِبَ وَهْوَ وَاقِفٌ عَلَى بَعِيرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To drink while on the back of camel

titles.arabic: باب الأَيْمَنَ فَالأَيْمَنَ فِي الشُّرْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The one on the right should drink first

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَسْتَأْذِنُ الرَّجُلُ مَنْ عَنْ يَمِينِهِ، فِي الشُّرْبِ لِيُعْطِيَ الأَكْبَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: The permission of the one on right to give the drink to an elder person first

titles.arabic: باب الْكَرْعِ فِي الْحَوْضِ
titles.english: Chapter: To drink water from a basin by putting mouth in it

titles.arabic: باب خِدْمَةِ الصِّغَارِ الْكِبَارَ
titles.english: Chapter: The younger should serve the older

titles.arabic: باب تَغْطِيَةِ الإِنَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Covering the containers

titles.arabic: باب اخْتِنَاثِ الأَسْقِيَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The bending of the mouths of the water-skins for the sake of drinking from them

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرْبِ مِنْ فَمِ السِّقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To drink water from the mouth of a water-skin

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّنَفُّسِ، فِي الإِنَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is forbidden to breathe in the vessel (while drinking)

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرْبِ بِنَفَسَيْنِ أَوْ ثَلاَثَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Breathing twice or thrice while drinking

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرْبِ فِي آنِيَةِ الذَّهَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: To drink in gold utensils

titles.arabic: باب آنِيَةِ الْفِضَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Silver utensils

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرْبِ فِي الأَقْدَاحِ
titles.english: Chapter: To drink in wooden utensils

titles.arabic: باب الشُّرْبِ مِنْ قَدَحِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَآنِيَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To drink in the drinking bowl of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب شُرْبِ الْبَرَكَةِ وَالْمَاءِ الْمُبَارَكِ
titles.english: Chapter: To drink blessed water; and the blessed water.

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي كَفَّارَةِ الْمَرَضِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sickness is expiation for sins

titles.arabic: باب شِدَّةِ الْمَرَضِ
titles.english: Chapter: The severity of disease

titles.arabic: باب أَشَدُّ النَّاسِ بَلاَءً الأَنْبِيَاءُ ثُمَّ الْأَمْثَلُ فَالْأَمْثَلُ

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ عِيَادَةِ الْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is compulsory to visit the sick

titles.arabic: باب عِيَادَةِ الْمُغْمَى عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To visit an unconscious person

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ يُصْرَعُ مِنَ الرِّيحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of a person suffering from epilepsy

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ ذَهَبَ بَصَرُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of a person who has lost his sight

titles.arabic: باب عِيَادَةِ النِّسَاءِ الرِّجَالَ
titles.english: Chapter: The visiting of sick men by women

titles.arabic: باب عِيَادَةِ الصِّبْيَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To visit sick children

titles.arabic: باب عِيَادَةِ الأَعْرَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: To visit a Bedouin

titles.arabic: باب عِيَادَةِ الْمُشْرِكِ
titles.english: Chapter: To vist a Mushrik

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا عَادَ مَرِيضًا فَحَضَرَتِ الصَّلاَةُ فَصَلَّى بِهِمْ جَمَاعَةً
titles.english: Chapter: If one visited a patient and the time of the Salat became due

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الْيَدِ عَلَى الْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: Placing the hand on the patient

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُقَالُ لِلْمَرِيضِ وَمَا يُجِيبُ
titles.english: Chapter: What should be said to a patient and what should be his answer

titles.arabic: باب عِيَادَةِ الْمَرِيضِ رَاكِبًا وَمَاشِيًا وَرِدْفًا عَلَى الْحِمَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: To visit a patient riding, walking or sitting with another person on a donkey

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الْمَرِيضِ إِنِّي وَجِعٌ أَوْ وَارَأْسَاهْ، أَوِ اشْتَدَّ بِي الْوَجَعُ
titles.english: Chapter: To say "I am sick," or "Oh, my head!" or "My ailment has been aggravated"

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الْمَرِيضِ قُومُوا عَنِّي
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of the patient: "Get up from me!"

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ ذَهَبَ بِالصَّبِيِّ الْمَرِيضِ لِيُدْعَى لَهُ

titles.arabic: باب تَمَنِّي الْمَرِيضِ الْمَوْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: The patient's wish for death

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاءِ الْعَائِدِ لِلْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation for the patient

titles.arabic: باب وُضُوءِ الْعَائِدِ لِلْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ablution by a person who pays a visit to a patient

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ دَعَا بِرَفْعِ الْوَبَاءِ وَالْحُمَّى
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah to remove epidemics and fever

titles.arabic: باب مَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ دَاءً إِلاَّ أَنْزَلَ لَهُ شِفَاءً

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُدَاوِي الرَّجُلُ الْمَرْأَةَ أَوِ الْمَرْأَةُ الرَّجُلَ
titles.english: Chapter: May a man treat a woman or a woman treat a man?

titles.arabic: باب الشِّفَاءُ فِي ثَلاَثٍ

titles.arabic: بَابُ الدَّوَاءِ بِالْعَسَلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Treatment with honey

titles.arabic: باب الدَّوَاءِ بِأَلْبَانِ الإِبِلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To treat with the milk of camels

titles.arabic: باب الدَّوَاءِ بِأَبْوَالِ الإِبِلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To treat with the urine of camels

titles.arabic: باب الْحَبَّةِ السَّوْدَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: (To treat with) black cumin (Nigella seeds)

titles.arabic: باب التَّلْبِينَةِ لِلْمَرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: At-Talbina prepared for the patient

titles.arabic: باب السَّعُوطِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sa'ut

titles.arabic: باب السَّعُوطِ بِالْقُسْطِ الْهِنْدِيِّ الْبَحْرِيِّ

titles.arabic: باب أَىَّ سَاعَةٍ يَحْتَجِمُ وَاحْتَجَمَ أَبُو مُوسَى لَيْلاً

titles.arabic: باب الْحَجْمِ فِي السَّفَرِ وَالإِحْرَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: To be cupped while on a journey or in Ihram

titles.arabic: باب الْحِجَامَةِ مِنَ الدَّاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To be cupped (as a treatment) for a disease.

titles.arabic: باب الْحِجَامَةِ عَلَى الرَّأْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Cupping on the head

titles.arabic: باب الْحَجْمِ مِنَ الشَّقِيقَةِ وَالصُّدَاعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Cupping to treat unilateral or bilateral headache

titles.arabic: باب الْحَلْقِ مِنَ الأَذَى
titles.english: Chapter: To get one's head shaved because of some ailment

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اكْتَوَى أَوْ كَوَى غَيْرَهُ، وَفَضْلِ مَنْ لَمْ يَكْتَوِ
titles.english: Chapter: Branding (cauterizing)

titles.arabic: باب الإِثْمِدِ وَالْكُحْلِ مِنَ الرَّمَدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To treat opthalmia with antimony or kohl

titles.arabic: باب الْجُذَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Leprosy

titles.arabic: باب الْمَنُّ شِفَاءٌ لِلْعَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Mann heals eye diseases

titles.arabic: باب اللَّدُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Ladud (the medicine which is poured or inserted into one side of a patient's mouth)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب الْعُذْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Udhra (throat or tonsil diseases)

titles.arabic: باب دَوَاءِ الْمَبْطُونِ
titles.english: Chapter: The treatment for a person suffering from diarrhea

titles.arabic: باب لاَ صَفَرَ، وَهْوَ دَاءٌ يَأْخُذُ الْبَطْنَ
titles.english: Chapter: There is no Safar disease that afflicts the abdomen

titles.arabic: باب ذَاتِ الْجَنْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Pleurisy

titles.arabic: باب حَرْقِ الْحَصِيرِ لِيُسَدَّ بِهِ الدَّمُ
titles.english: Chapter: To burn a mat to stop bleeding

titles.arabic: باب الْحُمَّى مِنْ فَيْحِ جَهَنَّمَ
titles.english: Chapter: Fever is from the heat of Hell

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ أَرْضٍ لاَ تُلاَيِمُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever went out of a land because of its climate and water

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُذْكَرُ فِي الطَّاعُونِ

titles.arabic: باب أَجْرِ الصَّابِرِ فِي الطَّاعُونِ
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of a person who suffers from plague and remains patient

titles.arabic: باب الرُّقَى بِالْقُرْآنِ وَالْمُعَوِّذَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Ar-Ruqa with the Qur'an and the Mu'awwidhat

titles.english: Chapter: To do Ruqya by reciting Surat Al-Fatiha.

titles.arabic: باب الشَّرْطِ فِي الرُّقْيَةِ بِقَطِيعٍ مِنَ الْغَنَمِ

titles.arabic: باب رُقْيَةِ الْعَيْنِ

titles.arabic: باب الْعَيْنُ حَقٌّ
titles.english: Chapter: The effect of an evil eye is a fact

titles.arabic: باب رُقْيَةِ الْحَيَّةِ وَالْعَقْرَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: To treat a snakebite or a scorpion sting with a Ruqya

titles.english: Chapter: The Ruqya of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب النَّفْثِ فِي الرُّقْيَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: An-Nafth while treating with a Ruqya

titles.arabic: باب مَسْحِ الرَّاقِي الْوَجَعَ بِيَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى
titles.english: Chapter: Passing right hand on the place of ailment while treating with a Ruqya

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْمَرْأَةِ تَرْقِي الرَّجُلَ
titles.english: Chapter: A woman may treat a man with a Ruqya

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَرْقِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever does not treat or get treated with a Ruqya

titles.arabic: باب الطِّيَرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: At-Tiyara (drawing an evil omen from birds, etc.)

titles.arabic: باب الْفَأْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Fa'l (good omen)

titles.arabic: باب لاَ هَامَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: No Hama

titles.arabic: باب الْكَهَانَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Foretellers

titles.arabic: باب السِّحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Magic

titles.arabic: باب الشِّرْكُ وَالسِّحْرُ مِنَ الْمُوبِقَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Shirk and witchcraft are from the Mubiqat (great destructive sins)

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَسْتَخْرِجُ السِّحْرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Should a bewitched person be treated?

titles.arabic: باب السِّحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Witchcraft

titles.arabic: باب مِنَ الْبَيَانِ سِحْرًا
titles.english: Chapter: Some eloquent speech is as effective as magic

titles.arabic: باب الدَّوَاءِ بِالْعَجْوَةِ لِلسِّحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The use of 'Ajwa dates as medicine for magic

titles.arabic: باب لاَ هَامَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: No Hama

titles.arabic: باب لاَ عَدْوَى
titles.english: Chapter: No 'Adwa (no contagious disease is conveyed without Allahâ€™s permission)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُذْكَرُ فِي سَمِّ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: The poison given to the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب شُرْبِ السُّمِّ، وَالدَّوَاءِ بِهِ، وَبِمَا يُخَافُ مِنْهُ وَالْخَبِيثِ
titles.english: Chapter: The taking of poison and treating with it

titles.arabic: باب أَلْبَانِ الأُتُنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The milk of she-asses

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا وَقَعَ الذُّبَابُ فِي الإِنَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a housefly falls in a utensil

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِ}
titles.english: Chapter: "Say: Who has forbidden the adornment with clothes given by Allah which He has produced for His slaves?"

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ جَرَّ إِزَارَهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ خُيَلاَءَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever dragged his Izar without conceit

titles.arabic: باب التَّشْمِيرِ فِي الثِّيَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: To tuck up or roll up the clothes

titles.arabic: باب مَا أَسْفَلَ مِنَ الْكَعْبَيْنِ فَهْوَ فِي النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The part of the garment that hangs below the ankles is in the Fire

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ جَرَّ ثَوْبَهُ مِنَ الْخُيَلاَءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever drags his garment out of pride and arrogance

titles.arabic: باب الإِزَارِ الْمُهَدَّبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The fringed Izar

titles.arabic: باب الأَرْدِيَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Rida

titles.arabic: باب لُبْسِ الْقَمِيصِ
titles.english: Chapter: Wearing of shirts

titles.arabic: باب جَيْبِ الْقَمِيصِ مِنْ عِنْدِ الصَّدْرِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Jaib (pocket)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَبِسَ جُبَّةً ضَيِّقَةَ الْكُمَّيْنِ فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Wearing a cloak of narrow sleeves while on a journey

titles.arabic: باب جُبَّةِ الصُّوفِ فِي الْغَزْوِ
titles.english: Chapter: To wear a woolen cloak during the Ghazawat

titles.arabic: باب الْقَبَاءِ وَفَرُّوجِ حَرِيرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Qaba

titles.arabic: باب الْبَرَانِسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Hooded cloaks

titles.arabic: باب السَّرَاوِيلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Trousers

titles.arabic: باب الْعَمَائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Turbans

titles.arabic: باب التَّقَنُّعِ
titles.english: Chapter: At-Taqannu

titles.arabic: باب الْمِغْفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The helmet

titles.arabic: باب الْبُرُودِ وَالْحِبَرَةِ وَالشَّمْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Burud, Al-Hibar and Ash-Shamla

titles.arabic: باب الأَكْسِيَةِ وَالْخَمَائِصِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Aksiya and Al-Khama'is

titles.arabic: باب اشْتِمَالِ الصَّمَّاءِ

Chapter

titles.arabic: باب السَّاعِي عَلَى الأَرْمَلَةِ

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ لاَ يَأْمَنُ جَارُهُ بَوَايِقَهُ

titles.arabic: باب الرِّفْقِ فِي الأَمْرِ كُلِّهِ

titles.arabic: باب تَعَاوُنِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ بَعْضِهِمْ بَعْضًا
titles.english: Chapter: The co-operation between the believers

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {مَنْ يَشْفَعْ شَفَاعَةً حَسَنَةً يَكُنْ لَهُ نَصِيبٌ مِنْهَا وَمَنْ يَشْفَعْ شَفَاعَةً سَيِّئَةً يَكُنْ لَهُ كِفْلٌ مِنْهَا وَكَانَ اللَّهُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ مُقِيتًا}
titles.english: Chapter: "Whosoever intercedes for a good cause will have the reward thereof..."

titles.arabic: باب لَمْ يَكُنِ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَاحِشًا وَلاَ مُتَفَحِّشًا
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) was neithr a Fahish nor Mutafahhish

titles.arabic: باب حُسْنِ الْخُلُقِ، وَالسَّخَاءِ، وَمَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الْبُخْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Good character, generosity, and miserliness

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يَكُونُ الرَّجُلُ فِي أَهْلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: How should a man be with his family?

titles.arabic: باب الْمِقَةِ مِنَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى
titles.english: Chapter: Love is from Allah Most High

titles.arabic: باب الْحُبِّ فِي اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To love for Allah's sake

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لاَ يَسْخَرْ قَوْمٌ مِنْ قَوْمٍ عَسَى أَنْ يَكُونُوا خَيْرًا مِنْهُمْ} إِلَى قَوْلِهِ: {فَأُولَئِكَ هُمُ الظَّالِمُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: "...Let not a group scoff at another group.."

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى مِنَ السِّبَابِ وَاللَّعْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Calling bad names and cursing

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنْ ذِكْرِ النَّاسِ نَحْوَ قَوْلِهِمُ الطَّوِيلُ وَالْقَصِيرُ
titles.english: Chapter: Describing somebody as tall or short

titles.arabic: باب الْغِيبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Backbiting

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ خَيْرُ دُورِ الأَنْصَارِ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: "The best family among the Ansar"

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنِ اغْتِيَابِ أَهْلِ الْفَسَادِ وَالرِّيَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Backbitings, wicked and suspicious people

titles.arabic: باب النَّمِيمَةُ مِنَ الْكَبَائِرِ
titles.english: Chapter: An_namima is one of the great sins

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ النَّمِيمَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked of Namima

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَاجْتَنِبُوا قَوْلَ الزُّورِ‏}
titles.english: Chapter: "...And shun lying speech."

titles.arabic: باب مَا قِيلَ فِي ذِي الْوَجْهَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about a double-faced person

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَخْبَرَ صَاحِبَهُ، بِمَا يُقَالُ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To inform the friend what has been said about him.

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ التَّمَادُحِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked of praising a person]

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَثْنَى عَلَى أَخِيهِ بِمَا يَعْلَمُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever praises his brother with that he knows

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُ بِالْعَدْلِ وَالإِحْسَانِ وَإِيتَاءِ ذِي الْقُرْبَى وَيَنْهَى عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ وَالْبَغْيِ يَعِظُكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: 'Verily! Allah enjoins Al-'Adl and Al-Ihsan, and giving to kith and kin and forbids Al-Fahsha' and Al-Munkar, and Al-Baghy, He admonishes you, that you may take heed"

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا يُنْهَى عَنِ التَّحَاسُدِ وَالتَّدَابُرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Jealousy and mutual estrangement are forbidden.

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اجْتَنِبُوا كَثِيرًا مِنَ الظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعْضَ الظَّنِّ إِثْمٌ وَلاَ تَجَسَّسُوا‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: "O you who believe! Avoid much suspicion, indeed some suspicions are sins. And spy not, neither backbite one another..."

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَكُونُ مِنَ الظَّنِّ
titles.english: Chapter: What sort of suspicion is allowed.

titles.arabic: باب سَتْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A believer should conceal what sins he may commit

titles.arabic: باب الْكِبْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Pride and arrogance

titles.arabic: باب الْهِجْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Hijra

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الْهِجْرَانِ لِمَنْ عَصَى
titles.english: Chapter: The desertion of a sinful person

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَزُورُ صَاحِبَهُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ أَوْ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
titles.english: Chapter: May a person visit his friend daily, or visit him in the morning and in the evening?

titles.arabic: باب الزِّيَارَةِ وَمَنْ زَارَ قَوْمًا فَطَعِمَ عِنْدَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The paying of a visit

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَجَمَّلَ لِلْوُفُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever spruced himself up for the delegates.

titles.arabic: باب الإِخَاءِ وَالْحِلْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: The establishment of a bond of brotherhood and the conclusion of a treaty

titles.arabic: باب التَّبَسُّمِ وَالضَّحِكِ
titles.english: Chapter: Smiling and laughing

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَكُونُوا مَعَ الصَّادِقِينَ} وَمَا يُنْهَى عَنِ الْكَذِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: "O you who believe! Be afraid of Allah, and be with those who are true"

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْهَدْىِ الصَّالِحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The righteous way or guidance

titles.arabic: باب الصَّبْرِ عَلَى الأَذَى
titles.english: Chapter: To be patient when one is harmed

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يُوَاجِهِ النَّاسَ بِالْعِتَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever did not admonish people in their faces

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَفَّرَ أَخَاهُ بِغَيْرِ تَأْوِيلٍ فَهْوَ كَمَا قَالَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever calls his brother a Kafir without any grounds

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَرَ إِكْفَارَ مَنْ قَالَ ذَلِكَ مُتَأَوِّلاً أَوْ جَاهِلاً
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever does not consider as Kafir the person who says that...

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الْغَضَبِ وَالشِّدَّةِ لأَمْرِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What to say when one is angry or harsh for Allah's sake

titles.arabic: باب الْحَذَرِ مِنَ الْغَضَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: To be cautious from being angry

titles.arabic: باب الْحَيَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Hayd

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ تَسْتَحِي فَاصْنَعْ مَا شِئْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: "And if you do not feel ashamed, then do whatever you like."

titles.arabic: باب مَا لاَ يُسْتَحْيَا مِنَ الْحَقِّ لِلتَّفَقُّهِ فِي الدِّينِ
titles.english: Chapter: Not feel shy of the truth to comprehend the religion

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «يَسِّرُوا وَلاَ تُعَسِّرُوا»
titles.english: Chapter: "Make things easy for the people and do not make things difficult for them."

titles.arabic: باب الاِنْبِسَاطِ إِلَى النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: To be cheerful with the people

titles.arabic: باب الْمُدَارَاةِ مَعَ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: To be gentle and polite with the people.

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُلْدَغُ الْمُؤْمِنُ مِنْ جُحْرٍ مَرَّتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: A believer not to be stung twice out fo the same hole

titles.arabic: باب حَقِّ الضَّيْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: The right of the guest

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِكْرَامِ الضَّيْفِ وَخِدْمَتِهِ إِيَّاهُ بِنَفْسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To honour guest and to serve him

titles.arabic: باب صُنْعِ الطَّعَامِ وَالتَّكَلُّفِ لِلضَّيْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: To prepare the meals for the guest

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الْغَضَبِ وَالْجَزَعِ عِنْدَ الضَّيْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: Anger and impatience before a guest

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الضَّيْفِ لِصَاحِبِهِ لاَ آكُلُ حَتَّى تَأْكُلَ
titles.english: Chapter: "By Allah, I will not eat till you eat."

titles.arabic: باب إِكْرَامِ الْكَبِيرِ وَيَبْدَأُ الأَكْبَرُ بِالْكَلاَمِ وَالسُّؤَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: To respect the old ones who should start talking

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الشِّعْرِ وَالرَّجَزِ وَالْحُدَاءِ وَمَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: What kinds of poetry, Rajaz and Huda is allowed

titles.arabic: باب هِجَاءِ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Lampooning Al-Mushrikin

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا يُكْرَهُ أَنْ يَكُونَ الْغَالِبُ عَلَى الإِنْسَانِ الشِّعْرُ حَتَّى يَصُدَّهُ عَنْ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ وَالْعِلْمِ وَالْقُرْآنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To indulge in poetry

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ تَرِبَتْ يَمِينُكَ ‏"‏‏.‏ ‏"‏ وَعَقْرَى حَلْقَى ‏"‏‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Taribat yaminuka and Aqra halqa

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زَعَمُوا
titles.english: Chapter: "They assumed or claimed that..."

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ وَيْلَكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying "Wailaka."

titles.arabic: بَابُ عَلاَمَةِ حُبِّ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
titles.english: Chapter: The signs of loving Allah

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ لِلرَّجُلِ اخْسَأْ
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of one man to another: Ikhsa

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ مَرْحَبًا
titles.english: Chapter: Saying: "Marahaba"

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُدْعَى النَّاسُ بِآبَائِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Calling the people by their father's name

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَقُلْ خَبُثَتْ نَفْسِي
titles.english: Chapter: One should not say 'Khabuthat nafsi'

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَسُبُّوا الدَّهْرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Do not abuse Ad-Dahr

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «إِنَّمَا الْكَرْمُ قَلْبُ الْمُؤْمِنِ»
titles.english: Chapter: "Al-Karm is only the heart of a believer

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ فَدَاكَ أَبِي وَأُمِّي
titles.english: Chapter: Saying "let my father and mother be sacrificed for you".

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ جَعَلَنِي اللَّهُ فِدَاكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying "May Allah sacrifice me for you".

titles.arabic: باب أَحَبِّ الأَسْمَاءِ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
titles.english: Chapter: The most beloved names to Allah 'Azza wa Jall

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏
titles.english: Chapter: "Name yourselves by my name, but do not call yourselves by my Kunyah."

titles.arabic: باب اسْمِ الْحَزْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The neame: 'Al-Hazn'

titles.arabic: باب تَحْوِيلِ الاِسْمِ إِلَى اسْمٍ أَحْسَنَ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To change a name for better name

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ سَمَّى بِأَسْمَاءِ الأَنْبِيَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever named by the names of the Prophets.

titles.arabic: باب تَسْمِيَةِ الْوَلِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To name: 'al-Walid'

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ دَعَا صَاحِبَهُ فَنَقَصَ مِنِ اسْمِهِ حَرْفًا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever, while calling a friend, omits a letter from his name

titles.arabic: باب الْكُنْيَةِ لِلصَّبِيِّ وَقَبْلَ أَنْ يُولَدَ لِلرَّجُلِ
titles.english: Chapter: A child may be given Al-Kunyah and one may be given Al-Kunyah before children

titles.arabic: باب التَّكَنِّي بِأَبِي تُرَابٍ، وَإِنْ كَانَتْ لَهُ كُنْيَةٌ أُخْرَى
titles.english: Chapter: To be called Abu Turab, though one already has another Kunyah name

titles.arabic: باب أَبْغَضِ الأَسْمَاءِ إِلَى اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The name which is most disliked by Allah.

titles.arabic: باب كُنْيَةِ الْمُشْرِكِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Kunyah of Al-Mushrik.

titles.arabic: باب الْمَعَارِيضُ مَنْدُوحَةٌ عَنِ الْكَذِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Ma'arid is a safe way to avoid a lie

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ لِلشَّىْءِ لَيْسَ بِشَىْءٍ وَهْوَ يَنْوِي أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ بِحَقٍّ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The description of something by a man as 'nothing' while he means that it is not true

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الْبَصَرِ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To raise the sight towards the sky

titles.arabic: باب نَكْتِ الْعُودِ فِي الْمَاءِ وَالطِّينِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever dipped a stick in water and mud

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجُلِ يَنْكُتُ الشَّىْءَ بِيَدِهِ فِي الأَرْضِ
titles.english: Chapter: One may scrape up the ground

titles.arabic: باب التَّكْبِيرِ وَالتَّسْبِيحِ عِنْدَ التَّعَجُّبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of Takbir and Tasbih at the time of wonder

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْخَذْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is forbidden to throw stones

titles.arabic: باب الْحَمْدِ لِلْعَاطِسِ
titles.english: Chapter: To say 'Al-Hamdu-lillah' on sneezing

titles.arabic: باب تَشْمِيتِ الْعَاطِسِ إِذَا حَمِدَ اللَّهَ
titles.english: Chapter: Tashmu to the sneezer if he praises Allah

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الْعُطَاسِ، وَمَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ التَّثَاؤُبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sneezing, and yawning

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا عَطَسَ كَيْفَ يُشَمَّتُ
titles.english: Chapter: When somebody sneezes, what should be said?

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُشَمَّتُ الْعَاطِسُ إِذَا لَمْ يَحْمَدِ اللَّهَ
titles.english: Chapter: Tashmu should not be said to a sneezer if he does not say 'Al-Hamdu-lillah'

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا تَثَاوَبَ فَلْيَضَعْ يَدَهُ عَلَى فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone yawns, he should put his hand over his mouth

titles.arabic: باب بَدْءِ السَّلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: How the Salam began

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لاَ تَدْخُلُوا بُيُوتًا غَيْرَ بُيُوتِكُمْ حَتَّى تَسْتَأْنِسُوا وَتُسَلِّمُوا عَلَى أَهْلِهَا ذَلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَّكَّرُونَ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَجِدُوا فِيهَا أَحَدًا فَلاَ تَدْخُلُوهَا حَتَّى يُؤْذَنَ لَكُمْ وَإِنْ قِيلَ لَكُمُ ارْجِعُوا فَارْجِعُوا هُوَ أَزْكَى لَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ لَيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ جُنَاحٌ أَنْ تَدْخُلُوا بُيُوتًا غَيْرَ مَسْكُونَةٍ فِيهَا مَتَاعٌ لَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا تَكْتُمُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: "... Enter not a house other than your own..."

titles.arabic: بَابُ السَّلاَمُ اسْمٌ مِنْ أَسْمَاءِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salam is one of the Names of Allah 'Azza wa Jall

titles.arabic: باب تَسْلِيمِ الْقَلِيلِ عَلَى الْكَثِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The small number should greet the large number

titles.arabic: باب تَسْلِيمِ الرَّاكِبِ عَلَى الْمَاشِي
titles.english: Chapter: The riding person should greet the walking person

titles.arabic: باب تَسْلِيمِ الْمَاشِي عَلَى الْقَاعِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The walking person should greet the sitting one

titles.arabic: باب تَسْلِيمِ الصَّغِيرِ عَلَى الْكَبِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The younger person should greet the older one

titles.arabic: باب إِفْشَاءِ السَّلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To propagate As-salam

titles.arabic: باب السَّلاَمِ لِلْمَعْرِفَةِ وَغَيْرِ الْمَعْرِفَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To greet everybody

titles.arabic: باب آيَةِ الْحِجَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Divine Verse of Al-Hijab

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِئْذَانُ مِنْ أَجْلِ الْبَصَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Asking permission because of looking

titles.arabic: باب زِنَا الْجَوَارِحِ دُونَ الْفَرْجِ
titles.english: Chapter: The adultery of the body parts

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْلِيمِ وَالاِسْتِئْذَانِ ثَلاَثًا
titles.english: Chapter: To greet and ask permission thrice

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا دُعِيَ الرَّجُلُ فَجَاءَ هَلْ يَسْتَأْذِنُ
titles.english: Chapter: If a man is invited, should he ask permission to enter

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْلِيمِ عَلَى الصِّبْيَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To greet the boys

titles.arabic: باب تَسْلِيمِ الرِّجَالِ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَالنِّسَاءِ عَلَى الرِّجَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: Greeting of men to women, and women to men

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ مَنْ ذَا فَقَالَ أَنَا
titles.english: Chapter: Asking, "Who is that?"

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَدَّ فَقَالَ عَلَيْكَ السَّلاَمُ
titles.english: Chapter: To reply a greeting saying, "Alaikas-Salam"

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ فُلاَنٌ يُقْرِئُكَ السَّلاَمَ
titles.english: Chapter: If one says, "So-and-so sends Salam to you"

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْلِيمِ فِي مَجْلِسٍ فِيهِ أَخْلاَطٌ مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَالْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Greeting a mix-up gathering

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يُسَلِّمْ عَلَى مَنِ اقْتَرَفَ ذَنْبًا وَلَمْ يَرُدَّ سَلاَمَهُ حَتَّى تَتَبَيَّنَ تَوْبَتُه، وَإِلَى مَتَى تَتَبَيَّنُ تَوْبَةُ الْعَاصِي
titles.english: Chapter: He who does not greet a person who has committed a sin

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يُرَدُّ عَلَى أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ السَّلاَمُ
titles.english: Chapter: How to return the greeting of Dhimmi

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَظَرَ فِي كِتَابِ مَنْ يُحْذَرُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِينَ لِيَسْتَبِينَ أَمْرُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The one who looks at a letter in order to know its written contents

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يُكْتَبُ الْكِتَابُ إِلَى أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: How to write a letter to the people of the Scripture

titles.arabic: باب بِمَنْ يُبْدَأُ فِي الْكِتَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whose name is to be written first in a letter

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ قُومُوا إِلَى سَيِّدِكُمْ ‏"‏‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: "Get up for your chief!"

titles.arabic: باب الْمُصَافَحَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Shaking hands

titles.arabic: باب الأَخْذِ بِالْيَدَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The shaking of hands with both the hands

titles.arabic: باب الْمُعَانَقَةِ وَقَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ كَيْفَ أَصْبَحْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Mu'anaqa

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَجَابَ بِلَبَّيْكَ وَسَعْدَيْكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever replies saying, "Labbaik wa Sa'daik"

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُقِيمُ الرَّجُلُ الرَّجُلَ مِنْ مَجْلِسِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A man should not make another get up from his seat

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمْ تَفَسَّحُوا فِي الْمَجَالِسِ فَافْسَحُوا يَفْسَحِ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ وَإِذَا قِيلَ انْشِزُوا فَانْشِزُوا} الآيَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: "When you are told to make room in the assemblies, make room..."

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ قَامَ مِنْ مَجْلِسِهِ أَوْ بَيْتِهِ، وَلَمْ يَسْتَأْذِنْ أَصْحَابَهُ، أَوْ تَهَيَّأَ لِلْقِيَامِ لِيَقُومَ النَّاسُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever got up from his gathering that the people might get up

titles.arabic: باب الاِحْتِبَاءِ بِالْيَدِ وَهُوَ الْقُرْفُصَاءُ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-ihtiba with the hand

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اتَّكَأَ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ أَصْحَابِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever sat in a relining posture

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَسْرَعَ فِي مَشْيِهِ لِحَاجَةٍ أَوْ قَصْدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The one who walks quickly for some necessity

titles.arabic: باب السَّرِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The bed.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أُلْقِيَ لَهُ وِسَادَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Anyone for whom a cushion was put

titles.arabic: باب الْقَائِلَةِ بَعْدَ الْجُمُعَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: After Al-Jumu'ah (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الْقَائِلَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mid-day nap in the Mosque

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ زَارَ قَوْمًا فَقَالَ عِنْدَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever visited some people and had a mid-day nap

titles.arabic: باب الْجُلُوسِ كَيْفَمَا تَيَسَّرَ
titles.english: Chapter: Sitting in any convenient position

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَاجَى بَيْنَ يَدَىِ النَّاسِ وَمَنْ لَمْ يُخْبِرْ بِسِرِّ صَاحِبِهِ، فَإِذَا مَاتَ أَخْبَرَ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Confidential talk with somebody in front of the people

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِلْقَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Istilqa' (lying flat)

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَتَنَاجَى اثْنَانِ دُونَ الثَّالِثِ
titles.english: Chapter: No two persons should talk secretly excluding a third person

titles.arabic: باب حِفْظِ السِّرِّ
titles.english: Chapter: Keeping secrets

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا كَانُوا أَكْثَرَ مِنْ ثَلاَثَةٍ فَلاَ بَأْسَ بِالْمُسَارَّةِ وَالْمُنَاجَاةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Two to have a secret talk in a gathering of more than three

titles.arabic: باب طُولِ النَّجْوَى
titles.english: Chapter: Holding secret counsel for a long while

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تُتْرَكُ النَّارُ فِي الْبَيْتِ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Fire should not be kept lit at bedtime.

titles.arabic: باب إِغْلاَقِ الأَبْوَابِ بِاللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To close the doors at night

titles.arabic: باب الْخِتَانِ بَعْدَ الْكِبَرِ وَنَتْفِ الإِبْطِ
titles.english: Chapter: Circumcision at an old age, and pulling out armpit hair

titles.arabic: باب كُلُّ لَهْوٍ بَاطِلٌ إِذَا شَغَلَهُ عَنْ طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Every Lahw is Batil

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْبِنَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The buildings

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ فُرِضَتِ الصَّلاَةُ فِي الإِسْرَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: How As-Salat (the Prayer) was prescribed on the night of Al-Isra (miraculous night journey) of the Prophet (pbuh) to Jerusalem (and then to the heavens)

titles.arabic: باب وُجُوبِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي الثِّيَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is obligatory to wear clothes while offering As-Salat (the prayers)

titles.arabic: باب عَقْدِ الإِزَارِ عَلَى الْقَفَا فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To tie Izar (dress worn below the waist) at one's back while offering Salat (prayers)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي الثَّوْبِ الْوَاحِدِ مُلْتَحِفًا بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayers) with a single garment wrapped round the body

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا صَلَّى فِي الثَّوْبِ الْوَاحِدِ فَلْيَجْعَلْ عَلَى عَاتِقَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone offers Salat (prayer) wrapped in a single garment, he should cross its corners round his shoulders

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا كَانَ الثَّوْبُ ضَيِّقًا
titles.english: Chapter: If the garment is tight (over the body)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْجُبَّةِ الشَّأْمِيَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayers) in a Syrian cloak (made by infidels)

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ التَّعَرِّي فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to the naked during As-Salat (the prayers)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْقَمِيصِ وَالسَّرَاوِيلِ وَالتُّبَّانِ وَالْقَبَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Salat (prayer) with a shirt, trousers, a Tubban or a Qaba (an outer garment with full length sleeves)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَسْتُرُ مِنَ الْعَوْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What may be used to cover the private parts of the body

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ بِغَيْرِ رِدَاءٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To pray without a Rida

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُذْكَرُ فِي الْفَخِذِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said about the thigh

titles.arabic: باب فِي كَمْ تُصَلِّي الْمَرْأَةُ فِي الثِّيَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: In how many (what sort of) clothes a woman should offer Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا صَلَّى فِي ثَوْبٍ لَهُ أَعْلاَمٌ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى عَلَمِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: If a person offered Salat (prayer) in a dress with marks and looked at those marks during the Salat

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِنْ صَلَّى فِي ثَوْبٍ مُصَلَّبٍ أَوْ تَصَاوِيرَ هَلْ تَفْسُدُ صَلاَتُهُ وَمَا يُنْهَى عَنْ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone offers Salat (prayer) in a garment bearing marks of a cross or picture, will he Salat be annulled? And what is forbidden thereof

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى فِي فَرُّوجِ حَرِيرٍ ثُمَّ نَزَعَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever offered Salat (prayer)in a silk Farruj (an outer garment opened at the back) and then took it off.

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي الثَّوْبِ الأَحْمَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: (It is permissible) to offer Salat (prayer) in a red garment

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي السُّطُوحِ وَالْمِنْبَرِ وَالْخَشَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: (It is permissible) to offer Salat (prayer) on roofs, a pulpit or wood

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَصَابَ ثَوْبُ الْمُصَلِّي امْرَأَتَهُ إِذَا سَجَدَ
titles.english: Chapter: If the clothes of a prayer person in prostration touched his wife [would that make his Salat (prayer) invalid]?

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْحَصِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayers) on the Hasir (a mat that is made of the leaves of date-palm trees and is as long as or longer than a man's stature)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْخُمْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayers) on a Khumra (a small mat, hardly sufficient for the face and hands while prostrating during Salat)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى الْفِرَاشِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayers) on the bed

titles.arabic: باب السُّجُودِ عَلَى الثَّوْبِ فِي شِدَّةِ الْحَرِّ
titles.english: Chapter: To prostrate on a garment in scorching heat

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي النِّعَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Salat (prayer) with the shoes on

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْخِفَافِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayers) wearing Khuff (leather socks)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُتِمَّ السُّجُودَ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone does not prostrate properly

titles.arabic: باب يُبْدِي ضَبْعَيْهِ وَيُجَافِي فِي السُّجُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: During Prostrations one should show his armpits and separate his forearms from his body

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ اسْتِقْبَالِ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of (praying) facing the Qiblah with the toes toward it as well

titles.arabic: باب قِبْلَةِ أَهْلِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَأَهْلِ الشَّأْمِ وَالْمَشْرِقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Qiblah for the people of Al-Madina, Sham and the East.

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَاتَّخِذُوا مِنْ مَقَامِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ مُصَلًّى}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah " And take you (people) the Maqam (place) of Ibrahim (Abraham) (or the stone on which Abrahim stood while he was building the Kabah as a place of prayer (for some of your Salat e.g., two Raka after the Tawaf of Kabah)"

titles.arabic: باب التَّوَجُّهِ نَحْوَ الْقِبْلَةِ حَيْثُ كَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: [During the obligatory Salat (prayers)] one should face the Qiblah (Kabah at Makkah) wherever one may be

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِبْلَةِ، وَمَنْ لاَ يَرَى الإِعَادَةَ عَلَى مَنْ سَهَا فَصَلَّى إِلَى غَيْرِ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What has been said about (facing) the Qiblah (Kabah at Makkah) and wherever considered that there was no need to repeat the Salat (prayer) if someone offered prayers by mistake facing a direction other than that of the Qiblah

titles.arabic: باب حَكِّ الْبُزَاقِ بِالْيَدِ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To scrape off the sputum from the mosque with the hand (using some tool or other, or using n tool)

titles.arabic: باب حَكِّ الْمُخَاطِ بِالْحَصَى مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To scrape the nasal secretion off the mosque with gravel

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَبْصُقْ عَنْ يَمِينِهِ، فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is forbidden to spit on the right side while in Salat (prayers)

titles.arabic: باب لِيَبْزُقْ عَنْ يَسَارِهِ، أَوْ تَحْتَ قَدَمِهِ الْيُسْرَى
titles.english: Chapter: One should spit on the left side or under one's left foot

titles.arabic: باب كَفَّارَةِ الْبُزَاقِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The expiation for spitting in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب دَفْنِ النُّخَامَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The burying of the expectoration in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَدَرَهُ الْبُزَاقُ فَلْيَأْخُذْ بِطَرَفِ ثَوْبِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If the spit or sputum comes out suddenly then one should spit in the corner of one's garnet

titles.arabic: باب عِظَةِ الإِمَامِ النَّاسَ فِي إِتْمَامِ الصَّلاَةِ، وَذِكْرِ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Preaching of the Imam to the people regarding the proper offering of As-Salat (the prayers) and the mention of the Qiblah (Kabah at Makkah)

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يُقَالُ مَسْجِدُ بَنِي فُلاَنٍ
titles.english: Chapter: It is permissible to say, "Masjid (mosque) of Bani so-and-so?

titles.arabic: باب الْقِسْمَةِ وَتَعْلِيقِ الْقِنْوِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The distribution (of goods or wealh) and the hanging of a cluster of dates in the mosque.

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ دَعَا لِطَعَامٍ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ وَمَنْ أَجَابَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Receivng and invitation to dinner in the mosque and accepting it

titles.arabic: باب الْقَضَاءِ وَاللِّعَانِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ بَيْنَ الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To give the judicial verdicts in the mosque and to perform the Al-Lian between men and women (husbands and wives) there

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا دَخَلَ بَيْتًا يُصَلِّي حَيْثُ شَاءَ، أَوْ حَيْثُ أُمِرَ، وَلاَ يَتَجَسَّسُ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone enters a house, should he offer prayers where he likes, or as he is told? And he should not look out to seek information about the place or do spying

titles.arabic: باب الْمَسَاجِدِ فِي الْبُيُوتِ
titles.english: Chapter: About (taking) the mosques in the houses

titles.arabic: باب التَّيَمُّنِ فِي دُخُولِ الْمَسْجِدِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: While entering the mosques etc. one should start with the right foot

titles.arabic: بَابُ هَلْ تُنْبَشُ قُبُورُ مُشْرِكِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ، وَيُتَّخَذُ مَكَانَهَا مَسَاجِدَ
titles.english: Chapter: Is it permissible to dig the graves of pagans of the period of Ignorance, and to use that place as a mosque?

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَرَابِضِ الْغَنَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) in a sheep-fold

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَوَاضِعِ الإِبِلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) in the camel yards (the places where the camels are stationed)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى وَقُدَّامَهُ تَنُّورٌ أَوْ نَارٌ أَوْ شَىْءٌ مِمَّا يُعْبَدُ، فَأَرَادَ بِهِ اللَّهَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever offered Salat (prayer) with furnace or fire or any other worshipable thing in front of him but he intended Salat solely for Allah

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْمَقَابِرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The dislikeness of offering As-Salat (the prayers) in grave-yards

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَوَاضِعِ الْخَسْفِ وَالْعَذَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said about) offering Salat (Prayer) at the places where the earth had sunk down and Allah's punishment had fallen

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْبِيعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) in a church or in a temple etc.
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ جُعِلَتْ لِيَ الأَرْضُ مَسْجِدًا وَطَهُورًا ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: The sayings of the Prophet (pbuh) "The earth has been made for me a Masjid (place for praying) and a thing to purify (to perform Tayammum)."

titles.arabic: باب نَوْمِ الْمَرْأَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sleeping of a woman in the mosque (and residing in it)

titles.arabic: باب نَوْمِ الرِّجَالِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sleeping of a men in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ إِذَا قَدِمَ مِنْ سَفَرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) whe returning from a journey

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا دَخَلَ الْمَسْجِدَ فَلْيَرْكَعْ رَكْعَتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: If one entered a mosque, one should offer two Rak'a (Tahayyat-al-Masjid) before sitting

titles.arabic: باب الْحَدَثِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Hadath (passing wind) in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب بُنْيَانِ الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The construction of (the prophet's pbuh) mosque

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَاوُنِ فِي بِنَاءِ الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To co-operate in building a mosque

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِعَانَةِ بِالنَّجَّارِ وَالصُّنَّاعِ فِي أَعْوَادِ الْمِنْبَرِ وَالْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Employing the carpenter and the technical hand (artsan) in making the wooden pulpit or building the mosque

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَنَى مَسْجِدًا
titles.english: Chapter: (The superiority of) whoever built a mosque

titles.arabic: باب يَأْخُذُ بِنُصُولِ النَّبْلِ إِذَا مَرَّ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: While passing through a mosque, (one should better) hold the arrowheads (with the hand)

titles.arabic: باب الْمُرُورِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Passing through the mosque (is permissible)

titles.arabic: باب الشِّعْرِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: (What is said about) reciting poetry in the mosque?

titles.arabic: باب أَصْحَابِ الْحِرَابِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The presence of spearmen (with their spears) in the mosque (is permissible)

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْبَيْعِ وَالشِّرَاءِ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning about sales and purchases on the pulpit in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب التَّقَاضِي وَالْمُلاَزَمَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Asking a debtor to repay what he owes and catching the debtor in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب كَنْسِ الْمَسْجِدِ وَالْتِقَاطِ الْخِرَقِ وَالْقَذَى وَالْعِيدَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sweeping (cleaning) of the mosque and removing rags, dirt and sticks from it

titles.arabic: باب تَحْرِيمِ تِجَارَةِ الْخَمْرِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The order of banning the trade of alcoholic drinks was issues in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الْخَدَمِ لِلْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Servants for the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الأَسِيرِ أَوِ الْغَرِيمِ يُرْبَطُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To fasten a prisoner or a debtor in the mosque

titles.arabic: بَابُ الاِغْتِسَالِ إِذَا أَسْلَمَ، وَرَبْطِ الأَسِيرِ أَيْضًا فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: To take a bath on embracing Islam and fasten a prisoner in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الْخَيْمَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ لِلْمَرْضَى وَغَيْرِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: To pitch a tent in the mosque for patients, etc

titles.arabic: باب إِدْخَالِ الْبَعِيرِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ لِلْعِلَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To take the camel inside the mosque if necessary
Chapter: Chaper

titles.arabic: باب الْخَوْخَةِ وَالْمَمَرِّ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Khaukhah (a small door) and a path in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الأَبْوَابِ وَالْغَلَقِ لِلْكَعْبَةِ وَالْمَسَاجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The doors and locks of the Kabah and the mosques

titles.arabic: باب دُخُولِ الْمُشْرِكِ الْمَسْجِدَ
titles.english: Chapter: The entering of a pagan in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الصَّوْتِ فِي الْمَسَاجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Raising the voice in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الْحِلَقِ وَالْجُلُوسِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The religious gathering in circles and sitting in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِلْقَاءِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ وَمَدِّ الرِّجْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To lie flat (on the back) in the mosque

titles.arabic: باب الْمَسْجِدِ يَكُونُ فِي الطَّرِيقِ مِنْ غَيْرِ ضَرَرٍ بِالنَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: (If) a mosque (is built) on a road, it should not be a cause of harm for the people

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ السُّوقِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayers) in a mosque situated in a market

titles.arabic: باب تَشْبِيكِ الأَصَابِعِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To clasp one's hands by interlocking the fingers in the mosque or outside the mosque

titles.arabic: بَابُ الْمَسَاجِدِ الَّتِي عَلَى طُرُقِ الْمَدِينَةِ، وَالْمَوَاضِعِ الَّتِي صَلَّى فِيهَا النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
titles.english: Chapter: The mosques which are on the way to Al-Madina and the places where the Prophet (pbuh) had offered Salat (Prayers)

titles.arabic: باب سُتْرَةُ الإِمَامِ سُتْرَةُ مَنْ خَلْفَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Sutra of the Imam is also a Sutra for those who are behind him

titles.arabic: باب قَدْرِ كَمْ يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يَكُونَ بَيْنَ الْمُصَلِّي وَالسُّتْرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What should be the distance between the person offering Salat (prayer) and the Sutra?

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ إِلَى الْحَرْبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) using a Harba (a short spear) (as a Sutra)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ إِلَى الْعَنَزَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) using an 'Anaza (a spear-headed stick) (as a Sutra)

titles.arabic: باب السُّتْرَةِ بِمَكَّةَ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Sutra (for the prayer)in Makkah and elsewhere.

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ إِلَى الأُسْطُوَانَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) facing a pillar

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ بَيْنَ السَّوَارِي فِي غَيْرِ جَمَاعَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer non-congregational As-Salat (the prayers) between the pillars
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ إِلَى الرَّاحِلَةِ وَالْبَعِيرِ وَالشَّجَرِ وَالرَّحْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) facing a Rahila camel, a tree or a camel saddle as a Sutra).

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ إِلَى السَّرِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) facing a bed

titles.arabic: باب يَرُدُّ الْمُصَلِّي مَنْ مَرَّ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The person offering Salat (prayer) should repulse that person who tries to pass in front of him

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ الْمَارِّ بَيْنَ يَدَىِ الْمُصَلِّي
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of a person who passes in front of a person offering Salat

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِقْبَالِ الرَّجُلِ صَاحِبَهُ أَوْ غَيْرَهُ فِي صَلاَتِهِ وَهُوَ يُصَلِّي
titles.english: Chapter: A man facing a man while offering Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ خَلْفَ النَّائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer As-Salat (the prayer) behind a sleeping person

titles.arabic: باب التَّطَوُّعِ خَلْفَ الْمَرْأَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Nawafil (non-obligatory prayers) behind a sleeping woman

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَالَ لاَ يَقْطَعُ الصَّلاَةَ شَىْءٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever says "Nothing annuls As-Salat (the prayer) (i.e. nothing of what others do, not the praying person himself)."

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا حَمَلَ جَارِيَةً صَغِيرَةً عَلَى عُنُقِهِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a small girl is carried on one's neck during the Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا صَلَّى إِلَى فِرَاشٍ فِيهِ حَائِضٌ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer Salat (prayer) facing a bed occupied by a menstruatng woman

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَغْمِزُ الرَّجُلُ امْرَأَتَهُ عِنْدَ السُّجُودِ لِكَىْ يَسْجُدَ
titles.english: Chapter: Is it permissible to touch or push one's wife in prostration in order to prostrate properly?

titles.arabic: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَطْرَحُ عَنِ الْمُصَلِّي، شَيْئًا مِنَ الأَذَى
titles.english: Chapter: A woman can remove troublesome or offensive things from a person in Salat (prayer)

titles.arabic: باب وَلِكُلِّ نَبِيٍّ دَعْوَةٌ مُسْتَجَابَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: For every Prophet there is one invocation surely granted

titles.arabic: باب أَفْضَلِ الاِسْتِغْفَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Afdal Al-Istighfar

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِغْفَارِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي الْيَوْمِ وَاللَّيْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Seeking Allah's forgiveness by daytime and at night

titles.arabic: باب التَّوْبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: At-Tauba

titles.arabic: باب الضَّجْعِ عَلَى الشِّقِّ الأَيْمَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Lying on right side

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَاتَ طَاهِرًا
titles.english: Chapter: To sleep with ablution

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا نَامَ
titles.english: Chapter: What to say on going to bed

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى تَحْتَ الْخَدِّ الأَيْمَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Putting right hand under right cheek on sleeping

titles.arabic: باب النَّوْمِ عَلَى الشِّقِّ الأَيْمَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Sleeping on the right side

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا انْتَبَهَ بِاللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation by one who wakes up at night

titles.arabic: باب التَّكْبِيرِ وَالتَّسْبِيحِ عِنْدَ الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Saying Takbir and Tasbih on going to bed

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ وَالْقِرَاءَةِ عِنْدَ الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Taking refuge with Allah, and the recitation before going to bed
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ نِصْفَ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation in the middle of the night

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ الْخَلاَءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What to say when going to the lavatory

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا أَصْبَحَ
titles.english: Chapter: What to say when one gets up in the morning

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation during the Salat

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ بَعْدَ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation after the Salat

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: "... And invoke Allah for them ..."

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ السَّجْعِ فِي الدُّعَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What rhymed prose is disapproved in invocations

titles.arabic: باب لِيَعْزِمِ الْمَسْأَلَةَ، فَإِنَّهُ لاَ مُكْرِهَ لَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: One should appeal to Allah with determination

titles.arabic: باب يُسْتَجَابُ لِلْعَبْدِ مَا لَمْ يَعْجَلْ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation is granted by Allah if impatience is not shown

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الأَيْدِي فِي الدُّعَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The raising of the hands on invoking

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ غَيْرَ مُسْتَقْبِلِ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah while not facing the Qiblah

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ مُسْتَقْبِلَ الْقِبْلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah while facing the Qiblah

titles.arabic: باب دَعْوَةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لِخَادِمِهِ بِطُولِ الْعُمُرِ وَبِكَثْرَةِ مَالِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation of the Prophet (saws) for his servant

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ الْكَرْبِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah at a time of distress

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ جَهْدِ الْبَلاَءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from a calamity

titles.arabic: باب دُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ اللَّهُمَّ الرَّفِيقَ الأَعْلَى ‏"‏‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation of the Prophet (saws) "O Allah! The Highest Companion"

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ بِالْمَوْتِ وَالْحَيَاةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation for death or life

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ لِلصِّبْيَانِ بِالْبَرَكَةِ وَمَسْحِ رُءُوسِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke for Allah's Blessings upon the children

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salat upon the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: بَابُ هَلْ يُصَلَّى عَلَى غَيْرِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
titles.english: Chapter: Can one send Salat on anybody other than the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏{‏مَنْ آذَيْتُهُ فَاجْعَلْهُ لَهُ زَكَاةً وَرَحْمَةً‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: "If I should harm somebody, let that be a means of purification and mercy for him."

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنَ الْفِتَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from Al-Fitan

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from being overpowered

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge from punishment of the grave

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from the Fitnah of life and death

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنَ الْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from all kinds of sins and from being in debt

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِعَاذَةِ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْكَسَلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from cowardice and laziness

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنَ الْبُخْلِ‏.‏ الْبُخْلُ وَالْبَخَلُ وَاحِدٌ، مِثْلُ الْحُزْنِ وَالْحَزَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from miserliness

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ‏.‏ ‏{‏أَرَاذِلُنَا‏}‏ أَسْقَاطُنَا
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from senile old age

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ بِرَفْعِ الْوَبَاءِ وَالْوَجَعِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah to take away epidemic and diseases

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِعَاذَةِ مِنْ أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الدُّنْيَا وَفِتْنَةِ النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge from senile old age and Fitnah

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِعَاذَةِ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْغِنَى
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge from the Fitnah of wealth

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْفَقْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge from the Fitnah of poverty

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ بِكَثْرَةِ الْمَالِ وَالوَلَدِ مَعَ الْبَرَكَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation for increase in wealth, offspring and blessing

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ بِكَثْرَةِ الوَلَدِ مَعَ الْبَرَكَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke for increase of offspring, along with His Blessings.

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ الاِسْتِخَارَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation on making Istikharah

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ الْوُضُوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invoking Allah while performing ablution

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا عَلاَ عَقَبَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Invoking Allah while ascending a high place

titles.arabic: بَابُ الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا هَبَطَ وَادِيًا
titles.english: Chapter: Invoking Allah while going down a valley

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا أَرَادَ سَفَرًا أَوْ رَجَعَ
titles.english: Chapter: The invocation while going on a journey or returning

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ لِلْمُتَزَوِّجِ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation for a bridegroom

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ إِذَا أَتَى أَهْلَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: What one should say before having sexual intercourse with his wife

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً»
titles.english: Chapter: "Our Lord! Give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good and save us from the torment of the Fire!"

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الدُّنْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge from the fitnah of the world

titles.arabic: باب تَكْرِيرِ الدُّعَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: To repeat the invocation

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ عَلَى الْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah against Al-Mushrikun

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ لِلْمُشْرِكِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Invocation in favor of Mushrikun

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ ‏"‏‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: "O Allah! Forgive my past and future sins."

titles.arabic: باب الدُّعَاءِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الَّتِي فِي يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To invoke Allah during a particular time on Friday

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «يُسْتَجَابُ لَنَا فِي الْيَهُودِ، وَلاَ يُسْتَجَابُ لَهُمْ فِينَا»:
titles.english: Chapter: "Our invocation against the Jews will be accepted, but theirs will not be accepted."

titles.arabic: باب التَّأْمِينِ
titles.english: Chapter: The saying of 'Amin'

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّهْلِيلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of saying "La ilaha ill-Allah"

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ التَّسْبِيحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of Tasbih

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of Dhikr of Allah 'Azza wa Jall

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: 'La haula wa la quwwata illa billah'

titles.arabic: باب لِلَّهِ مِائَةُ اسْمٍ غَيْرَ وَاحِدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Allah has one hundred Names less one

titles.arabic: باب الْمَوْعِظَةِ سَاعَةً بَعْدَ سَاعَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Preaching at intervals

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرِّقَاقِ وَأَنْ لاَ عَيْشَ إِلاَّ عَيْشُ الآخِرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Health and leisure

titles.arabic: باب مَثَلِ الدُّنْيَا فِي الآخِرَةِ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The example of this world in contrast with the Hereafter

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ كُنْ فِي الدُّنْيَا كَأَنَّكَ غَرِيبٌ، أَوْ عَابِرُ سَبِيلٍ ‏"
titles.english: Chapter: "Be in this world as if you were a stranger."

titles.arabic: باب فِي الأَمَلِ وَطُولِهِ‏
titles.english: Chapter: About hope and hoping too much

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَلَغَ سِتِّينَ سَنَةً فَقَدْ أَعْذَرَ اللَّهُ إِلَيْهِ فِي الْعُمُرِ‏
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody reaches sixty years of age, he has no right to ask Allah for a new lease of life.

titles.arabic: باب الْعَمَلِ الَّذِي يُبْتَغَى بِهِ وَجْهُ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The deed which is done seeking Allah's Countenance

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُحْذَرُ مِنْ زَهْرَةِ الدُّنْيَا وَالتَّنَافُسِ فِيهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The warning regarding worldly pleasures, amusements and competing against each other

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ فَلاَ تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا وَلاَ يَغُرَّنَّكُمْ بِاللَّهِ الْغَرُورُ إِنَّ الشَّيْطَانَ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ فَاتَّخِذُوهُ عَدُوًّا إِنَّمَا يَدْعُو حِزْبَهُ لِيَكُونُوا مِنْ أَصْحَابِ السَّعِيرِ}
titles.english: Chapter: "O mankind! Verily the Promise of Allah is true. So let not this present life deceive you ..."

titles.arabic: باب ذَهَابِ الصَّالِحِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The righteous people will depart

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُتَّقَى مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَالِ‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Fitnah of wealth should be warded off

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «هَذَا الْمَالُ خَضِرَةٌ حُلْوَةٌ»
titles.english: Chapter: "Wealth is green sweet."

titles.arabic: باب مَا قَدَّمَ مِنْ مَالِهِ فَهْوَ لَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whatever one spends from his money will be better for him

titles.arabic: باب الْمُكْثِرُونَ هُمُ الْمُقِلُّونَ
titles.english: Chapter: The rich are in fact the poor

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ مَا أُحِبُّ أَنَّ لِي مِثْلَ أُحُدٍ ذَهَبًا ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: "It would not please me to have gold equal to this mountain of Uhud"

titles.arabic: باب الْغِنَى غِنَى النَّفْسِ‏
titles.english: Chapter: True riches is self-contentment

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْفَقْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of being poor

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ كَانَ عَيْشُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَأَصْحَابِهِ، وَتَخَلِّيهِمْ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: How the Prophet (saws) and his Companions used to live

titles.arabic: باب الْقَصْدِ وَالْمُدَاوَمَةِ عَلَى الْعَمَلِ
titles.english: Chapter: The adoption of a middle course, and the regularity of deeds

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجَاءِ مَعَ الْخَوْفِ
titles.english: Chapter: Hope with fear

titles.arabic: باب الصَّبْرِ عَنْ مَحَارِمِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Refraining from doing things Allah has made illegal

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَمَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: "... And whosoever puts his trust in Allah, then He will suffice him ..."

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ قِيلَ وَقَالَ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked about Qil and Qal

titles.arabic: باب حِفْظِ اللِّسَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To protect one's tongue

titles.arabic: باب الْبُكَاءِ مِنْ خَشْيَةِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Weeping out of fear of Allah

titles.arabic: باب الْخَوْفِ مِنَ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To be afraid of Allah 'Azza wa Jall

titles.arabic: باب الاِنْتِهَاءِ عَنِ الْمَعَاصِي
titles.english: Chapter: To give up sinful deeds

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ مَا أَعْلَمُ لَضَحِكْتُمْ قَلِيلاً، وَلَبَكَيْتُمْ كَثِيرًا»
titles.english: Chapter: "If you knew that which I know, you would laugh little and weep much"

titles.arabic: باب حُجِبَتِ النَّارُ بِالشَّهَوَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Fire is surrounded by al kinds of desires and passions.

titles.arabic: باب ‏"‏ الْجَنَّةُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَى أَحَدِكُمْ مِنْ شِرَاكِ نَعْلِهِ، وَالنَّارُ مِثْلُ ذَلِكَ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: Paradise is nearer to anyone of you than the Shirak of his shoe, and so is the Fire.

titles.arabic: باب لِيَنْظُرْ إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ أَسْفَلَ مِنْهُ وَلاَ يَنْظُرْ إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ فَوْقَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To look at the one who is inferior to and not the superior

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ هَمَّ بِحَسَنَةٍ أَوْ بِسَيِّئَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever intended to do a good deed or a bad deed

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُتَّقَى مِنْ مُحَقَّرَاتِ الذُّنُوبِ
titles.english: Chapter: What minor sins should be warded off

titles.arabic: باب الأَعْمَالُ بِالْخَوَاتِيمِ وَمَا يُخَافُ مِنْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The deeds done depend upon the last actions

titles.arabic: باب الْعُزْلَةُ رَاحَةٌ مِنْ خُلاَّطِ السُّوءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Seclusion is better for a believer than to have evil companions

titles.arabic: باب رَفْعِ الأَمَانَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The disappearance of Al-Amanah

titles.arabic: باب الرِّيَاءِ وَالسُّمْعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter. Showing Off

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ جَاهَدَ نَفْسَهُ فِي طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever compelled himself to obey Allah

titles.arabic: باب التَّوَاضُعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The humility or modesty or lowliness

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: «بُعِثْتُ أَنَا وَالسَّاعَةَ كَهَاتَيْنِ»
titles.english: Chapter: "I have been sent, and the Hour as these two"
Chapter: The rising of the sun from the west

titles.arabic: باب ‏"‏ مَنْ أَحَبَّ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ لِقَاءَهُ ‏"‏
