titles.english: Chapter: Whoever loves to meet Allah, Allah loves to meet him

titles.arabic: باب سَكَرَاتِ الْمَوْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The stupors of death

titles.arabic: باب نَفْخِ الصُّورِ
titles.english: Chapter: The blowing of the Trumpet, on the Day of Resurrection

titles.arabic: باب يَقْبِضُ اللَّهُ الأَرْضَ
titles.english: Chapter: On the Day of Resurrection, Allah will grasp the whole earth

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ الْحَشْرُ
titles.english: Chapter: The gathering (on the Day of Resurrection)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ: {إِنَّ زَلْزَلَةَ السَّاعَةِ شَيْءٌ عَظِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: Who associate others in worship with Allah

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {أَلاَ يَظُنُّ أُولَئِكَ أَنَّهُمْ مَبْعُوثُونَ لِيَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ النَّاسُ لِرَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ}
titles.english: Chapter: "Think they not that they will be resurrected on a Great Day"

titles.arabic: باب الْقِصَاصِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Qisas on the Day of Resurrection

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نُوقِشَ الْحِسَابَ عُذِّبَ
titles.english: Chapter: Anybody whose account is questioned will surely be punished

titles.arabic: باب يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفًا بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Seventy thousand will enter Paradise without accounts.

titles.arabic: باب صِفَةِ الْجَنَّةِ وَالنَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The description of Paradise and the Fire

titles.arabic: باب الصِّرَاطُ جَسْرُ جَهَنَّمَ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Sirat is a bridge across the Hell.

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْحَوْضِ
titles.english: Chapter: Regarding Al-Haud

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْقَدَرِ
titles.english: Chapter

titles.arabic: باب جَفَّ الْقَلَمُ عَلَى عِلْمِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The pen has become dry with Allah's Knowledge

titles.arabic: باب اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا كَانُوا عَامِلِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: It is Allah Who knows what they would have done

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏وَكَانَ أَمْرُ اللَّهِ قَدَرًا مَقْدُورًا‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: "And the Command of Allah is a decree determined"

titles.arabic: باب الْعَمَلُ بِالْخَوَاتِيمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The reward for deeds depends upon last action

titles.arabic: باب إِلْقَاءِ النَّذْرِ الْعَبْدَ إِلَى الْقَدَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Man makes a vow seeking something other than what has been preordained

titles.arabic: باب لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: La haula wa la quwwata illa billah

titles.arabic: باب الْمَعْصُومُ مَنْ عَصَمَ اللَّهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Ma'sum is the one whom Allah protects

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {وَحَرَامٌ عَلَى قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنَاهَا أَنَّهُمْ لاَ يَرْجِعُونَ}، {أَنَّهُ لَنْ يُؤْمِنَ مِنْ قَوْمِكَ إِلاَّ مَنْ قَدْ آمَنَ}، {وَلاَ يَلِدُوا إِلاَّ فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا}
titles.english: Chapter: "And a ban is laid on every town which We have destroyed that they shall not return." " ... None of your people will believe, except those who have believed, already ..." " ... And they will beget none but wicked disbelievers."

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {وَمَا جَعَلْنَا الرُّؤْيَا الَّتِي أَرَيْنَاكَ إِلاَّ فِتْنَةً لِلنَّاسِ}
titles.english: Chapter: "... And We made not the vision which We showed you but a trial for the mankind..."

titles.arabic: باب تَحَاجَّ آدَمُ وَمُوسَى عِنْدَ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Adam and Musa argued with each other in front of Allah

titles.arabic: باب لاَ مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَى اللَّهُ
titles.english: Chapter: No power can withhold what Allah gives

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ تَعَوَّذَ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ دَرَكِ الشَّقَاءِ وَسُوءِ الْقَضَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Refuge with Allah from having an evil end of the worldly life and having a bad fate

titles.arabic: باب يَحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: "... (Allah) comes in between a person and his heart"

titles.arabic: باب ‏ {‏قُلْ لَنْ يُصِيبَنَا إِلاَّ مَا كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَنَا‏} ‏ قضَى
titles.english: Chapter: "Say: 'Nothing shall ever happen to us except what Allah has ordained for us ...'"

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلاَ أَنْ هَدَانَا اللَّهُ}
titles.english: Chapter: "... Never could we have found guidance, were it not that Allah had guided us ..."

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلُ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {لاَ يُؤَاخِذُكُمُ اللَّهُ بِاللَّغْوِ فِي أَيْمَانِكُمْ وَلَكِنْ يُؤَاخِذُكُمْ بِمَا عَقَّدْتُمُ الأَيْمَانَ فَكَفَّارَتُهُ إِطْعَامُ عَشَرَةِ مَسَاكِينَ مِنْ أَوْسَطِ مَا تُطْعِمُونَ أَهْلِيكُمْ أَوْ كِسْوَتُهُمْ أَوْ تَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ فَمَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ فَصِيَامُ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ ذَلِكَ كَفَّارَةُ أَيْمَانِكُمْ إِذَا حَلَفْتُمْ وَاحْفَظُوا أَيْمَانَكُمْ كَذَلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ آيَاتِهِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: "Allah will not punish you for what is unintentional in your oaths, but He will punish you for your deliberate oaths ..."

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏{‏وَايْمُ اللَّهِ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: The statement of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ كَانَتْ يَمِينُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: How did the oaths of the Prophet (saws) use to be?

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَحْلِفُوا بِآبَائِكُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: "Do not swear by your fathers"

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُحْلَفُ بِاللاَّتِ وَالْعُزَّى وَلاَ بِالطَّوَاغِيتِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not swear by Al-Lat and Al-'Uzza or by any false deities

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى الشَّىْءِ وَإِنْ لَمْ يُحَلَّفْ
titles.english: Chapter: The one who gives an oath regarding something although he has not been asked to give an oath

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ حَلَفَ بِمِلَّةٍ سِوَى مِلَّةِ الإِسْلاَمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever swears by a religion other than Islam

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَقُولُ مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ وَشِئْتَ‏.‏ وَهَلْ يَقُولُ أَنَا بِاللَّهِ ثُمَّ بِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not say: "Whatever Allah wills and whatever you will."

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَأَقْسَمُوا بِاللَّهِ جَهْدَ أَيْمَانِهِمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: "They swear by Allah their strongest oaths that ..."

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ أَشْهَدُ بِاللَّهِ، أَوْ شَهِدْتُ بِاللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: "I bear witness swearing by Allah"

titles.arabic: باب عَهْدِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
titles.english: Chapter: The Covenant of Allah 'Azza wa Jall

titles.arabic: باب الْحَلِفِ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَصِفَاتِهِ وَكَلِمَاتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To swear by Allah's 'Izza, His Qualities, and His Speech

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ لَعَمْرُ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: "La 'amrullah"

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {لاَ يُؤَاخِذُكُمُ اللَّهُ بِاللَّغْوِ فِي أَيْمَانِكُمْ وَلَكِنْ يُؤَاخِذُكُمْ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ قُلُوبُكُمْ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ حَلِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: "Allah will not call you to account for that which is unintentional in your oaths ..."

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا حَنِثَ نَاسِيًا فِي الأَيْمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone does something against his oath due to forgetfulness

titles.arabic: باب الْيَمِينِ الْغَمُوسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Ghamus oath

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً أُولَئِكَ لاَ خَلاَقَ لَهُمْ فِي الآخِرَةِ وَلاَ يُكَلِّمُهُمُ اللَّهُ وَلاَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَلاَ يُزَكِّيهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: "Verily, those who purchase a small gain at the cost of Allah's Covenant and their oaths ..."

titles.arabic: باب الْيَمِينِ فِيمَا لاَ يَمْلِكُ، وَفِي الْمَعْصِيَةِ، وَفِي الْغَضَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: To swear something not in one's power; to swear to do an act disobedience; to take an oath in anger.

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا قَالَ وَاللَّهِ لاَ أَتَكَلَّمُ الْيَوْمَ. فَصَلَّى أَوْ قَرَأَ أَوْ سَبَّحَ أَوْ كَبَّرَ أَوْ حَمِدَ أَوْ هَلَّلَ، فَهْوَ عَلَى نِيَّتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If one says: "By Allah! I will not speak today"

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ حَلَفَ أَنْ لاَ يَدْخُلَ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ شَهْرًا، وَكَانَ الشَّهْرُ تِسْعًا وَعِشْرِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever took an oath that he would not enter upon his wife for one month

titles.arabic: باب إِنْ حَلَفَ أَنْ لاَ يَشْرَبَ نَبِيذًا فَشَرِبَ طِلاَءً أَوْ سَكَرًا أَوْ عَصِيرًا، لَمْ يَحْنَثْ فِي قَوْلِ بَعْضِ النَّاسِ، وَلَيْسَتْ هَذِهِ بِأَنْبِذَةٍ عِنْدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody takes an oath not to drink Nabidh

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا حَلَفَ أَنْ لاَ يَأْتَدِمَ، فَأَكَلَ تَمْرًا بِخُبْزٍ، وَمَا يَكُونُ مِنَ الأُدْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone takes an oath that he will not eat Udm

titles.arabic: باب النِّيَّةِ فِي الأَيْمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: The intention in taking oaths

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَهْدَى مَالَهُ عَلَى وَجْهِ النَّذْرِ وَالتَّوْبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person gives his property in charity because of a vow and as an expiation for sins

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا حَرَّمَ طَعَامَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone makes some food unlawful for himself

titles.arabic: باب الْوَفَاءِ بِالنَّذْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To fulfil one's vow

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ لاَ يَفِي بِالنَّذْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of him who does not fulfil his vow

titles.arabic: باب النَّذْرِ فِي الطَّاعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To vow for to be obedient to Allah

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا نَذَرَ أَوْ حَلَفَ أَنْ لاَ يُكَلِّمَ إِنْسَانًا فِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ ثُمَّ أَسْلَمَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody vowed during the Pre-Islamic Period of Ignorance, and then he embraces Islam

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ مَاتَ وَعَلَيْهِ نَذْرٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody dies without fulfiling a vow

titles.arabic: باب النَّذْرِ فِيمَا لاَ يَمْلِكُ وَفِي مَعْصِيَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To vow for something not possessed, and for something sinful

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَصُومَ أَيَّامًا فَوَافَقَ النَّحْرَ أَوِ الْفِطْرَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody has vowed that he will observe Saum

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَدْخُلُ فِي الأَيْمَانِ وَالنُّذُورِ الأَرْضُ وَالْغَنَمُ وَالزُّرُوعُ وَالأَمْتِعَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: Can the land, sheep, farms and one's belongings be included in vows and oaths?

titles.arabic: بَابُ كَفَّارَاتِ الأَيْمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: “(Then for the) expiation feed ten Masakin…”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {قَدْ فَرَضَ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ تَحِلَّةَ أَيْمَانِكُمْ وَاللَّهُ مَوْلاَكُمْ وَهْوَ الْعَلِيمُ الْحَكِيمُ}
titles.english: Chapter: When is expiation due upon the rich and the poor?

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَعَانَ الْمُعْسِرَ فِي الْكَفَّارَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The man who helped another person to make an expiation

titles.arabic: باب يُعْطِي فِي الْكَفَّارَةِ عَشَرَةَ مَسَاكِينَ، قَرِيبًا كَانَ أَوْ بَعِيدًا
titles.english: Chapter: For expiation one should feed ten poor persons

titles.arabic: باب صَاعِ الْمَدِينَة
titles.english: Chapter: The Sa' of Al-Madina, and the Mudd of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏أَوْ تَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ‏} ‏، وَأَىّ الرِّقَابِ أَزْكَى؟
titles.english: Chapter: “…Or manumit a slave…”

titles.arabic: باب عِتْقِ الْمُدَبَّرِ وَأُمِّ الْوَلَدِ وَالْمُكَاتَبِ فِي الْكَفَّارَةِ، وَعِتْقِ وَلَدِ الزِّنَا
titles.english: Chapter: Manumission of Mudabbar, and Umm Walad and a Mukatab for expiation; and the manumission of a bastard

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَعْتَقَ فِي الْكَفَّارَةِ لِمَنْ يَكُونُ وَلاَؤُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody manumits a slave for expiation, for whom will the slave’s Wala be?

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِثْنَاءِ فِي الأَيْمَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: To say: “In sha’ Allah” while taking an oath

titles.arabic: باب الْكَفَّارَةِ قَبْلَ الْحِنْثِ وَبَعْدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To make expiation for one’s oath

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {يُوصِيكُمُ اللَّهُ فِي أَوْلاَدِكُمْ لِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الأُنْثَيَيْنِ فَإِنْ كُنَّ نِسَاءً فَوْقَ اثْنَتَيْنِ فَلَهُنَّ ثُلُثَا مَا تَرَكَ وَإِنْ كَانَتْ وَاحِدَةً فَلَهَا النِّصْفُ وَلأَبَوَيْهِ لِكُلِّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمَا السُّدُسُ مِمَّا تَرَكَ إِنْ كَانَ لَهُ وَلَدٌ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلَدٌ وَوَرِثَهُ أَبَوَاهُ فَلأُمِّهِ الثُّلُثُ فَإِنْ كَانَ لَهُ إِخْوَةٌ فَلأُمِّهِ السُّدُسُ مِنْ بَعْدِ وَصِيَّةٍ يُوصِي بِهَا أَوْ دَيْنٍ آبَاؤُكُمْ وَأَبْنَاؤُكُمْ لاَ تَدْرُونَ أَيُّهُمْ أَقْرَبُ لَكُمْ نَفْعًا فَرِيضَةً مِنَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا وَلَكُمْ نِصْفُ مَا تَرَكَ أَزْوَاجُكُمْ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُنَّ وَلَدٌ فَإِنْ كَانَ لَهُنَّ وَلَدٌ فَلَكُمُ الرُّبُعُ مِمَّا تَرَكْنَ مِنْ بَعْدِ وَصِيَّةٍ يُوصِينَ بِهَا أَوْ دَيْنٍ وَلَهُنَّ الرُّبُعُ مِمَّا تَرَكْتُمْ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَكُمْ وَلَدٌ فَإِنْ كَانَ لَكُمْ وَلَدٌ فَلَهُنَّ الثُّمُنُ مِمَّا تَرَكْتُمْ مِنْ بَعْدِ وَصِيَّةٍ تُوصُونَ بِهَا أَوْ دَيْنٍ وَإِنْ كَانَ رَجُلٌ يُورَثُ كَلاَلَةً أَوِ امْرَأَةٌ وَلَهُ أَخٌ أَوْ أُخْتٌ فَلِكُلِّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمَا السُّدُسُ فَإِنْ كَانُوا أَكْثَرَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ فَهُمْ شُرَكَاءُ فِي الثُّلُثِ مِنْ بَعْدِ وَصِيَّةٍ يُوصَى بِهَا أَوْ دَيْنٍ غَيْرَ مُضَارٍّ وَصِيَّةً مِنَ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَلِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Allah commands you as regards your children’s (inheritance)…”

titles.arabic: باب تَعْلِيمِ الْفَرَائِضِ
titles.english: Chapter: Learning about the Laws of Inheritance

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ نُورَثُ مَا تَرَكْنَا صَدَقَةٌ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Our property is not to be inherited, and whatever we leave is Sadaqa.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ مَنْ تَرَكَ مَالاً فَلأَهْلِهِ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Whoever leaves some property, then it is for his family.”

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الْوَلَدِ مِنْ أَبِيهِ وَأُمِّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Inheritance of the offspring from dead fathers and mothers

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الْبَنَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The inheritance of daughters

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ ابْنِ الاِبْنِ، إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنِ ابْنٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The inheritance of one’s grandchild

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ ابْنَةِ ابْنٍ مَعَ ابْنَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The share of inheritance of one’s son’s daughter

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الْجَدِّ مَعَ الأَبِ وَالإِخْوَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The shares of inheritance for the paternal grandfather, the father and brothers

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الزَّوْجِ مَعَ الْوَلَدِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The inheritance of husband along with the offspring and other relatives

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الْمَرْأَةِ وَالزَّوْجِ مَعَ الْوَلَدِ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The inheritance of a woman and a husband along with the offspring and other relatives

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الأَخَوَاتِ مَعَ الْبَنَاتِ عَصَبَةً
titles.english: Chapter: The sisters share the inheritance with the daughters

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الأَخَوَاتِ وَالإِخْوَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The inheritance of the sisters and brothers

titles.arabic: بَابُ {يَسْتَفْتُونَكَ قُلِ اللَّهُ يُفْتِيكُمْ فِي الْكَلاَلَةِ إِنِ امْرُؤٌ هَلَكَ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَلَدٌ وَلَهُ أُخْتٌ فَلَهَا نِصْفُ مَا تَرَكَ وَهُوَ يَرِثُهَا إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا وَلَدٌ فَإِنْ كَانَتَا اثْنَتَيْنِ فَلَهُمَا الثُّلُثَانِ مِمَّا تَرَكَ وَإِنْ كَانُوا إِخْوَةً رِجَالاً وَنِسَاءً فَلِلذَّكَرِ مِثْلُ حَظِّ الأُنْثَيَيْنِ يُبَيِّنُ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَضِلُّوا وَاللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: “They ask you for a legal verdict. Say: ‘Allah directs about Al-Kalalah…”

titles.arabic: باب ابْنَىْ عَمٍّ أَحَدُهُمَا أَخٌ لِلأُمِّ وَالآخَرُ زَوْجٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The heirs of a lady who dies, leaving two cousins – her maternal brother and her husband.

titles.arabic: باب ذَوِي الأَرْحَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Kindred by blood

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الْمُلاَعَنَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The inheritance in the case of Mula’ana

titles.arabic: باب الْوَلَدُ لِلْفِرَاشِ حُرَّةً كَانَتْ أَوْ أَمَةً
titles.english: Chapter: The child is for the owner of the bed

titles.arabic: باب الْوَلاَءُ لِمَنْ أَعْتَقَ، وَمِيرَاثُ اللَّقِيطِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Wala’ is for the manumitter

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ السَّائِبَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The heir of the Sa'iba

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ تَبَرَّأَ مِنْ مَوَالِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of the freed slave who denies his master who has freed him.

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَسْلَمَ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone is converted to Islam through somebody else

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَرِثُ النِّسَاءُ مِنَ الْوَلاَءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What a woman can inherit of the Wala’ (in the book it is given women)

titles.arabic: باب مَوْلَى الْقَوْمِ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِمْ، وَابْنُ الأُخْتِ مِنْهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The freed slave belongs to the people who have freed him

titles.arabic: باب مِيرَاثِ الأَسِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The inheritance of a captive

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَرِثُ الْمُسْلِمُ الْكَافِرَ وَلاَ الْكَافِرُ الْمُسْلِمَ، وَإِذَا أَسْلَمَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقْسَمَ الْمِيرَاثُ فَلاَ مِيرَاثَ لَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Neither a Muslim can be the heir of a disbeliever, nor a disbeliever of a Muslim

titles.arabic: بَابُ مِيرَاثِ الْعَبْدِ النَّصْرَانِيِّ وَمُكَاتَبِ النَّصْرَانِيِّ، وَإِثْمِ مَنِ انْتَفَى مِنْ وَلَدِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Inheritance of a Christian slave and a Mukatab

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ ادَّعَى أَخًا أَوِ ابْنَ أَخٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever claims that somebody is his brother or his nephew

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ ادَّعَى إِلَى غَيْرِ أَبِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever claims to be the son of a person other than his father

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا ادَّعَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ ابْنًا
titles.english: Chapter: If a lady claims to be the mother of a son

titles.arabic: باب الْقَائِفِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Qa’if

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا يُحْذَرُ مِنَ الْحُدُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: What Hudud one should beware of

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُشْرَبُ الْخَمْرُ
titles.english: Chapter: Illegal sexual intercourse and the drinking of alcoholic drinks

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ضَرْبِ شَارِبِ الْخَمْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding the beating of a drunk

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَمَرَ بِضَرْبِ الْحَدِّ فِي الْبَيْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever ordered that the legal punishment was to be carried out at home

titles.arabic: باب الضَّرْبِ بِالْجَرِيدِ وَالنِّعَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: Beating with stalks of date-palm leaves and shoes.

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ لَعْنِ شَارِبِ الْخَمْرِ وَإِنَّهُ لَيْسَ بِخَارِجٍ مِنَ الْمِلَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Cursing is disliked against the drunkard and he is not regarded as a non-Muslim

titles.arabic: باب السَّارِقِ حِينَ يَسْرِقُ
titles.english: Chapter: The thief while stealing

titles.arabic: باب لَعْنِ السَّارِقِ إِذَا لَمْ يُسَمَّ
titles.english: Chapter: To curse thieves without mentioning names

titles.arabic: باب الْحُدُودُ كَفَّارَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Hudud are expiation

titles.arabic: باب ظَهْرُ الْمُؤْمِنِ حِمًى، إِلاَّ فِي حَدٍّ أَوْ حَقٍّ
titles.english: Chapter: A believer is safe except if he transgresses Allah’s legal limits or takes others’ rights

titles.arabic: باب إِقَامَةِ الْحُدُودِ وَالاِنْتِقَامِ لِحُرُمَاتِ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To carry out the legal punishment; and to take revenge on those who transgress Allah’s limits and boundaries

titles.arabic: باب إِقَامَةِ الْحُدُودِ عَلَى الشَّرِيفِ وَالْوَضِيعِ
titles.english: Chapter: To inflict the legal punishment on the noble and the weak people

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ الشَّفَاعَةِ فِي الْحَدِّ، إِذَا رُفِعَ إِلَى السُّلْطَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Intercession is not recommended in the matter of legal punishment

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَالسَّارِقُ وَالسَّارِقَةُ فَاقْطَعُوا أَيْدِيَهُمَا}
titles.english: Chapter: “Cut off the hand of the thief, male or female…”

titles.arabic: باب تَوْبَةِ السَّارِقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The repentance of a thief

titles.arabic: بَابُ المحاربين من أهل الكفر والردة
titles.english: Chapter: The chapter of those who wage war from the people who are disbelievers and those turned renegades

titles.arabic: باب لَمْ يَحْسِمِ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم الْمُحَارِبِينَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الرِّدَّةِ حَتَّى هَلَكُوا‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) did not cauterize those who fought and of those who were renegades

titles.arabic: باب لَمْ يُسْقَ الْمُرْتَدُّونَ الْمُحَارِبُونَ حَتَّى مَاتُوا
titles.english: Chapter: No water was given to those turned renegades and fought, till they died

titles.arabic: باب سَمْرِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَعْيُنَ الْمُحَارِبِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) branded the eyes of those who fought

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ مَنْ تَرَكَ الْفَوَاحِشَ
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of the person who leaves Al-Fawahish

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ الزُّنَاةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of illegal sexual intercourse

titles.arabic: باب رَجْمِ الْمُحْصَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Rajm of a married person

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُرْجَمُ الْمَجْنُونُ وَالْمَجْنُونَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: An insane should not be stoned to death

titles.arabic: باب لِلْعَاهِرِ الْحَجَرُ
titles.english: Chapter: The stone is for illegal sexual intercourse

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجْمِ فِي الْبَلاَطِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Rajm at the Balat

titles.arabic: باب الرَّجْمِ بِالْمُصَلَّى
titles.english: Chapter: The Rajm at the Musalla

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ أَصَابَ ذَنْبًا دُونَ الْحَدِّ فَأَخْبَرَ الإِمَامَ فَلاَ عُقُوبَةَ عَلَيْهِ بَعْدَ التَّوْبَةِ إِذَا جَاءَ مُسْتَفْتِيًا
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody commits a sin less than the legal punishment and informs the ruler, no punishment is to be inflicted on him after his repentance

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَقَرَّ بِالْحَدِّ وَلَمْ يُبَيِّنْ، هَلْ لِلإِمَامِ أَنْ يَسْتُرَ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a person confesses but does not specify the sin can the ruler screen it for him?

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَقُولُ الإِمَامُ لِلْمُقِرِّ لَعَلَّكَ لَمَسْتَ أَوْ غَمَزْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: ‘Can’t be that you have only touched the lady or winked at her?”

titles.arabic: باب سُؤَالِ الإِمَامِ الْمُقِرَّ هَلْ أَحْصَنْتَ
titles.english: Chapter: The question of the ruler to the confessing person, “Are you married?”

titles.arabic: باب الاِعْتِرَافِ بِالزِّنَا
titles.english: Chapter: To confess the guilt of illegal sexual intercourse

titles.arabic: باب رَجْمِ الْحُبْلَى مِنَ الزِّنَا إِذَا أَحْصَنَتْ
titles.english: Chapter: The Rajm of a married lady pregnant through illegal sexual intercourse

titles.arabic: باب الْبِكْرَانِ يُجْلَدَانِ وَيُنْفَيَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Unmarried should be flogged and exiled

titles.arabic: باب نَفْىِ أَهْلِ الْمَعَاصِي وَالْمُخَنَّثِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Exiling the sinners and effeminate men

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَمَرَ غَيْرَ الإِمَامِ بِإِقَامَةِ الْحَدِّ غَائِبًا عَنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: To carry out the legal punishment in the absence of the ruler

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَمَنْ لَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ مِنْكُمْ طَوْلاً أَنْ يَنْكِحَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ فَمِمَّا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُكُمْ مِنْ فَتَيَاتِكُمُ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَاللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِإِيمَانِكُمْ بَعْضُكُمْ مِنْ بَعْضٍ فَانْكِحُوهُنَّ بِإِذْنِ أَهْلِهِنَّ وَآتُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ مُحْصَنَاتٍ غَيْرَ مُسَافِحَاتٍ وَلاَ مُتَّخِذَاتِ أَخْدَانٍ فَإِذَا أُحْصِنَّ فَإِنْ أَتَيْنَ بِفَاحِشَةٍ فَعَلَيْهِنَّ نِصْفُ مَا عَلَى الْمُحْصَنَاتِ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ ذَلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِيَ الْعَنَتَ مِنْكُمْ وَأَنْ تَصْبِرُوا خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: ‘And whoever of you have not the means wherewith to wed free believing women..”

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا زَنَتِ الأَمَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: When a female slave commits zina

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُثَرَّبُ عَلَى الأَمَةِ إِذَا زَنَتْ وَلاَ تُنْفَى
titles.english: Chapter: If a lady-slave commits illegal sexual intercourse then she should neither be admonished nor exiled

titles.arabic: باب أَحْكَامِ أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ وَإِحْصَانِهِمْ إِذَا زَنَوْا وَرُفِعُوا إِلَى الإِمَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The legal regulation for non-Muslims under the protection of a Muslim state

titles.arabic: بَابُ إِذَا رَمَى امْرَأَتَهُ أَوِ امْرَأَةَ غَيْرِهِ بِالزِّنَا عِنْدَ الْحَاكِمِ وَالنَّاسِ، هَلْ عَلَى الْحَاكِمِ أَنْ يَبْعَثَ إِلَيْهَا فَيَسْأَلَهَا عَمَّا رُمِيَتْ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone accuses his wife or another person’s wife of committing illegal sexual intercourse

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ أَدَّبَ أَهْلَهُ أَوْ غَيْرَهُ دُونَ السُّلْطَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever teaches manners to his family or others

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَأَى مَعَ امْرَأَتِهِ رَجُلاً فَقَتَلَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever saw his wife with another man and killed him

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّعْرِيضِ
titles.english: Chapter: At-Ta’rid

titles.arabic: باب كَمِ التَّعْزِيرُ وَالأَدَبُ
titles.english: Chapter: What punishment may be inflicted on the person so that they may not commit the same sin again, or so that they may learn good manners

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَظْهَرَ الْفَاحِشَةَ وَاللَّطْخَ وَالتُّهَمَةَ بِغَيْرِ بَيِّنَةٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To behave in a suspicious and dishonest way; and to accuse others without proof

titles.arabic: باب رَمْىِ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: To accuse the chaste women

titles.arabic: باب قَذْفِ الْعَبِيدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Slandering the slaves

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَأْمُرُ الإِمَامُ رَجُلاً فَيَضْرِبُ الْحَدَّ غَائِبًا عَنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Can a ruler order the legal punishment on someone without himself being present?

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَمَنْ يَقْتُلْ مُؤْمِنًا مُتَعَمِّدًا جَزَاؤُهُ فَجَهَنَّمُ}
titles.english: Chapter: “… And whoever kills a believer intentionally, his recompense is Hell …”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏وَمَنْ أَحْيَاهَا‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: “And if anyone saved a life….”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْقِصَاصُ فِي الْقَتْلَى الْحُرُّ بِالْحُرِّ وَالْعَبْدُ بِالْعَبْدِ وَالأُنْثَى بِالأُنْثَى فَمَنْ عُفِيَ لَهُ مِنْ أَخِيهِ شَيْءٌ فَاتِّبَاعٌ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَأَدَاءٌ إِلَيْهِ بِإِحْسَانٍ ذَلِكَ تَخْفِيفٌ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ وَرَحْمَةٌ فَمَنِ اعْتَدَى بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ فَلَهُ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: “O you who believe! Al-Qisas is prescribed for you in case of murder….”

titles.arabic: باب سُؤَالِ الْقَاتِلِ حَتَّى يُقِرَّ وَالإِقْرَارِ فِي الْحُدُودِ
titles.english: Chapter: To question the killer till he confesses

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَتَلَ بِحَجَرٍ أَوْ بِعَصًا
titles.english: Chapter: If someone kills with a stone or with a stick

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏أَنَّ النَّفْسَ بِالنَّفْسِ وَالْعَيْنَ بِالْعَيْنِ وَالأَنْفَ بِالأَنْفِ وَالأُذُنَ بِالأُذُنِ وَالسِّنَّ بِالسِّنِّ وَالْجُرُوحَ قِصَاصٌ فَمَنْ تَصَدَّقَ بِهِ فَهُوَ كَفَّارَةٌ لَهُ وَمَنْ لَمْ يَحْكُمْ بِمَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ فَأُولَئِكَ هُمُ الظَّالِمُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Life for life, eye for eye, nose for nose, ear for ear, tooth for tooth and wounds equal for equal”

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَقَادَ بِالْحَجَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever punished with a stone

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قُتِلَ لَهُ قَتِيلٌ فَهْوَ بِخَيْرِ النَّظَرَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The relative of the killed person has the right to choose one of two compensations

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ طَلَبَ دَمَ امْرِئٍ بِغَيْرِ حَقٍّ
titles.english: Chapter: To shed somebody’s blood without any right

titles.arabic: باب الْعَفْوِ فِي الْخَطَإِ بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Excusing somebody who killed by mistake.

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَمَا كَانَ لِمُؤْمِنٍ أَنْ يَقْتُلَ مُؤْمِنًا إِلاَّ خَطَأً وَمَنْ قَتَلَ مُؤْمِنًا خَطَأً فَتَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ مُؤْمِنَةٍ وَدِيَةٌ مُسَلَّمَةٌ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ إِلاَّ أَنْ يَصَّدَّقُوا فَإِنْ كَانَ مِنْ قَوْمٍ عَدُوٍّ لَكُمْ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَتَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ مُؤْمِنَةٍ وَإِنْ كَانَ مِنْ قَوْمٍ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُمْ مِيثَاقٌ فَدِيَةٌ مُسَلَّمَةٌ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ وَتَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ مُؤْمِنَةٍ فَمَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ فَصِيَامُ شَهْرَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ تَوْبَةً مِنَ اللَّهِ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا}
titles.english: Chapter: “It is not for a believer to kill a believer except by mistake….”

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَقَرَّ بِالْقَتْلِ مَرَّةً قُتِلَ بِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a killer confesses once, he sould be killed

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ الرَّجُلِ بِالْمَرْأَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Killing a man for having killed a woman

titles.arabic: باب الْقِصَاصِ بَيْنَ الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ فِي الْجِرَاحَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Qisas in cases of injury

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَخَذَ حَقَّهُ أَوِ اقْتَصَّ دُونَ السُّلْطَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever took his right or retaliation from somebody without submitting the case to the ruler

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا مَاتَ فِي الزِّحَامِ أَوْ قُتِلَ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone dies or is killed in a big crowd

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَتَلَ نَفْسَهُ خَطَأً فَلاَ دِيَةَ لَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone kills himself by mistake, there is no Diya

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا عَضَّ رَجُلاً فَوَقَعَتْ ثَنَايَاهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody bites a man and has his tooth broken

titles.arabic: باب السِّنِّ بِالسِّنِّ
titles.english: Chapter: Tooth for tooth

titles.arabic: باب دِيَةِ الأَصَابِعِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Diya for fingers

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَصَابَ قَوْمٌ مِنْ رَجُلٍ هَلْ يُعَاقِبُ أَوْ يَقْتَصُّ مِنْهُمْ كُلِّهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: If a group killed or injured one man, will all have to give Diya or be punished with Al-Qisas?

titles.arabic: باب الْقَسَامَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Qasama

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اطَّلَعَ فِي بَيْتِ قَوْمٍ فَفَقَئُوا عَيْنَهُ فَلاَ دِيَةَ لَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody peeps into the house of some people

titles.arabic: باب الْعَاقِلَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-‘Aqila who pay the Diya

titles.arabic: باب جَنِينِ الْمَرْأَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The foetus of a woman

titles.arabic: باب جَنِينِ الْمَرْأَةِ وَأَنَّ الْعَقْلَ عَلَى الْوَالِدِ وَعَصَبَةِ الْوَالِدِ لاَ عَلَى الْوَلَدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Diya is to be collected from the father of the killer and his ‘Asaba but not from the killer’s children

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتَعَانَ عَبْدًا أَوْ صَبِيًّا
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever sought the help of a slave or a boy

titles.arabic: باب الْمَعْدِنُ جُبَارٌ وَالْبِئْرُ جُبَارٌ
titles.english: Chapter: No Diya in cases of mines and wells

titles.arabic: باب الْعَجْمَاءُ جُبَارٌ
titles.english: Chapter: No Diya for the one killed by an animal

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ قَتَلَ ذِمِّيًّا بِغَيْرِ جُرْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of a person who killed an innocent Dhimi

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يُقْتَلُ الْمُسْلِمُ بِالْكَافِرِ
titles.english: Chapter: A Muslim should not be killed for killing a Kafir

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَطَمَ الْمُسْلِمُ يَهُودِيًّا عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a Muslim, being furious slaps a Jew

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ أَشْرَكَ بِاللَّهِ وَعُقُوبَتِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of the person who ascribes partners in worship to Allah

titles.arabic: باب حُكْمِ الْمُرْتَدِّ وَالْمُرْتَدَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Murtad and Al-Murtaddah

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ مَنْ أَبَى قَبُولَ الْفَرَائِضِ وَمَا نُسِبُوا إِلَى الرِّدَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Killing those who refuse to fulfil the duties enjoined by Allah, and considering them as apostates

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا عَرَّضَ الذِّمِّيُّ وَغَيْرُهُ بِسَبِّ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَلَمْ يُصَرِّحْ نَحْوَ قَوْلِهِ السَّامُ عَلَيْكَ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody else abuses the Prophet (saws)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب قَتْلِ الْخَوَارِجِ وَالْمُلْحِدِينَ بَعْدَ إِقَامَةِ الْحُجَّةِ عَلَيْهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Killing Al-Khawarij and Al-Mulhidun

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَرَكَ قِتَالَ الْخَوَارِجِ لِلتَّأَلُّفِ، وَأَنْ لاَ يَنْفِرَ النَّاسُ عَنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever gave up fighting against Al-Khawarij in order to create intimacy

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏اَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى يَقْتَتِلَ فِئَتَانِ دَعْوَتُهُمَا وَاحِدَةٌ"
titles.english: Chapter: “The Hour will not be established till two groups fight against each other, their claim being one and the same.”

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمُتَأَوِّلِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Muta’awwalin

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اخْتَارَ الضَّرْبَ وَالْقَتْلَ وَالْهَوَانَ عَلَى الْكُفْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever preferred to be beaten killed and humiliated rather than to revert to Kufr

titles.arabic: باب فِي بَيْعِ الْمُكْرَهِ وَنَحْوِهِ فِي الْحَقِّ وَغَيْرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling under coercion or other circumstances to repay a debt or the like

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَجُوزُ نِكَاحُ الْمُكْرَهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Marriage under coercion is invalid

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أُكْرِهَ حَتَّى وَهَبَ عَبْدًا أَوْ بَاعَهُ لَمْ يَجُزْ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone gives a slave as a present or sold him under coercion, his deed is invalid

titles.arabic: باب مِنَ الإِكْرَاهِ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Compulsion

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اسْتُكْرِهَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ عَلَى الزِّنَا، فَلاَ حَدَّ عَلَيْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: If a woman is compelled to commit illegal sexual intercourse against her will

titles.arabic: باب يَمِينِ الرَّجُلِ لِصَاحِبِهِ إِنَّهُ أَخُوهُ، إِذَا خَافَ عَلَيْهِ الْقَتْلَ أَوْ نَحْوَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The oath of a man that his companion is his brother when he fears

titles.arabic: باب مَوَاقِيتِ الصَّلاَةِ وَفَضْلِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The times of As-Salat (the prayers) and the superiority of offering Salat (prayers) in time

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {مُنِيبِينَ إِلَيْهِ وَاتَّقُوهُ وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلاَةَ وَلاَ تَكُونُوا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ}
titles.english: Chapter: The Statement of Allah عز وجل: (And remain always) turning in repentance to Him (only), and be afraid and dutiful to Him; and perform As-Salat (Iqamat-as-Salat) and be not of Al-Mushrikun (the disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah, polytheists, idolaters). (V.30:31)

titles.arabic: باب الْبَيْعَةِ عَلَى إِقَامَةِ الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To give the Bai'ah (pledge) for Iqamat-as-Salat [the offering of As-Salat (the prayers).

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةُ كَفَّارَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: As-Salat (the prayers) is expiation (of sins)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ لِوَقْتِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of offering As-Salat (the prayers) at the stated times

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلَوَاتُ الْخَمْسُ كَفَّارَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The five Salat (prayers) are expiations (of sins)

titles.arabic: باب تَضْيِيعِ الصَّلاَةِ عَنْ وَقْتِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Not offering As-Salat (the prayers) at its stated fixed time

titles.arabic: باب الْمُصَلِّي يُنَاجِي رَبَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
titles.english: Chapter: A person in Salat (prayer) is speaking in private to his Lord (Allah)

titles.arabic: باب الإِبْرَادِ بِالظُّهْرِ فِي شِدَّةِ الْحَرِّ
titles.english: Chapter: In severe heat, offer Zuhr prayers when it becomes (a bit) cooler

titles.arabic: باب الإِبْرَادِ بِالظُّهْرِ فِي السَّفَرِ
titles.english: Chapter: When going on a journey, pray Zuhr prayer when it becomes cooler

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِ الظُّهْرِ عِنْدَ الزَّوَالِ
titles.english: Chapter: The time of Zuhr prayer is when the sun declines (just after mid-day)

titles.arabic: باب تَأْخِيرِ الظُّهْرِ إِلَى الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To deny the Zuhr (prayer) up to the 'Asr (prayer) time

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِ الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The time of the Asr prayer

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ فَاتَتْهُ الْعَصْرُ
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of one who misses the 'Asr prayer (intentionally)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ تَرَكَ الْعَصْرَ
titles.english: Chapter: One who omits (does not offer) the 'Asr prayer (intentionally)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الْعَصْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of the 'Asr prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَدْرَكَ رَكْعَةً مِنَ الْعَصْرِ قَبْلَ الْغُرُوبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever got (or was able to offer) only one Rak'a of the 'Asr prayer before sunset

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِ الْمَغْرِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: The time of the Maghrib prayer (evening prayer)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَرِهَ أَنْ يُقَالَ لِلْمَغْرِبِ الْعِشَاءُ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever disliked to call the Maghrib prayer as the 'Isha' prayer

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الْعِشَاءِ وَالْعَتَمَةِ وَمَنْ رَآهُ وَاسِعًا
titles.english: Chapter: The mention of 'Isha' and 'Atama and whoever took the two names as one and the same

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِ الْعِشَاءِ إِذَا اجْتَمَعَ النَّاسُ أَوْ تَأَخَّرُوا
titles.english: Chapter: The time of the Isha prayer. If the people get together (pray earlier), and if they come late (delay it)

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of the 'Isha prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ النَّوْمِ قَبْلَ الْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked about sleeping before the 'Isha prayer

titles.arabic: باب النَّوْمِ قَبْلَ الْعِشَاءِ لِمَنْ غُلِبَ
titles.english: Chapter: Sleeping before the 'Isha prayer if (one is) over-whelmed by it (sleep)

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِ الْعِشَاءِ إِلَى نِصْفِ اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Time of the 'Isha prayer is up to the middle of the night

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Superiority of the Fajr (early morning) prayer

titles.arabic: باب وَقْتِ الْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Time of the Fajr (early morning) prayer

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَدْرَكَ مِنَ الْفَجْرِ رَكْعَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever got (or was able to offer) one Rak'a of the Fajr prayer (in time). [One Rak'a means, one standing, one bowing, and two prostrations].

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ أَدْرَكَ مِنَ الصَّلاَةِ رَكْعَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever got (or was able to offer) one Rak'a of a prayer (in time)

titles.arabic: باب الصَّلاَةِ بَعْدَ الْفَجْرِ حَتَّى تَرْتَفِعَ الشَّمْسُ
titles.english: Chapter: What is said regarding the offering of As-Salat (the prayers) between the Fajr prayer and sunrise.

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَتَحَرَّى الصَّلاَةَ قَبْلَ غُرُوبِ الشَّمْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: One should not try to offer As-Salat (the prayers) just before sunset

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَكْرَهِ الصَّلاَةَ إِلاَّ بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ وَالْفَجْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever did not dislike to offer optional prayers except after the compulsory prayers of 'Asr and Fajr only

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُصَلَّى بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ مِنَ الْفَوَائِتِ وَنَحْوِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: To offer the missed Salat (prayers) and the like after the 'Asr prayer

titles.arabic: باب التَّبْكِيرِ بِالصَّلاَةِ فِي يَوْمِ غَيْمٍ
titles.english: Chapter: To offer (the 'Asr prayers) earlier on a cloudy day

titles.arabic: باب الأَذَانِ بَعْدَ ذَهَابِ الْوَقْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Adhan for the Salat (prayer) after its stated time is over

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى بِالنَّاسِ جَمَاعَةً بَعْدَ ذَهَابِ الْوَقْتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever led the people in Salat (prayer) after its time was over

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَسِيَ صَلاَةً فَلْيُصَلِّ إِذَا ذَكَرَهَا وَلاَ يُعِيدُ إِلاَّ تِلْكَ الصَّلاَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: One who forgets a Salat (prayer) should offer it when he remembers it, and should not repeat anything except that particular prayer

titles.arabic: باب قَضَاءِ الصَّلَوَاتِ الأُولَى فَالأُولَى
titles.english: Chapter: The Qada of prayers (Qada means to perform or offer or do a missed religious obligation after its stated time)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ السَّمَرِ بَعْدَ الْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked about talking after the 'Isha prayer

titles.arabic: باب السَّمَرِ فِي الْفِقْهِ وَالْخَيْرِ بَعْدَ الْعِشَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Talking about the Islamic jurisprudence and good things after the 'Isha prayer

titles.arabic: باب السَّمَرِ مَعَ الضَّيْفِ وَالأَهْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: To talk with the family and the guests after the 'sha prayer.

titles.arabic: باب فِي تَرْكِ الْحِيَلِ وَأَنَّ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى فِي الأَيْمَانِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Avoiding the use of tricks

titles.arabic: باب فِي الصَّلاَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Tricks) in As-Salat

titles.arabic: باب فِي الزَّكَاةِ وَأَنْ لاَ يُفَرَّقَ بَيْنَ مُجْتَمِعٍ، وَلاَ يُجْمَعَ بَيْنَ مُتَفَرِّقٍ، خَشْيَةَ الصَّدَقَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Tricks) in Zakat

titles.arabic: باب الْحِيلَةِ فِي النِّكَاحِ
titles.english: Chapter: Tricks in marriages

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الاِحْتِيَالِ فِي الْبُيُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: What tricks are disliked in bargains

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ التَّنَاجُشِ
titles.english: Chapter: At-Tanajush

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى مِنَ الْخِدَاعِ فِي الْبُيُوعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Cheating in bargains

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُنْهَى مِنَ الاِحْتِيَالِ لِلْوَلِيِّ فِي الْيَتِيمَةِ الْمَرْغُوبَةِ، وَأَنْ لاَ يُكَمِّلَ صَدَاقَهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Playing of tricks by the guardian of an attractive orphan-girl

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا غَصَبَ جَارِيَةً فَزَعَمَ أَنَّهَا مَاتَتْ
titles.english: Chapter: If somebody kidnaps a slave-girl and claims she is dead but her master finds her (alive)
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب فِي النِّكَاحِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Tricks) in marriage

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنِ احْتِيَالِ الْمَرْأَةِ مَعَ الزَّوْجِ وَالضَّرَائِرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The trick by a woman with her husband

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الاِحْتِيَالِ فِي الْفِرَارِ مِنَ الطَّاعُونِ
titles.english: Chapter: Playing tricks to run from the disease of plague

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْهِبَةِ وَالشُّفْعَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Tricks in) gift-giving and pre-emption

titles.arabic: باب احْتِيَالِ الْعَامِلِ لِيُهْدَى لَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Tricks by an official person to obtain presents

titles.arabic: باب أَوَّلُ مَا بُدِئَ بِهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الْوَحْىِ الرُّؤْيَا الصَّالِحَةُ
titles.english: Chapter: Commencement of the Divine Revelation to Allah’s Messenger (saws) was in the form of good dreams

titles.arabic: باب رُؤْيَا الصَّالِحِينَ
titles.english: Chapter: The dreams of righteous people

titles.arabic: باب الرُّؤْيَا مِنَ اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Good dreams are from Allah

titles.arabic: باب الرُّؤْيَا الصَّالِحَةُ جُزْءٌ مِنْ سِتَّةٍ وَأَرْبَعِينَ جُزْءًا مِنَ النُّبُوَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: “A righteous good dream that comes true is one of the forty-six parts of An-Nubuwwa.”

titles.arabic: باب الْمُبَشِّرَاتِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Mubashshirat

titles.arabic: بَابُ رُؤْيَا يُوسُفَ
titles.english: Chapter: The vision of Yusuf

titles.arabic: بَابُ رُؤْيَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ
titles.english: Chapter: The dream of Ibrahim عليه السلام

titles.arabic: باب التَّوَاطُؤُ عَلَى الرُّؤْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: If a number of persons have the same dream

titles.arabic: باب رُؤْيَا أَهْلِ السُّجُونِ وَالْفَسَادِ وَالشِّرْكِ
titles.english: Chapter: The dreams of prisoners, evil-doers and Mushrikun

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَأَى النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever saw the Prophet (saws) in a dream

titles.arabic: باب رُؤْيَا اللَّيْلِ
titles.english: Chapter: Night dreams

titles.arabic: باب الرُّؤْيَا بِالنَّهَارِ
titles.english: Chapter: Dreams in the daytime

titles.arabic: باب رُؤْيَا النِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The dreams of women

titles.arabic: باب الْحُلْمُ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ
titles.english: Chapter: A bad dream is from Satan

titles.arabic: باب اللَّبَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The milk

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا جَرَى اللَّبَنُ فِي أَطْرَافِهِ أَوْ أَظَافِيرِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: (If one sees in a dream) that milk is flowing in his limbs or nails

titles.arabic: باب الْقَمِيصِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: A shirt in a dream

titles.arabic: باب جَرِّ الْقَمِيصِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Dragging on the ground in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الْخُضَرِ فِي الْمَنَامِ وَالرَّوْضَةِ الْخَضْرَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: Green colour and a garden in a dream

titles.arabic: باب كَشْفِ الْمَرْأَةِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Removing the veil of a woman in a dream

titles.arabic: باب ثِيَابِ الْحَرِيرِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The seeing of silken garments in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الْمَفَاتِيحِ فِي الْيَدِ
titles.english: Chapter: The seeing of keys in one’s hand

titles.arabic: باب التَّعْلِيقِ بِالْعُرْوَةِ وَالْحَلْقَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: Taking hold or handhold or a ring

titles.arabic: بَابُ عَمُودِ الْفُسْطَاطِ تَحْتَ وِسَادَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: A pole of a tent under cushion or pillow (in a dream)

titles.arabic: باب الإِسْتَبْرَقِ وَدُخُولِ الْجَنَّةِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Istabraq and entering Paradise (in a dream)

titles.arabic: باب الْقَيْدِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Seeing) oneself fettered in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الْعَيْنِ الْجَارِيَةِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Seeing) a flowing spring in a dream

titles.arabic: باب نَزْعِ الْمَاءِ مِنَ الْبِئْرِ حَتَّى يَرْوَى النَّاسُ
titles.english: Chapter: Drawing water from a well

titles.arabic: باب نَزْعِ الذَّنُوبِ وَالذَّنُوبَيْنِ مِنَ الْبِئْرِ بِضَعْفٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Drawing one or two buckets of water from a well

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِرَاحَةِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: To take rest in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الْقَصْرِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: A place in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الْوُضُوءِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Performing ablution in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الطَّوَافِ بِالْكَعْبَةِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Tawaf around the Ka'bah in a dream

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَعْطَى فَضْلَهُ غَيْرَهُ فِي النَّوْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To give the remaining of drink to another in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الأَمْنِ وَذَهَابِ الرَّوْعِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: The feeling of security and the disappearance of fear in dream

titles.arabic: باب الأَخْذِ عَلَى الْيَمِينِ فِي النَّوْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To be taken to the right side in a dream

titles.arabic: باب الْقَدَحِ فِي النَّوْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: A bowl in a dream

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا طَارَ الشَّىْءُ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: If something flies in a dream

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا رَأَى بَقَرًا تُنْحَرُ
titles.english: Chapter: If one sees (in a dream) cows being slaughtered

titles.arabic: باب النَّفْخِ فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: To blow out in a dream

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا رَأَى أَنَّهُ أَخْرَجَ الشَّىْءَ مِنْ كُورَةٍ فَأَسْكَنَهُ مَوْضِعًا آخَرَ
titles.english: Chapter: If one sees in a dream that he takes something and places it at another place

titles.arabic: باب الْمَرْأَةِ السَّوْدَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: A black woman (in a dream)

titles.arabic: باب الْمَرْأَةِ الثَّائِرَةِ الرَّأْسِ
titles.english: Chapter: A lady with unkempt hair (in a dream)

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا هَزَّ سَيْفًا فِي الْمَنَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: If someone waves a sword in a dream

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَذَبَ فِي حُلُمِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Narrating a dream which one did not see

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا رَأَى مَا يَكْرَهُ فَلاَ يُخْبِرْ بِهَا وَلاَ يَذْكُرْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: A bad dream should not be told to anybody

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَرَ الرُّؤْيَا لأَوَّلِ عَابِرٍ إِذَا لَمْ يُصِبْ
titles.english: Chapter: Considering the interpretation of a dream invalid

titles.arabic: باب تَعْبِيرِ الرُّؤْيَا بَعْدَ صَلاَةِ الصُّبْحِ
titles.english: Chapter: The interpretation of dreams after the Fajr prayer

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَاتَّقُوا فِتْنَةً لاَ تُصِيبَنَّ الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا مِنْكُمْ خَاصَّةً}
titles.english: Chapter: “And fear the Fitnah which affects not in particular those among you who do wrong….”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ سَتَرَوْنَ بَعْدِي أُمُورًا تُنْكِرُونَهَا ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “After me you will see things which you will disapprove of.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ هَلاَكُ أُمَّتِي عَلَى يَدَىْ أُغَيْلِمَةٍ سُفَهَاءَ ‏"‏‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: “The destruction of my followers will be through the hands of foolish young men.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ وَيْلٌ لِلْعَرَبِ مِنْ شَرٍّ قَدِ اقْتَرَبَ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Woe to the Arabs from the great evil that is nearly, approaching them.”

titles.arabic: باب ظُهُورِ الْفِتَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: The appearance of Al-Fitan

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَأْتِي زَمَانٌ إِلاَّ الَّذِي بَعْدَهُ شَرٌّ مِنْهُ
titles.english: Chapter: No time will come but the time following it will be worse than it

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ مَنْ حَمَلَ عَلَيْنَا السِّلاَحَ فَلَيْسَ مِنَّا ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Whosoever takes up arms against us, is not from us.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ تَرْجِعُوا بَعْدِي كُفَّارًا، يَضْرِبُ بَعْضُكُمْ رِقَابَ بَعْضٍ
titles.english: Chapter: “Do not renegade as disbelievers after me by striking the neck of one another.”

titles.arabic: باب تَكُونُ فِتْنَةٌ الْقَاعِدُ فِيهَا خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْقَائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: There will be Fitnah during which a sitting person will be better than standing one

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا الْتَقَى الْمُسْلِمَانِ بِسَيْفَيْهِمَا
titles.english: Chapter: If two Muslims meet each other with their swords

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ الأَمْرُ إِذَا لَمْ تَكُنْ جَمَاعَةٌ
titles.english: Chapter: If there is no righteous group of Muslims

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ كَرِهَ أَنْ يُكَثِّرَ سَوَادَ الْفِتَنِ وَالظُّلْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever disliked to increase the number Al-Fitan and oppressions

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا بَقِيَ فِي حُثَالَةٍ مِنَ النَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a Muslim stays among the bad people

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَرُّبِ فِي الْفِتْنَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: To stay with the Bedouins during Al-Fitnah

titles.arabic: باب التَّعَوُّذِ مِنَ الْفِتَنِ
titles.english: Chapter: To seek refuge with Allah from Al-Fitan

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ الْفِتْنَةُ مِنْ قِبَلِ الْمَشْرِقِ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Al-Fitnah will appear from the east.”

titles.arabic: باب الْفِتْنَةِ الَّتِي تَمُوجُ كَمَوْجِ الْبَحْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Al-Fitnah that will move like the waves of the sea
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ بِقَوْمٍ عَذَابًا
titles.english: Chapter: If Allah sends a punishment upon a nation

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لِلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ: «إِنَّ ابْنِي هَذَا لَسَيِّدٌ وَلَعَلَّ اللَّهَ أَنْ يُصْلِحَ بِهِ بَيْنَ فِئَتَيْنِ مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ»
titles.english: Chapter: “This son of mine is a chief, and Allah may make peace between two groups of Muslims through him.”

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَالَ عِنْدَ قَوْمٍ شَيْئًا ثُمَّ خَرَجَ فَقَالَ بِخِلاَفِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Changing the words

titles.arabic: باب لاَ تَقُومُ السَّاعَةُ حَتَّى يُغْبَطَ أَهْلُ الْقُبُورِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Hour will not be established until…

titles.arabic: باب تَغْيِيرِ الزَّمَانِ حَتَّى يَعْبُدُوا الأَوْثَانَ
titles.english: Chapter: Time will change until idols will be worshipped

titles.arabic: باب خُرُوجِ النَّارِ
titles.english: Chapter: The coming of the Fire
Chapter

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الدَّجَّالِ
titles.english: Chapter: Information about Ad-Dajjal

titles.arabic: باب لاَ يَدْخُلُ الدَّجَّالُ الْمَدِينَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Ad-Dajjal will not be able to enter Al-Madina

titles.arabic: باب يَأْجُوجَ وَمَأْجُوجَ
titles.english: Chapter: Ya’juj and Ma’juj

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {أَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ وَأُولِي الأَمْرِ مِنْكُمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Obey Allah and obey the Messenger and those of you who are in authority…”

titles.arabic: باب الأُمَرَاءُ مِنْ قُرَيْشٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The rulers from the Quraish

titles.arabic: باب أَجْرِ مَنْ قَضَى بِالْحِكْمَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The reward of judging according to Al-Hikmah

titles.arabic: باب السَّمْعِ وَالطَّاعَةِ لِلإِمَامِ مَا لَمْ تَكُنْ مَعْصِيَةً
titles.english: Chapter: To listen to and obey the Imam

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَسْأَلِ الإِمَارَةَ أَعَانَهُ اللَّهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Allah will surely help him in ruling who….

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ سَأَلَ الإِمَارَةَ وُكِلَ إِلَيْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: He who seeks to be a ruler will be held responsible

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الْحِرْصِ عَلَى الإِمَارَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: What is disliked regarding the authority of ruling

titles.arabic: باب مَنِ اسْتُرْعِيَ رَعِيَّةً فَلَمْ يَنْصَحْ
titles.english: Chapter: The ruler not ruling in an honest manner

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ شَاقَّ شَقَّ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Causing people troubles and difficulties

titles.arabic: باب الْقَضَاءِ وَالْفُتْيَا فِي الطَّرِيقِ
titles.english: Chapter: To give judgements and legal opinions on the road

titles.arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ بَوَّابٌ
titles.english: Chapter: There was no gatekeeper for the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب الْحَاكِمِ يَحْكُمُ بِالْقَتْلِ عَلَى مَنْ وَجَبَ عَلَيْهِ دُونَ الإِمَامِ الَّذِي فَوْقَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: A governor can sentence to death a person without consulting the Imam

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَقْضِي الْحَاكِمُ أَوْ يُفْتِي وَهْوَ غَضْبَانُ
titles.english: Chapter: Can a judge give a judgement in an angry mood?

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ رَأَى لِلْقَاضِي أَنْ يَحْكُمَ بِعِلْمِهِ فِي أَمْرِ النَّاسِ إِذَا لَمْ يَخَفِ الظُّنُونَ وَالتُّهَمَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: A judge can give judgements for the people according to his knowledge

titles.arabic: باب الشَّهَادَةِ عَلَى الْخَطِّ الْمَخْتُومِ
titles.english: Chapter: To bear witness as to the writer of a stamped letter; and the letter of a ruler to a governor, and of a judge to a judge

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَتَى يَسْتَوْجِبُ الرَّجُلُ الْقَضَاءَ
titles.english: Chapter: When is a man entitled to be a judge?

titles.arabic: باب رِزْقِ الْحُكَّامِ وَالْعَامِلِينِ عَلَيْهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The salaries of rulers and those employed to administer the funds

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ قَضَى وَلاَعَنَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever gave judgements of Li'an in the mosque

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ حَكَمَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ حَتَّى إِذَا أَتَى عَلَى حَدٍّ أَمَرَ أَنْ يُخْرَجَ مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ فَيُقَامَ
titles.english: Chapter: Passing judgement in the mosque and ordering the punishment outside the Mosque

titles.arabic: باب مَوْعِظَةِ الإِمَامِ لِلْخُصُومِ
titles.english: Chapter: The advice of the Imam to the litigants

titles.arabic: باب الشَّهَادَةِ تَكُونُ عِنْدَ الْحَاكِمِ فِي وِلاَيَتِهِ الْقَضَاءِ أَوْ قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ لِلْخَصْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: If a judge has to witness in favour of a litigant

titles.arabic: باب أَمْرِ الْوَالِي إِذَا وَجَّهَ أَمِيرَيْنِ إِلَى مَوْضِعٍ أَنْ يَتَطَاوَعَا وَلاَ يَتَعَاصَيَا
titles.english: Chapter: The order of the Wali sending two Amir to one place

titles.arabic: باب إِجَابَةِ الْحَاكِمِ الدَّعْوَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The ruler’s acceptance of invitation

titles.arabic: باب هَدَايَا الْعُمَّالِ
titles.english: Chapter: The gifts taken by the employees

titles.arabic: باب اسْتِقْضَاءِ الْمَوَالِي وَاسْتِعْمَالِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: To appoint the Maula as judges and officials

titles.arabic: باب الْعُرَفَاءِ لِلنَّاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: ‘Urafa appointed to look after the people

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ ثَنَاءِ السُّلْطَانِ، وَإِذَا خَرَجَ قَالَ غَيْرَ ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Praising the Sultan and saying differently after leaving him

titles.arabic: باب الْقَضَاءِ عَلَى الْغَائِبِ
titles.english: Chapter: Judgement against an absent person

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ قُضِيَ لَهُ بِحَقِّ أَخِيهِ فَلاَ يَأْخُذْهُ، فَإِنَّ قَضَاءَ الْحَاكِمِ لاَ يُحِلُّ حَرَامًا وَلاَ يُحَرِّمُ حَلاَلاً
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever is given the right of his brother through a judicial decision

titles.arabic: باب الْحُكْمِ فِي الْبِئْرِ وَنَحْوِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Judgement regarding cases involving wells, etc.

titles.arabic: باب الْقَضَاءِ فِي كَثِيرِ الْمَالِ وَقَلِيلِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To judge cases involving wealth

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعِ الإِمَامِ عَلَى النَّاسِ أَمْوَالَهُمْ وَضِيَاعَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Selling people’s estates by the ruler on their behalf

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ لَمْ يَكْتَرِثْ بِطَعْنِ مَنْ لاَ يَعْلَمُ فِي الأُمَرَاءِ حَدِيثًا
titles.english: Chapter: Slanders made by ignorant people against the Amirs

titles.arabic: باب الأَلَدِّ الْخَصِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The most quarrelsome person of the opponents

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا قَضَى الْحَاكِمُ بِجَوْرٍ أَوْ خِلاَفِ أَهْلِ الْعِلْمِ فَهْوَ رَدٌّ
titles.english: Chapter: If a judge passes an unjust judgement

titles.arabic: باب الإِمَامِ يَأْتِي قَوْمًا فَيُصْلِحُ بَيْنَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The Imam going to establish peace among people

titles.arabic: باب يُسْتَحَبُّ لِلْكَاتِبِ أَنْ يَكُونَ أَمِينًا عَاقِلاً
titles.english: Chapter: It is desirable that a scribe should be honest and wise

titles.arabic: باب كِتَابِ الْحَاكِمِ إِلَى عُمَّالِهِ، وَالْقَاضِي إِلَى أُمَنَائِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The writing of a letter by the ruler to representatives and by judge to workers

titles.arabic: باب هَلْ يَجُوزُ لِلْحَاكِمِ أَنْ يَبْعَثَ رَجُلاً وَحْدَهُ لِلنَّظَرِ فِي الأُمُورِ
titles.english: Chapter: To send one man only to manage certain affairs

titles.arabic: باب تَرْجَمَةِ الْحُكَّامِ، وَهَلْ يَجُوزُ تُرْجُمَانٌ وَاحِدٌ
titles.english: Chapter: The translators of a ruler

titles.arabic: باب مُحَاسَبَةِ الإِمَامِ عُمَّالَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The ruler calling his employees to account

titles.arabic: باب بِطَانَةِ الإِمَامِ وَأَهْلِ مَشُورَتِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The courtiers and advisers of the Imam

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يُبَايِعُ الإِمَامُ النَّاسَ
titles.english: Chapter: How do the people give the Bai'a to the Imam

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَايَعَ مَرَّتَيْنِ
titles.english: Chapter: Whosoever gave the Bai'a twice

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعَةِ الأَعْرَابِ
titles.english: Chapter: The giving of the Bai'a by the bedouins

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعَةِ الصَّغِيرِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Bai'a of a child

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَايَعَ ثُمَّ اسْتَقَالَ الْبَيْعَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever gave the Bai'a and then cancelled it

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ بَايَعَ رَجُلاً لاَ يُبَايِعُهُ إِلاَّ لِلدُّنْيَا
titles.english: Chapter: The person who gives Bai'a just for worldly benefits

titles.arabic: باب بَيْعَةِ النِّسَاءِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Bai'a given by women

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ نَكَثَ بَيْعَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Whoever violates a Bai'a

titles.arabic: باب الاِسْتِخْلاَفِ
titles.english: Chapter: The appointment of a caliph

titles.arabic: باب إِخْرَاجِ الْخُصُومِ وَأَهْلِ الرِّيَبِ مِنَ الْبُيُوتِ بَعْدَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The expulsion of quarrelsome people from houses

titles.arabic: بَابُ هَلْ لِلإِمَامِ أَنْ يَمْنَعَ الْمُجْرِمِينَ وَأَهْلَ الْمَعْصِيَةِ مِنَ الْكَلاَمِ مَعَهُ وَالزِّيَارَةِ وَنَحْوِهِ
titles.english: Chapter: To forbid the criminals and sinners to talk to or visit the ruler

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّمَنِّي وَمَنْ تَمَنَّى الشَّهَادَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: Wishes for martyrdom

titles.arabic: باب تَمَنِّي الْخَيْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: To wish for good

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لَوِ اسْتَقْبَلْتُ مِنْ أَمْرِي مَا اسْتَدْبَرْتُ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “If I had formerly known what I came to know recently…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم لَيْتَ كَذَا وَكَذَا
titles.english: Chapter: “Would that so-and-so…”

titles.arabic: باب تَمَنِّي الْقُرْآنِ وَالْعِلْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: To wish for the Qur'an and knowledge

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ التَّمَنِّي
titles.english: Chapter: What kind of wishing is disliked

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ الرَّجُلِ لَوْلاَ اللَّهُ مَا اهْتَدَيْنَا
titles.english: Chapter: “Without Allah, we would not have been guided.”

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ التَّمَنِّي لِقَاءَ الْعَدُوِّ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disapproved to long for meeting the enemy

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ اللَّوْ
titles.english: Chapter: What uses of Al-Lau are allowed

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي إِجَازَةِ خَبَرِ الْوَاحِدِ الصَّدُوقِ فِي الأَذَانِ وَالصَّلاَةِ وَالصَّوْمِ وَالْفَرَائِضِ وَالأَحْكَامِ
titles.english: Chapter: Acceptance of the information given by one truthful person in about all matters

titles.arabic: باب بَعْثِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم الزُّبَيْرَ طَلِيعَةً وَحْدَهُ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) sent Az-Zubair alone to get information regarding the enemy

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {لاَ تَدْخُلُوا بُيُوتَ النَّبِيِّ إِلاَّ أَنْ يُؤْذَنَ لَكُمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: Enter not the Prophet ’s (saws) houses unless permission is given to you…”

titles.arabic: باب مَا كَانَ يَبْعَثُ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الأُمَرَاءِ وَالرُّسُلِ وَاحِدًا بَعْدَ وَاحِدٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) used to send commanders and messengers one after another

titles.arabic: باب وَصَاةِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وُفُودَ الْعَرَبِ أَنْ يُبَلِّغُوا مَنْ وَرَاءَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Wasat of the Prophet (saws) to the Arab delegates

titles.arabic: باب خَبَرِ الْمَرْأَةِ الْوَاحِدَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: News reported by one woman

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ بُعِثْتُ بِجَوَامِعِ الْكَلِمِ ‏"‏‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: “I have been sent with Jawami Kalim’

titles.arabic: باب الاِقْتِدَاءِ بِسُنَنِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: Following the Sunna of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنْ كَثْرَةِ السُّؤَالِ وَتَكَلُّفِ مَا لاَ يَعْنِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Asking too many questions and troubling with what does not concern one

titles.arabic: باب الاِقْتِدَاءِ بِأَفْعَالِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم
titles.english: Chapter: To follow the actions of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ التَّعَمُّقِ وَالتَّنَازُعِ فِي الْعِلْمِ وَالْغُلُوِّ فِي الدِّينِ وَالْبِدَعِ
titles.english: Chapter: Going deeply into and arguing about knowledge, and exaggerating in religion, and inventing heresies

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ آوَى مُحْدِثًا
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of giving refuge or helping a person innovating an heresy

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُذْكَرُ مِنْ ذَمِّ الرَّأْىِ وَتَكَلُّفِ الْقِيَاسِ
titles.english: Chapter: Judging made on the basis of opinion or Qiyas

titles.arabic: باب مَا كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يُسْأَلُ مِمَّا لَمْ يُنْزَلْ عَلَيْهِ الْوَحْىُ فَيَقُولُ: «لاَ أَدْرِي»
titles.english: Chapter: “…(Judge between men) by that which Allah has shown you…”

titles.arabic: باب تَعْلِيمِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أُمَّتَهُ مِنَ الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ، مِمَّا عَلَّمَهُ اللَّهُ، لَيْسَ بِرَأْيٍ وَلاَ تَمْثِيلٍ
titles.english: Chapter: The way the Prophet (saws) taught his followers

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «لاَ تَزَالُ طَائِفَةٌ مِنْ أُمَّتِي ظَاهِرِينَ عَلَى الْحَقِّ يُقَاتِلُونَ». وَهُمْ أَهْلُ الْعِلْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: “A group of my followers will remain victorious in their struggle in the cause of the Truth.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏أَوْ يَلْبِسَكُمْ شِيَعًا‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “…or to cover you with confusion in party strife…”

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَنْ شَبَّهَ أَصْلاً مَعْلُومًا بِأَصْلٍ مُبَيَّنٍ قَدْ بَيَّنَ اللَّهُ حُكْمَهُمَا، لِيُفْهِمَ السَّائِلَ
titles.english: Chapter: Comparing an ambiguous situation to a clear well-defined one

titles.arabic: بَابُ مَا جَاءَ فِي اجْتِهَادِ الْقُضَاةِ بِمَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى
titles.english: Chapter: Exerting oneself to find out the proper legal verdict which is in harmony with what Allah has revealed

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لَتَتْبَعُنَّ سَنَنَ مَنْ كَانَ قَبْلَكُمْ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Certainly you will follow the ways of those who were before you.”

titles.arabic: باب إِثْمِ مَنْ دَعَا إِلَى ضَلاَلَةٍ أَوْ سَنَّ سُنَّةً سَيِّئَةً
titles.english: Chapter: The sin of the person who invites others to an evil deed or establishes a bad tradition

titles.arabic: باب مَا ذَكَرَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَحَضَّ عَلَى اتِّفَاقِ أَهْلِ الْعِلْمِ
titles.english: Chapter: The religious learned men should not differ

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {لَيْسَ لَكَ مِنَ الأَمْرِ شَيْءٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Not for you is the decision…”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {وَكَانَ الإِنْسَانُ أَكْثَرَ شَيْءٍ جَدَلاً}
titles.english: Chapter: “…But, man is ever more quarrelsome than anything.”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى: {وَكَذَلِكَ جَعَلْنَاكُمْ أُمَّةً وَسَطًا}
titles.english: Chapter: “Thus We have made you a just nation…”

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا اجْتَهَدَ الْعَامِلُ أَوِ الْحَاكِمُ فَأَخْطَأَ خِلاَفَ الرَّسُولِ مِنْ غَيْرِ عِلْمٍ، فَحُكْمُهُ مَرْدُودٌ
titles.english: Chapter: A verdict based on opinion proves to be wrong then the verdict will be rejected

titles.arabic: باب أَجْرِ الْحَاكِمِ إِذَا اجْتَهَدَ فَأَصَابَ أَوْ أَخْطَأَ
titles.english: Chapter: The reward for giving a verdict according to the best of knowledge

titles.arabic: بَابُ الْحُجَّةِ عَلَى مَنْ قَالَ إِنَّ أَحْكَامَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ كَانَتْ ظَاهِرَةً
titles.english: Chapter: Some Companions did not witness certain deeds or did hear certain saying of the Prophet (saws)

titles.arabic: باب مَنْ رَأَى تَرْكَ النَّكِيرِ مِنَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم حُجَّةً لاَ مِنْ غَيْرِ الرَّسُولِ
titles.english: Chapter: If the Prophet (saws) did not disapprove of something

titles.arabic: باب الأَحْكَامِ الَّتِي تُعْرَفُ بِالدَّلاَئِلِ، وَكَيْفَ مَعْنَى الدِّلاَلَةِ وَتَفْسِيرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: The laws inferred from certain evidences; and the meaning of an evidence

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ تَسْأَلُوا أَهْلَ الْكِتَابِ عَنْ شَىْءٍ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Do not ask the people of the Scripture about anything.”

titles.arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ الْخِلاَفِ
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to differ

titles.arabic: بَابُ نَهْيِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَلَى التَّحْرِيمِ إِلاَّ مَا تُعْرَفُ إِبَاحَتُهُ
titles.english: Chapter: Something forbidden by the Prophet (saws) is legally prohibited

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَأَمْرُهُمْ شُورَى بَيْنَهُمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…And who (conduct) their affair by mutual consultation…”

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي دُعَاءِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم أُمَّتَهُ إِلَى تَوْحِيدِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَلَى
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) inviting his followers to Tauhid of Allah

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى: {قُلِ ادْعُوا اللَّهَ أَوِ ادْعُوا الرَّحْمَنَ أَيًّا مَا تَدْعُوا فَلَهُ الأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَى}
titles.english: Chapter: “Say: Invoke Allah or invoke the Most Gracious, by whatever name you invoke Him, for to Him belong the Best Names.”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {إِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ ذُو الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينُ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Verily Allah is the All-Provider, Owner of Power, the Most Strong.”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ فَلاَ يُظْهِرُ عَلَى غَيْبِهِ أَحَدًا}
titles.english: Chapter: “(He Alone is) the All-Knower of the Unseen, and He reveals to none His Unseen.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏السَّلاَمُ الْمُؤْمِنُ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: “…the One Free from all defects, the Giver of security…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏مَلِكِ النَّاسِ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: “The King of mankind.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَهْوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “And He is the All-Mighty, the All-Wise.”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَهُوَ الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ بِالْحَقِّ}
titles.english: Chapter: “And it is He Who has created the heavens and the earth in truth…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَكَانَ اللَّهُ سَمِيعًا بَصِيرًا‏}
titles.english: Chapter: “And Allah is Ever All-Hearer, All-Seer.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏قُلْ هُوَ الْقَادِرُ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Say: He has power to (send torment on you from above)…”

titles.arabic: بَابُ مُقَلِّبِ الْقُلُوبِ وَقَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وَنُقَلِّبُ أَفْئِدَتَهُمْ وَأَبْصَارَهُمْ}
titles.english: Chapter: The One Who turns the hearts

titles.arabic: باب إِنَّ لِلَّهِ مِائَةَ اسْمٍ إِلاَّ وَاحِدًا
titles.english: Chapter: Allah has one hundred Names less One

titles.arabic: باب السُّؤَالِ بِأَسْمَاءِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى، وَالاِسْتِعَاذَةِ بِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: Asking Allah with His Names and seeking refuge with them

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُذْكَرُ فِي الذَّاتِ وَالنُّعُوتِ وَأَسَامِي اللَّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Adh-Dhat, His Qualities and His Names

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى {‏وَيُحَذِّرُكُمُ اللَّهُ نَفْسَهُ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: “…And Allah warns you against Himself…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏كُلُّ شَىْءٍ هَالِكٌ إِلاَّ وَجْهَهُ‏}
titles.english: Chapter: “…..Everything will perish save His Face…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَى عَيْنِي‏} ‏ تُغَذَّى
titles.english: Chapter: “…In order that you may be brought up under My Eye.

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ ‏ {‏هُوَ اللَّهُ الْخَالِقُ الْبَارِئُ الْمُصَوِّرُ}
titles.english: Chapter: “He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor of all things, the Bestower of forms…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: “..To one whom I have created with Both My Hands…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ لاَ شَخْصَ أَغْيَرُ مِنَ اللَّهِ ‏"‏
titles.english: Chapter: “No person has more Ghaira than Allah.”

titles.arabic: باب ‏{‏قُلْ أَىُّ شَىْءٍ أَكْبَرُ شَهَادَةً قُلِ اللَّهُ‏}‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Say ‘What thing is the most great in witness?’ Say: ‘Allah…’”

titles.arabic: بَابُ: {وَكَانَ عَرْشُهُ عَلَى الْمَاءِ}، {وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…And His Throne was on the water…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏تَعْرُجُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ وَالرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “The angels and the Ruh ascend to Him…”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَاضِرَةٌ إِلَى رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Some faces that Day shall be Nadirah. Looking at their Lord.”

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏إِنَّ رَحْمَةَ اللَّهِ قَرِيبٌ مِنَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…Surely, Allah’s Mercy is near unto the good-doers.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُمْسِكُ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ أَنْ تَزُولاَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Verily, Allah grasps the heavens and the earth lest they move away from their places…”

titles.arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَخْلِيقِ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَغَيْرِهَا مِنَ الْخَلاَئِقِ
titles.english: Chapter: The creation of the heavens, earth and other created beings

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَلَقَدْ سَبَقَتْ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا الْمُرْسَلِينَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “And, verily, Our Word has gone forth of old for Our slaves – the Messengers”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏إِنَّمَا قَوْلُنَا لِشَىْءٍ‏ إذا أردناه أن نقول له كن فيكون}‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Verily! Our Word unto a thing when We intend it.…”

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى: {قُلْ لَوْ كَانَ الْبَحْرُ مِدَادًا لِكَلِمَاتِ رَبِّي لَنَفِدَ الْبَحْرُ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنْفَدَ كَلِمَاتُ رَبِّي وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِ مَدَدًا}
titles.english: Chapter: “Say: If the sea were ink for the Words of my Lord, surely the sea would be exhausted…”

titles.arabic: باب فِي الْمَشِيئَةِ وَالإِرَادَةِ
titles.english: Chapter: (Allah’s) Wish and Will

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَلاَ تَنْفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ عِنْدَهُإِلاَّ لِمَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ حَتَّى إِذَا فُزِّعَ عَنْ قُلُوبِهِمْ قَالُوا مَاذَا قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوا الْحَقَّ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْكَبِيرُ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Intercession with Him profits not, except for him whom He permits….’

titles.arabic: باب كَلاَمِ الرَّبِّ مَعَ جِبْرِيلَ وَنِدَاءِ اللَّهِ الْمَلاَئِكَةَ
titles.english: Chapter: The Talk of the Lord with Jibril and Allah’s Call for the angels

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏أَنْزَلَهُ بِعِلْمِهِ وَالْمَلاَئِكَةُيَشْهَدُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…He has sent it down with His Knowledge, and the angels bear witness….”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏يُرِيدُونَ أَنْ يُبَدِّلُوا كَلاَمَ اللَّهِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…They want to change Allah’s Words….”

titles.arabic: باب كَلاَمِ الرَّبِّ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ مَعَ الأَنْبِيَاءِ وَغَيْرِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The Talk of the Lord عزّ وجلّ to the Prophets and others on the Day of Resurrection

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏ {‏وَكَلَّمَ اللَّهُ مُوسَى تَكْلِيمًا‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “…And to Musa (Moses) Allah spoke directly.”

titles.arabic: باب كَلاَمِ الرَّبِّ مَعَ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Talk of the Lord to the people of Paradise

titles.arabic: بَابُ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ بِالأَمْرِ وَذِكْرِ الْعِبَادِ بِالدُّعَاءِ وَالتَّضَرُّعِ وَالرِّسَالَةِ وَالإِبْلاَغِ
titles.english: Chapter: “Therefore remember Me I will remember you…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏فَلاَ تَجْعَلُوا لِلَّهِ أَنْدَادًا‏}
titles.english: Chapter: “….Then do not set up rivals unto Allah while you know.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَمَا كُنْتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ أَنْ يَشْهَدَ عَلَيْكُمْ سَمْعُكُمْ وَلاَ أَبْصَارُكُمْ وَلاَ جُلُودُكُمْ وَلَكِنْ ظَنَنْتُمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ لاَ يَعْلَمُ كَثِيرًا مِمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “And you have not been hiding yourselves, lest your ears, and your eyes and your skins testify against you, but you thought that Allah knew not much of what you were doing.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِي شَأْنٍ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “….Every day He is in some affair!”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏لاَ تُحَرِّكْ بِهِ لِسَانَكَ‏} ‏
titles.english: Chapter: “Move not your tongue concerning to make haste therewith.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَأَسِرُّوا قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ اجْهَرُوابِهِ إِنَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ أَلاَ يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ اللَّطِيفُ الْخَبِيرُ}
titles.english: Chapter: “And whether you keep your talk secret or disclose it. Verily, He is the All-Knower of what is in the breasts (of men)….”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏{‏رَجُلٌ آتَاهُ اللَّهُ الْقُرْآنَ فَهْوَ يَقُومُ بِهِ آنَاءَ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ، وَرَجُلٌ يَقُولُ لَوْ أُوتِيتُ مِثْلَ مَا أُوتِيَ هَذَا فَعَلْتُ كَمَا يَفْعَلُ»
titles.english: Chapter: ‘If I have been given what this man has been given, I would do the same as he is doing.’

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏{‏يَا أَيُّهَا الرَّسُولُ بَلِّغْ مَاأُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ رَبِّكَ وَإِنْ لَمْ تَفْعَلْ فَمَا بَلَّغْتَ رِسَالاَتِهِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “O Messenger! Proclaim which has been sent down to you from your Lord. And if you do not, then you have not conveyed His Message…”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏قُلْ فَأْتُوا بِالتَّوْرَاةِ فَاتْلُوهَا}
titles.english: Chapter: “…Say Bring here the Taurat and recite it…”

titles.arabic: باب وَسَمَّى النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم الصَّلاَةَ عَمَلاً
titles.english: Chapter: The Prophet (saws) called As-Salat a deed and said, “Whoever does not recite Al-Fatiha of the Book in his Salat, his Salat is invalid

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏إِنَّ الإِنْسَانَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا * إِذَا مَسَّهُ الشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا * وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ الْخَيْرُ مَنُوعًا}
titles.english: Chapter: “Verily, man was created very impatient. Irritable when evil touches him. And niggardly when good touches him.”

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَرِوَايَتِهِ عَنْ رَبِّهِ
titles.english: Chapter: What the Prophet (saws) mentioned and narrated of his Lord’s Sayings

titles.arabic: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنْ تَفْسِيرِ التَّوْرَاةِ وَغَيْرِهَا مِنْ كُتُبِ اللَّهِ بِالْعَرَبِيَّةِ وَغَيْرِهَا
titles.english: Chapter: What is allowed as regards the interpretation of the Taurat and other Holy Books

titles.arabic: بَابُ قَوْلِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الْمَاهِرُ بِالْقُرْآنِ مَعَ الْكِرَامِ الْبَرَرَةِ»
titles.english: Chapter: “A person who is perfect in reciting and memorizing the Qur'an will be with the honourable, pious and just scribes.”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏فَاقْرَءُوا مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “…So recite as much of the Qur'an as may be easy for you….”

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember….’

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ * فِي لَوْحٍ مَحْفُوظٍ}
titles.english: Chapter: “Nay! This is a Glorious Qur'an, in Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz.

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَاللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ وَمَا تَعْمَلُونَ}
titles.english: Chapter: “While Allah has created you and what you make!”

titles.arabic: باب قِرَاءَةِ الْفَاجِرِ وَالْمُنَافِقِ، وَأَصْوَاتُهُمْ وَتِلاَوَتُهُمْ لاَ تُجَاوِزُ حَنَاجِرَهُمْ
titles.english: Chapter: The recitation of the Qur'an by an impious person or a hypocrite

titles.arabic: باب قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏وَنَضَعُ الْمَوَازِينَ الْقِسْطَ‏ لِيَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ}
titles.english: Chapter: “And We shall set up Balances of justice on the Day of Resurrection…”
